name: Deroy Murdock
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z1ua2d11tnlppu86t0lmuja28247rv0bj6o22vr8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4ongm3hbcchlcipj4ohj6hi70odgs2o68plkshjrac9k6ppb0ojmmsp7ddtmcpr6eduie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cdb0mmp6fdr1cooj9cr4cuobapbi46h22sh2s8i66ob3c5ge8or4c3h2bs)
This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zb037r9c6ioeeg5lu8iig0hdvqabijmibprvrc40_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5ge8or4c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zc40vh4i65ki8jkfq23buaap2ajnlhnvindiubko_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5ge8or4c3h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z544idooqeg2soc83g7cce0cqdcm4rgqh0qk3ji8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5ge8or4c3h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Deroy Murdock, [please use this preferences page](http://e.deroymurdock.com/prefs/9z2zigbdrpoj32691r2v3tt5ul0ab8guormkr774tj0).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z6khrsi0pplsqkb7bot647ri1faskgtvid6jl398_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5ge8or4c3h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: American Trucker Freedom Fund
subject: Free people don't have to protest for Freedom.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Great American Patriot Project
body:
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59741078:JYCU05EzN:m:1:3317145305:E542037FA0D727FC16EC77621101FDA3:r)
---
| | |
Peter,

A grassroots movement like we've never seen before is sweeping across our country as you read this email. Since we put out the call for the American Truckers Freedom Convoy, thousands of truckers have signed up on our website, and tens of thousands more are organizing with our state captains.
**_[FILL A FREEDOM CONVOY GAS TANK](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59741078:JYCU05EzN:m:1:3317145305:E542037FA0D727FC16EC77621101FDA3:r "FILL A FREEDOM CONVOY GAS TANK")_**
Why are we trucking across the country in protest? **_Simply put, we 've had enough, and we're betting you have, too._**

Tyranny has been sweeping across our country for the past two years; lockdowns, forced masking, vaccine mandates, and many other restrictions.

**The same tyranny swept across Canada too...and our brave brothers and sisters in the Freedom Convoy _lit a spark that 's going to ignite the light of liberty in the hearts of every freedom loving man, woman, and child on earth._**

We intend to carry that torch from across the country to Washington, D.C.
**_[FILL A FREEDOM CONVOY GAS TANK](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59741078:JYCU05EzN:m:1:3317145305:E542037FA0D727FC16EC77621101FDA3:r "FILL A FREEDOM CONVOY GAS TANK")_**
Since the lockdown politicians insisted we give up our liberties in exchange for safety, and one thing has become absolutely clear: **_no politician or government action can slow the spread of COVID-19, they can only accelerate the spread of authoritarianism_**.

That's why we're trucking across the country to Washington D.C., it's time the government gives up their "emergency powers" and returns them to where they belong: the people.
**_[FILL A FREEDOM CONVOY GAS TANK](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59741078:JYCU05EzN:m:1:3317145305:E542037FA0D727FC16EC77621101FDA3:r "FILL A FREEDOM
CONVOY GAS TANK")_**
**Free people don 't have to protest for Freedom.**

If we don't act now, **_we 'll see the exact same authoritarian takeover our brothers and sisters in Canada are experiencing right here in the USA..._** and half of the country will go along with it because they are afraid of having their bank accounts frozen, human rights suspended, or worse.

Right now, thanks to the overwhelming support from patriots across the country, our convoy is growing larger and larger everyday with Truckers from Fresno, to Bismark, to Cleveland, to Baton Rouge signing up to join.

But, the cost of this convoy grows with every Trucker who signs on, and that's why we're reaching out today to ask you to sponsor a Trucker in what could be the largest peaceful protest in history.
; **_[$15 = 10 Miles](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59741079:JYCU05EzN:m:1:3317145305:E542037FA0D727FC16EC77621101FDA3:r "$15 = 10 Miles")_**
**_[$30 = 20 Miles](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59741080:JYCU05EzN:m:1:3317145305:E542037FA0D727FC16EC77621101FDA3:r "$30 = 20 Miles")_**
**_[$75 = 50 Miles](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59741081:JYCU05EzN:m:1:3317145305:E542037FA0D727FC16EC77621101FDA3:r "$75 = 50 Miles")_**
**_[$150 = 100 Miles](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59741082:JYCU05EzN:m:1:3317145305:E542037FA0D727FC16EC77621101FDA3:r "$150 = 100 Miles")_**
**_[$375 = 250 Miles](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59741083:JYCU05EzN:m:1:3317145305:E542037FA0D727FC16EC77621101FDA3:r "$375 = 250 Miles")_**
**_[$750 = 500 Miles](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59741084:JYCU05EzN:m:1:3317145305:E542037FA0D727FC16EC77621101FDA3:r "$750 = 500 Miles")_**
**_[$1,500 = 1,000 Miles](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59741085:JYCU05EzN:m:1:3317145305:E542037FA0D727FC16EC77621101FDA3:r "$1,500 = 1,000 Miles")_**
**_[$5,000 = FULL TRIP](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59741086:JYCU05EzN:m:1:3317145305:E542037FA0D727FC16EC77621101FDA3:r "$5,000 = FULL TRIP")_**
The Freedom Convoy must be the movement heard around the world, and we're asking for your most generous gift to make that a reality.

**[Can you cover the cost of fuel for 50 miles for one of our Freedom Truckers?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59741078:JYCU05EzN:m:1:3317145305:E542037FA0D727FC16EC77621101FDA3:r "Can you cover the cost of fuel for 50 miles for one of our Freedom Truckers?")**

The time is now to take patriotic, beautiful, peaceful action, or we may never regain the freedoms we once had. **_We 're not in the business of telling our children and their children what it was like when America was free, [but we can't do it alone.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59741078:JYCU05EzN:m:1:3317145305:E542037FA0D727FC16EC77621101FDA3:r "but we can’t do it alone.")_**

**[Help fuel our convoy as we take direct action to regain our freedoms and ensure we never lose our liberty again.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59741078:JYCU05EzN:m:1:3317145305:E542037FA0D727FC16EC77621101FDA3:r "Help fuel our convoy as we take direct action to regain our freedoms and ensure we never lose
our liberty again.")**

Honk Honk,

American Truckers Freedom Fund

---
Paid for by Great American Patriot Project

name: Ron Johnson
subject: Just your endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion. & nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3mgr9--fgxr-4qqlpo3&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

|

---
| | | Fellow Conservative,

I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion. We were on an unsustainable path that was mortgaging our children’s future.

Fortunately, Americans decided that a government controlled by liberal Democrats wasn’t good for the country, and they elected Republicans to the House to halt President Obama’s extreme policies. A Republican majority in the Senate followed in 2014.

As I ran for re-election in 2016, we had the prospect of electing a Republican president who could work with a Republican Congress not only to stop the expansion of liberal policies but, we hoped, to reverse some of the damage done during Mr. Obama’s administration. I figured we had an opportunity to put America back on the right path, and I was more than willing to dedicate myself to that worthy effort.

By and large, Republican policies worked. Regulatory relief and a more competitive tax system helped create a healthy economy with low inflation and record low unemployment. Strengthening the military deterred our enemies, and policies designed to secure the borders dramatically reduced the flow of illegal immigration.

During the 2016 campaign, I said it would be my last campaign and final term. That was my strong preference, and my wife’s—we both looked forward to a normal private life. However, neither of us anticipated the Democrats’ complete takeover of government and the disastrous policies they have already inflicted on America and the world, to say nothing of those they threaten to enact in the future.

Nor did we anticipate the pandemic, the government’s failed response to it, the loss of freedom that has resulted, and the tyrannical approach taken by the elites who have created and maintained a state of fear that allows them to exercise control over Americans’ lives. Instead of everyone working to achieve the goal President Biden stated during his inaugural address—unifying and healing America—it feels as if our nation is being torn apart.

As I travel around Wisconsin and talk to citizens who love our country, I know I am not the only one with grave concerns. My message has always been that America is precious, and it is our solemn duty to make sure it survives and thrives for future generations.

President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches in 2010: This is a fight for freedom. This is not someone else’s fight, this is our fight, and it’s a fight we absolutely must win.

I believe America is in peril. Much as I’d like to ease into a quiet retirement, I don’t feel I should. Countless people have encouraged me to run, saying they rely on me to be their voice, to speak plain and obvious truths other elected leaders shirk from expressing—truths the elite in government, mainstream media, and Big Tech don’t want you to hear.

In 2010 I promised I would always tell people the truth and that I would never vote with re-election in mind. When re-election isn’t your primary motivation, those are easy promises to keep. Today, I am announcing I will continue to fight for freedom in the public realm by running for re-election. It is a decision I haven’t made lightly. Having already experienced a growing level of vitriol and false attacks, I certainly don’t expect better treatment in the future. For my campaign to succeed, I will need the support of every American who values the truth and refuses to allow lies and distortions to prevail.

Tens of millions of dollars will be spent trying to destroy and defeat me. The mainstream media and Big Tech will contribute their powerful and corrupt voices as the unofficial but reliable communication apparatus of the Democrats. We face powerful forces that desire even more power and control over our lives. Their path, paved with false hope and greater dependency, always leads to tyranny. We cannot let them win.

So I will humbly ask, Fellow Conservative, for your endorsement to help me SAVE AMERICA.
---
| | | [ENDORSE RON JOHNSON](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3mgr9-21kla-4qqlpo0/ "ENDORSE RON JOHNSON")
---
Thank you,
Ron Johnson
---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3mgr9-21klb-4qqlpo1/)
---
| Fellow Conservative, It’s Ron Johnson.

I have just announced my campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate.

I never could have imagined our country would be where it is today. From out of control spending to reckless liberal mandates, America is on the precipice of disaster.

This will not be an easy win but I am ready to fight to **SAVE AMERICA** from the Democrats.

**[Can I count on you to join me?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3mgr9-21klc-4qqlpo2/ "Please click here to donate now")**
---

clean_body: I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion. & nbsp; &nb; sp; Not interested? | | | | Fellow Conservative, I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion. We were on an unsustainable path that was mortgaging our children’s future. Fortunately, Americans decided that a government controlled by liberal Democrats wasn’t good for the country, and they elected Republicans to the House to halt President Obama’s extreme policies. A Republican majority in the Senate followed in 2014. As I ran for re-election in 2016, we had the prospect of electing a Republican president who could work with a Republican Congress not only to stop the expansion of liberal policies but, we hoped, to reverse some of the damage done during Mr. Obama’s administration. I figured we had an opportunity to put America back on the right path, and I was more than willing to dedicate myself to that worthy effort. By and large, Republican policies worked. Regulatory relief and a more competitive tax system helped create a healthy economy with low inflation and record low unemployment. Strengthening the military deterred our enemies, and policies designed to secure the borders dramatically reduced the flow of illegal immigration. During the 2016 campaign, I said it would be my last campaign and final term. That was my strong preference, and my wife’s—we both looked forward to a normal private life. However, neither of us anticipated the Democrats’ complete takeover of government and the disastrous policies they have already inflicted on America and the world, to say nothing of those they threaten to enact in the future. Nor did we anticipate the pandemic, the government’s failed response to it, the loss of freedom that has resulted, and the tyrannical approach taken by the elites who have created and maintained a state of fear that allows them to exercise control over Americans’ lives. Instead of everyone working to achieve the goal President Biden stated during his inaugural address—unifying and healing America—it feels as if our nation is being torn apart. As I travel around Wisconsin and talk to citizens who love our country, I know I am not the only one with grave concerns. My message has always been that America is precious, and it is our solemn duty to make sure it survives and thrives for future generations. President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches in 2010: This is a fight for freedom. This is not someone else’s fight, this is our fight, and it’s a fight we absolutely must win. I believe America is in peril. Much as I’d like to ease into a quiet retirement, I don’t feel I should. Countless people have encouraged me to run, saying they rely on me to be their voice, to speak plain and obvious truths other elected leaders shirk from expressing—truths the elite in government, mainstream media, and Big Tech don’t want you to hear. In 2010 I promised I would always tell people the truth and that I would never vote with re-election in mind. When re-election isn’t your primary motivation, those are easy promises to keep. Today, I am announcing I will continue to fight for freedom in the public realm by running for re-election. It is a decision I haven’t made lightly. Having already experienced a growing level of vitriol and false attacks, I certainly don’t expect better treatment in the future. For my campaign to succeed, I will need the support of every American who values the truth and refuses to allow lies and distortions to prevail. Tens of millions of dollars will be spent trying to destroy and defeat me. The mainstream media and Big Tech will contribute their powerful and corrupt voices as the unofficial but reliable communication apparatus of the Democrats. We face powerful forces that desire even more power and control over our lives. Their path, paved with false hope and greater dependency, always leads to tyranny. We cannot let them win. So I will humbly ask, Fellow Conservative, for your endorsement to help me SAVE AMERICA. | | | "ENDORSE RON JOHNSON" Thank you, Ron Johnson | | | | | Fellow Conservative, It’s Ron Johnson. I have just announced my campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate. I never could have imagined our country would be where it is today. From out of control spending to reckless liberal mandates, America is on the precipice of disaster. This will not be an easy win but I am ready to fight to SAVE AMERICA from the Democrats. "Please click here to donate now"** | | | "SAVE THE SENATE" | Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc. PO Box 1159 Oshkosh, WI 54903-1159 Text RonJon to 47682 for mobile alerts! name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
BREAKING: Judge dismisses Rep. Swalwell's charges against me!
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59743373:JBebsUEQN:m:1:3317145305:32E569F04D06D1742B8C9DA90105E9BA:r)
---
Peter,
---
Thanks to your support, we just had a victory in court!
---
**_A judge just DISMISSED charges filed against me by Eric Swalwell - the House Democrat who has been accused of sleeping with a Chinese spy named Fang Fang. _**
---
_I know I ask for your support quite a bit, so I wanted to be sure to share this great news with you, Peter._
---
Truth be told, there simply haven't been many victories to celebrate...
---
...It's been a rough year since the FBI first raided my apartment and I'm still facing a mountain of legal battles, which is why I'm hoping you'll donate on the heels of this victory.
---
[**Please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue to fight for my freedom and justice - and with your support, I know I will win. **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59743373:JBebsUEQN:m:1:3317145305:32E569F04D06D1742B8C9DA90105E9BA:r)
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59743373:JBebsUEQN:m:1:3317145305:32E569F04D06D1742B8C9DA90105E9BA:r)
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $25](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59743374:JBebsUEQN:m:1:3317145305:32E569F04D06D1742B8C9DA90105E9BA:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $50](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59743375:JBebsUEQN:m:1:3317145305:32E569F04D06D1742B8C9DA90105E9BA:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $100](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59743376:JBebsUEQN:m:1:3317145305:32E569F04D06D1742B8C9DA90105E9BA:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $250](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59743377:JBebsUEQN:m:1:3317145305:32E569F04D06D1742B8C9DA90105E9BA:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $500](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59743378:JBebsUEQN:m:1:3317145305:32E569F04D06D1742B8C9DA90105E9BA:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59743373:JBebsUEQN:m:1:3317145305:32E569F04D06D1742B8C9DA90105E9BA:r)**
---
---
You may be a bit shocked to hear this part...
---
...The judge who dismissed the charges against me was appointed by __Barack Obama.__
---
**_That 's how you can be certain that this lawsuit was downright frivolous! _**
---
But it also shows you how desperate the swamp is to take me down.
---
From the moment they launched their dawn raid on my apartment last year, I knew the Deep State had put a gigantic bull's eye on my back and would try everything they could to take me down.
---
Yet here I am - still standing - thanking patriots like you for my freedom.
---
But the battle isn't over. The Deep State still has a list of ways to try and take me down, which is why I have to ask for your sustained support.
---
[**So please, make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue to fight for my freedom and justice - and with your support, I know I will win. **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59743373:JBebsUEQN:m:1:3317145305:32E569F04D06D1742B8C9DA90105E9BA:r)
---
Thank you,
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59743373:JBebsUEQN:m:1:3317145305:32E569F04D06D1742B8C9DA90105E9BA:r)
---
Rudy Giuliani
Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Our Founders admired these heroes
body:
Do any of these names sound familiar to you: Brutus, Publius, Cato, Cicero, or Cincinnatus?
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zemtk64cve4a3q0krn5u4qclocq4s7kdhb0jm2vg_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5ge9o32c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65shh69pm4chmeipj7dpn6kqj4stksur6ad9l66p38sbjm3gbccdk64qe4c9k63gefkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3ao5lm9jreob6ehgb6ob7m2qmash5u)
| | | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8tvvkq5q5j5bvo1s7nhf69j3ag1k76udnim1910_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5ge9o32c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, Do any of these names sound familiar to you: Brutus, Publius, Cato, Cicero, or Cincinnatus? While many Americans today wouldn’t recognize these names, our Founding Fathers admired and studied these heroes of the Roman Republic. If you’ve ever read _The Federalist Papers_ or visited Cincinnati, Ohio, they may ring a bell.
---
| | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuldvk86vp70mfju6qjja3pju8q7pk4cu011fap0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5ge9o32c9h2bs)
---
| | That’s because many of our Founders looked at the heroes of the Roman Republic as models of civic virtue to emulate. Likewise, they viewed the descent of Rome into tyranny and discord as a cautionary tale their new republican form of government was designed to address. These are a few of the reasons we’re releasing our newest free online course, **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic,”** next month. Our Founders knew that the Roman Republic provided an essential study for every person interested in free government, military strategy, political theory, and the perennial questions of human nature. ** **Now you can learn these same lessons with Hillsdale College...for free!** Remember, courses like **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”** are free and supported entirely by the generosity of friends like you. We rely on the generous funding provided by so many. I want you to know that a donation is NOT required to experience the full course—it’s truly free and open to all who wish to learn as part of the College’s mission. **So please, pre-register today, even if you can’t make a gift to support the course or our other educational outreach.** [_**You can watch the trailer and pre-register now for “The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic” at this secure page »**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8sarvnb9crcgjsqgmbdu18obj2n6bmhtgj2uct0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5ge9o32c9h2bs) __ Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

subject: A political earthquake is coming

body:

| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
|

---
| | |
Peter,

The American Truckers Freedom Convoy is UNDERWAY! Two of our convoys have launched and more are set to get rolling in the coming days.

Our grassroots movement has been building for two weeks and now it's go time. The amazing support from patriots all across the country has allowed us to get this far, **[but we urgently need more gas sponsors to get our Truckers across the country.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._a8Q "but we urgently need more gas sponsors to get our Truckers across the country.")**
** _[FILL A GAS TANK](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-1LC8ag2Hr-AomRfL1A "FILL A GAS TANK")_**
This movement is critical in the face of the politicians quietly trying to sweep COVID under the rug while they maintain their emergency powers. **Our message is clear: End every mandate. End every restriction. End the Emergency.**

**[We're humbly asking you to help us get every truck that wants to join the convoy to our freedom rally in Virginia by chipping in today.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-K8PkIzZjffALCQ "We're humbly asking you to help us get every truck that wants to join the convoy to our freedom rally in Virginia by chipping in today.")**

The more trucks we get to the Freedom Rally, the more the politicians in DC will listen to our leadership delegation when they go meet with lawmakers.

In Freedom,

American Truckers Freedom Convoy

name: American Action News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpv67f3o93367g27rbqrka0lgkkcd3ua41vr9bk8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5ge1o77cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfecr56lgr2opie1hm1pj66lq7cslleioe1d71c9ieashie9pn8d9ncqrbephgmsrt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqm1ddicurm0pjmcaqr6ptgmlin49fg)
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjcrbg4po49s2pj4n69fed1rem38v11orcvleab0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5ge1o77cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5apgnc7jr2p3d1t2t9qpckbv6706gc720l1ate8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5ge1o77cdh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3meqpih2ce9rjcjt020kqfklga868m5nhjjoi38_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5ge1o77cdh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

[__**Trump is gearing up for another campaign. name: Maggie Hassan
subject: If I lose in New Hampshire (not good)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
It's no secret that this race will be an uphill battle. In 2016, I won by 1,017 votes, and polls are showing that this year could be even closer.
| | |
---
Hi friend,

In a moment, I'm going to ask you to make a donation to my reelection campaign – but first, let me explain why your support is so critical:
* More money has been spent attacking my campaign than any other Senate Democrat this cycle

* If I lose here in New Hampshire, Democrats have no chance of holding the Senate

* Experts are calling me one of the most vulnerable Democrats up for reelection

* We can't win without your support

It's no secret that this race will be an uphill battle. In 2016, I won by 1,017 votes, and polls are showing that this year could be even closer.

**If we're going to win and protect our Senate majority, my team and I will need as much help as we can get. That's why I'm reaching out to my top supporters to ask:****[Will you chip in $5, split between our campaign and Jacky Rosen's, so we can keep our seats and the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42597824/333586592/1332402004?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1666-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmUxYzQ2ZC05MTljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Feo0uxAIhP298PToBkEdkm_9xuIjxK7E3cONN_kvh4g=)**
Republicans have spent over _$7.5 million_ attacking me, but our resources to fight back are limited. This will be one of the most closely watched races of the year, and if our support wavers, it could tip the scales in the GOP's favor.
I know we can win this race, but it will take surge of grassroots support from people like you, friend. **[So please, if you can, chip in $5 today to help reach our goal and defend our Democratic Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42597825/333586593/1332402004?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1666-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmUxYzQ2ZC05MTljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Feo0uxAIhP298PToBkEdkm_9xuIjxK7E3cONN_kvh4g=)**

body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| [](http://click.info.houseconservativestrust.com/?qs=1dad165e3010c12cea21f6ddd634fc56bcda828a0ebec49a80e107f8cdf3b4c0745d1e5f9ac381e65693d906984224822f1b8626d7138c3b4cbe3bffe51e9d12)
---
| |
* * *
---
**House Conservatives Trust Bi-Weekly Newsletter**
---

Welcome to the House Conservatives Trust Bi-Weekly Newsletter. This is a chance for us at HCT to share an inside look at news and events shaping our fight to take back the House for Republicans in 2022.

Joe Biden's state of disunion was yet another example of how it's only taken 13 months for his presidency to fail. He's been unable to unite the country. He's failed to engage in bipartisan leadership on the Hill, opting to revive his failed Build Back Better plan on party-line votes. His federal agencies have labeled parents as 'domestic terrorists.' Biden has overseen the most significant influx of dangerous illegal immigrants and hard drugs flooding our southern border in American history.

**And America 's adversaries have taken notice of our weak President**. That's why Vladimir Putin took advantage of our weakened global position and launched an invasion of Ukraine--once more showcasing Biden's failed leadership on our domestic energy policy. Immediately after taking office, he shut down America's Keystone Pipeline and canceled all drilling on federal lands. Then, he greenlit a Russian oil pipeline, the Nord Stream 2. It's no wonder Joe Biden refuses to sanction Putin's oil and gas industry: _he does not want to admit responsibility. _

**But there is HOPE:** At CPAC this past week, President Trump **WON** a straw poll of over 2500 attendees, taking nearly 59% of the total ballots cast, up 4% from last year's event in Orlando. President Trump is rallying Republican voters behind the MAGA movement in time to take back the House and stop the socialist agenda.

Sincerely,

Jim Banks
Chairman, House Conservatives Trust

---
* * *
---

**" In 2022, we're going to take back the House" \- President Donald J. Trump
**
---
| | | | [](http://click.info.houseconservativestrust.com/?qs=1dad165e3010c12c5ae2832620d2679810622e299c0359250f391d360bdc8b41e46372eca133c8c01b0624262b852ca303e863f46792c69547fd689fcead1b3e)
---
|
_**Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi's failed agenda has led to rampant inflation, a border crisis, American families suffering and embarassment abroad. We must fight back TODAY. Will you join us?**_
---
| | [PITCH IN TO FIGHT BACK](http://click.info.houseconservativestrust.com/?qs=1dad165e3010c12c52c532ff33deb6860b0b7ca0d1b5d12d9e420207174bdafd168c2efcbedf7e080bcd2c55d8fa50dde5374c92414f5f4e)
---
* * *
---
**TRUMP WINS CPAC 2024 GOP PRESIDENTIAL NOMINATION STRAW POLL**
---
_[Last weekend](http://click.info.houseconservativestrust.com/?qs=1dad165e3010c12c0c299f4abbcbef01701d1d20bd4bf6fd3ffeffb8d79b0a6a3e59d8b8740ecb723841aef57dc14b84515d179690e8a53c "Last weekend")_ , the Conservative Political Action Conference conducted an anonymous online straw poll of 2500 attendees. President Trump received 59% of total votes, with Florida Governor Ron Desantis taking a distant second with only 28% of ballots cast. No other candidate listed on the ballot surpassed 2% of the votes cast.

On a second ballot question where President Trump was not available as an option, Desantis gained 61% support among attendees polled, with 2⁄3 of President Trump's supporters from the first question backing Desantis without Trump on the ballot.

President Trump is leading the Republican Party on our mission to take back the House, fire Pelosi, and stop the radical socialist agenda from becoming law. _**RSC MEMO: Low Energy Joe 's Crisis **_ _On Day 1, President Biden began his attack on domestic energy producers and American consumers. Biden 's assault laid the groundwork for even more devastation.

According to the U.S. Energy Information Administration, the U.S. bought a record amount of Russian oil in 2021. U.S. purchases, coupled with soaring prices caused by a decrease in the oil supply, earned Russia's gas sector record profits last year.

That cash helped insulate Russia from sanctions and shifted Putin's calculus towards a full-scale invasion.

Energy policy is the key to Putin's invasion, its long-term consequences for American citizens and Biden's weak-kneed response. Putin's war of aggression in Ukraine is an energy war.

And, thanks to Joe Biden, America is unprepared to fight it. We are energy vulnerable.

Joe Biden must make America energy independent again. He must end his assault on domestic energy producers, boost America's energy readiness and refocus on Russia.

Here is The Republican Study Committee's overview of how Biden led us headfirst into a global energy crisis and what he must do to protect Americans' pocketbooks and win the energy war with Putin._
---
**__[Read the full RSC 'Low Energy Joe's Crisis' MEMO HERE. >>>](http://click.info.houseconservativestrust.com/?qs=1dad165e3010c12cbfedb8cb6fd42b0ef53c64e5ee95cc9ce210b55a64c76e0ee95bb8f59c53a3b99b3b0df1662b5cbb49b1006d312961c0 "Read the full RSC ‘Low Energy Joe’s Crisis’ MEMO HERE. >>>")__**
---
| [](http://click.info.houseconservativestrust.com/?qs=1dad165e3010c12c8ca791eed7a6d2a324d8f70bc1188762460f929971a2a66d0566165b49df7e9ec555bb8b586c03c91f301e084139e0aa)
---

**__[Watch HCT Chairman Jim Banks' remarks from CPAC HERE.>>>](http://click.info.houseconservativestrust.com/?qs=1dad165e3010c12c95d4bb523f266f6fd816a77d2d815d3ea9867e079d6ebc387fc89a39d20ee037229628c6f8a4c961df1cee59a0b81f2701f1925a1dfa62e7 "Watch HCT Chairman Jim Banks' remarks from CPAC HERE. >>>")__**
---
| **THE MOST UNINSPIRING STATE OF THE UNION IN MY LIFETIME**
---
On Tuesday evening, Joe Biden delivered the least inspiring State of the Union Address in my lifetime. Biden is doubling down on his failed policies and keeps falling short of every promise he made during the campaign.

Our country is coming apart at the seams and has become a _**JOKE**_ on the world stage. We're facing an energy crisis and off-the-charts inflation, but Biden thinks America is already undergoing an incredible economic recovery.

According to the U.S. Energy Information Administration, the U.S. bought a record amount of Russian oil in 2021. U.S. purchases, coupled with soaring prices caused by a decrease in the oil supply, earned Russia's gas sector record profits last year. That cash helped insulate Russia from sanctions and shifted Putin's calculus towards a full-scale invasion. Energy policy is the key to Putin's invasion, its long-term consequences for American citizens and Biden's weak-kneed response. Putin's war of aggression in Ukraine is an energy war. And, thanks to Joe Biden, America is unprepared to fight it. We are energy vulnerable. Joe Biden must make America energy independent again. He must end his assault on domestic energy producers, boost America's energy readiness and refocus on Russia. Here is The Republican Study Committee's overview of how Biden led us headfirst into a global energy crisis and what he must do to protect Americans' pocketbooks and win the energy war with Putin. "Read the full RSC ‘Low Energy Joe’s Crisis’ MEMO HERE. >>>" | "Watch HCT Chairman Jim Banks' remarks from CPAC HERE. >>>" | THE MOST UNINSPIRING STATE OF THE UNION IN MY LIFETIME On Tuesday evening, Joe Biden delivered the least inspiring State of the Union Address in my lifetime. Biden is doubling down on his failed policies and keeps falling short of every promise he made during the campaign. Our country is coming apart at the seams and has become a JOKE on the world stage. We're facing an energy crisis and off-the-charts inflation, but Biden thinks America is already undergoing an incredible economic recovery. | | | | | | | | | | 31 House Democrats have retired because they know a RED WAVE is coming in 2022! Stand with House Conservatives TODAY and FIRE NANCY PELOSI! | | | | | | | Become a founding member of House Conservatives Trust TODAY! "Pitch in now to secure your exclusive 2022 Founding Membership Card to fight back against the radical Left. >>>" | | | | | | "Click HERE to get your EXCLUSIVE Merchandise from House Conservatives Trust" House Conservatives Trust is dedicated to help elect conservative candidates to Congress who share our belief that every American should have the opportunity to achieve the American Dream. We stand for: individual liberty, limited government, the rule of law, fiscal responsibility, free markets, human dignity, and maintaining peace through strength. "Freedom is a fragile thing and it's never more than one generation away from extinction. It is not ours by way of inheritance; it must be fought for and defended constantly by each generation, for it comes only once to a people." -- Ronald Reagan, January 5th, 1967 (C) 2022 House Conservatives Trust "PRIVACY POLICY."

name: American Update
subject: Where should I send this?
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9666%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=bcnwsYSdTh6%2bn7RTf7loRg&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25799%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vjz0BesAx14R5%2fjqItHDPw&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. _ _ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25790%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fzanxxXrE7XYxkxf9ASSJw&sysid=1)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25791%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=j2wVpVRm8B%2bVz%2bSeCWOZng&sysid=1),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25792%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JvGakCHGYzPJLmNF5iXdmg&sysid=1) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25791%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=j2wVpVRm8B%2bVz%2bSeCWOZng&sysid=1)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25793%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2farwVUBQcPEw5wn0Mq9BMw&sysid=1) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9666%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=bcnwsYSdTh6%2bn7RTf7loRg&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9666%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=bcnwsYSdTh6%2bn7RTf7loRg&sysid=1)

name: Ronny Jackson
subject: Peter, this isn’t how I thought today would go…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson
body:
Peter, this isn't how I thought today would go... Instead of coming to you with the good news that I was nominated to represent the most MAGA-strong district in the nation, I'm coming to you with this terrible news: **AOC, BERNIE SANDERS, AND OTHER RADICAL LEFT-WING POLITICIANS PROMISE TO FLIP TEXAS AND AMERICA BLUE** Reading this headline made my stomach churn. I barely made it to election day before my campaign funds went dry. Fighting off Beto in 2021 nearly ran me into the ground... And now, I have nothing left in the tank to beat the uber-wealthy socialists AOC and Bernie Sanders. The thought of losing to them makes me physically ill. They'll destroy this country. **The only thing that 's allowed me to remain President Trump's #1 Ally in Congress has been the support of America-loving Patriots like you. ** But I won't last 1 day against these Socialists... I have to reach each and every one of my fundraising goals. Thankfully, President Trump has authorized ONE MORE DAY for me to do that. Please, I'm humbly asking you: [**Can you chip in $25, $100, or even $250 before midnight to GUARANTEE a crucial early victory for President Trump and the GOP?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59745252:6YwzkUENr:m:1:3317145305:DA3574300A2F099580AC6F77305C9D13:r) [**RUSH $25 BEFORE DEADLINE**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59745252:6YwzkUENr:m:1:3317145305:DA3574300A2F099580AC6F77305C9D13:r) [**RUSH $100 BEFORE DEADLINE**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59745252:6YwzkUENr:m:1:3317145305:DA3574300A2F099580AC6F77305C9D13:r) [**RUSH $250 BEFORE DEADLINE**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59745252:6YwzkUENr:m:1:3317145305:DA3574300A2F099580AC6F77305C9D13:r) [**RUSH ANY AMOUNT BEFORE DEADLINE**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59745252:6YwzkUENr:m:1:3317145305:DA3574300A2F099580AC6F77305C9D13:r) AOC and Bernie think they have me in the bag... What they don't know is that I have the support of Pro-Trump Conservatives like you, Peter. Our Republican Majority is in serious danger of being lost. subject: Kicking off our Wade Parade across Georgia!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wade Herring for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42601817/333604600/-1730094728?refcode=022522whem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2NiMWViNi05NzljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XolZFcx8gtqhRiDyJoyf44QL7EhcfDgIZB1xXDIRS6w=)
---
| | Folks, Yesterday, we finally kicked off the long-awaited Wade Parade – our journey to all 15 counties in the First District en route to Wade qualifying for office in Atlanta! We started Friday off with a press conference at our campaign office in Savannah – keep an eye on your TV for Wade!
---
---
Then we headed to Effingham County for our first stop in Rincon!
---
---
Next, we traveled to Pooler for lunch on the patio at The Taco Stache with plenty of fellow members of the Wade Brigade!
---
---
Finally – we capped off the day in Appling County and met some great folks in Baxley!
---
---
If you couldn’t make it out on Friday, don’t worry – the Wade Parade is still going on for another two days! See below for a list of the remaining stops for our parade:

clean_body: | | | = | | Folks, Yesterday, we finally kicked off the long-awaited Wade Parade – our journey to all 15 counties in the First District en route to Wade qualifying for office in Atlanta! We started Friday off with a press conference at our campaign office in Savannah – keep an eye on your TV for Wade! Then we headed to Effingham County for our first stop in Rincon! Next, we traveled to Pooler for lunch on the patio at The Taco Stache with plenty of fellow members of the Wade Brigade! Finally – we capped off the day in Appling County and met some great folks in Baxley! If you couldn’t make it out on Friday, don’t worry – the Wade Parade is still going on for another two days! See below for a list of the remaining stops for our parade: Saturday, March 5th: = – J.F. Gregory Park, 521 Cedar Street = – Liberty County Library, 236 Memorial Drive = – Long County Public Library, 270 South Main St. – Wayne Co. Courthouse, 174 N Brunswick Street – First African Baptist Church of Alma, 708 E 12th Street . – Pierce Co. Resource Center, 623 Sycamore Street – Waycross Journal Herald, 311 Carswell Ave.. – Brantley County Courthouse, 117 Brantley St Folkston at 5:00 P.M. – Depot Street. Across from Charlton County Herald. – Camden Co. Democratic HQ, 500-F West King Avenue Sunday, March 6th: – Hillary Square, 1515 Norwich Street – 310 North Way & Capping the parade off... At 3:45 P.M. – Daffin Park, 1301 E Victory Drive Thanks to all who came out to enjoy the parade today, and we can’t wait to see what the next couple days bring! Talk soon,The Wade Brigade | | = | | | ---|---|--- | Info@WadeHerringForCongress.com Emails are an important way for us to keep in touch with our supporters but if you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . | Paid for by Wade Herring for Congress Wade Herring for Congress PO Box 9145 Savannah, GA 31412 United States =

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: The truth is clear
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz_
body:
Peter,

When I sat speechless watching a cognitively impaired Joe Biden struggle to speak in coherent sentences during the State of the Union...

**..._One truth became crystal clear._**

The America First movement must fire Nancy Pelosi and help me elect Donald Trump Speaker of the House.

_If Democrats cling to power in November, liberals will:_
---
*** Grant amnesty to tens of millions of illegal aliens.*** Ram a federal grab through Congress rigging elections through massive voter fraud.*** Ban firearms and catalogue gun owners in a national gun registration database.*** Turn the FBI loose and Trump supporters and anyone that protests the Biden regime's radical agenda.
**I'm fighting to elect a pro-Trump, America First majority in Congress this November.**

But I can't do it without your help.

**[So please chip in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, or $250 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59750748:W977YZHN7:m:1:2365227053:D5C93305C31C345B2B36F180FCB0CD8C:r).** [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59750748:W977YZHN7:m:1:2365227053:D5C93305C31C345B2B36F180FCB0CD8C:r) [_**HELP MATT GAETZ FIGHT BACK
CHIP IN $17.76 TODAY!**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59750748:W977YZHN7:m:1:2365227053:D5C93305C31C345B2B36F180FCB0CD8C:r) Nancy Pelosi will rubber-stamp every socialist scheme Joe Biden's handlers plugged into the teleprompter.

You and I can't count on any Liz Cheney, Adam Kinzinger, or Mitt Romney type RINOs to fight back.

**They are too busy impeaching Donald Trump and carrying on a witch hunt trying to jail Trump supporters for asking questions about the results of the 2020 election.**

Only America First conservatives that know fighting back begins with firing Nancy Pelosi and joining me in supporting Donald Trump for Speaker of the House will do.

_Nancy Pelosi understands this fact_.

That's why George Soros and the deep-pocket donors on the left dumped big money into a TV ad campaign to smear me.

Ivy league academics scheme to steal the next election by filing lawsuits seeking to kick me and other America First conservatives off the ballot, claiming we are "insurrectionists" for calling out the funny business in the last election.

**I am ready to fight back tooth-and-nail.**

And the good news is the polls show the American people view Joe Biden as a failed president and are ready to fire Nancy Pelosi.

**[So please help me elect an America First majority in Congress next year where I will vote to make Donald Trump Speaker of the House by chipping in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or $2,900 today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59750748:W977YZHN7:m:1:2365227053:D5C93305C31C345B2B36F180FCB0CD8C:r).**

Sincerely,

Matt Gaetz
Congresman (R-FL)

I am ready to fight back tooth-and-nail. And the good news is the polls show the American people view Joe Biden as a failed president and are ready to fire Nancy Pelosi. . Sincerely, Matt Gaetz Congresman (R-FL) | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz. name: Nan Whaley
subject: Why I fought the drug companies – and won
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley
body:
Team,
When I was first elected Mayor of Dayton in 2013, our city was struggling. Factories were moving out, taking jobs with them, and leaving our families behind. During this time, drug companies brought opioids into our homes and an addiction epidemic took hold of many friends and family members in our communities.
But I said, “Enough.” I tackled the opioid epidemic in Dayton by bringing folks together and making our community a model for others. We sued the drug companies that brought these drugs into our cities and streets. And we won. In my time as mayor, I helped cut opioid overdose deaths by half in our community.
**[I’m not afraid of a challenge. I’m the only non-millionaire in this race and we’re up against some deep pockets. But I know it’s important to stay in it to tackle the opioid epidemic statewide by bringing jobs and resources to our communities. Can you pitch in $5 to my grassroots campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42602162/333605946/685096741?refcode=nw_em_220305_1_t2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZThhYzlmOC05ODljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AxfIrlnD8QWlhfV_ugpgrMIG2fXX40qoRx7NgqCp-ac=)**
Taking on the drug companies who profit off of the pain of middle and working class families shouldn’t stop with Dayton and the opioid epidemic. As governor, I will finally go after the drug companies that price gouge and do everything in my power to make life saving medications more affordable.
For too long, these companies have run unchecked in Ohio. Just like I did as Mayor of Dayton, I will hold these drug companies accountable as your governor. You can count on me to tackle the opioid epidemic and reduce medication costs, but I need your help first.
**[Will you help me with a donation of $5? I have the leadership experience to hold these companies accountable for their actions, and I’m ready to help families across the state.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42602163/333605947/685096741?refcode=nw_em_220305_1_t2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZThhYzlmOC05ODljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AxfIrlnD8QWlhfV_ugpgrMIG2fXX40qoRx7NgqCp-ac=)**
Onward,
Nan Whaley

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42602164/333605948/685096741?refcode=nw_em_220305_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZThhYzlmOC05ODljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AxfIrlnD8QWlhfV_ugpgrMIG2fXX40qoRx7NgqCp-ac=)****

name: Ron Johnson
subject: Just your endorsement, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion.
|
---
| | | Peter,

I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion. We were on an unsustainable path that was mortgaging our children's future.

Fortunately, Americans decided that a government controlled by liberal Democrats wasn't good for the country, and they elected Republicans to the House to halt President Obama's extreme policies. A Republican majority in the Senate followed in 2014.

As I ran for re-election in 2016, we had the prospect of electing a Republican president who could work with a Republican Congress not only to stop the expansion of liberal policies but, we hoped, to reverse some of the damage done during Mr. Obama's administration. I figured we had an opportunity to put America back on the right path, and I was more than willing to dedicate myself to that worthy effort.

By and large, Republican policies worked. Regulatory relief and a more competitive tax system helped create a healthy economy with low inflation and record low unemployment. Strengthening the military deterred our enemies, and policies designed to secure the borders dramatically reduced the flow of illegal immigration.

During the 2016 campaign, I said it would be my last campaign and final term. That was my strong preference, and my wife's--we both looked forward to a normal private life. However, neither of us anticipated the Democrats' complete takeover of government and the disastrous policies they have already inflicted on America and the world, to say nothing of those they threaten to enact in the future.

Nor did we anticipate the pandemic, the government's failed response to it, the loss of freedom that has resulted, and the tyrannical approach taken by the elites who have created and maintained a state of fear that allows them to exercise control over Americans' lives. Instead of everyone working to achieve the goal President Biden stated during his inaugural address--unifying and healing America--it feels as if our nation is being torn apart.

As I travel around Wisconsin and talk to citizens who love our country, I know I am not the only one with grave concerns. My message has always been that America is precious, and it is our solemn duty to make sure it survives and thrives for future generations.

President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches in 2010: This is a fight for freedom. This is not someone else's fight, this is our fight, and it's a fight we absolutely must win.

I believe America is in peril. Much as I'd like to ease into a quiet retirement, I don't feel I should. Countless people have encouraged me to run, saying they rely on me to be their voice, to speak plain and obvious truths other elected leaders shirk from expressing--truths the elite in government, mainstream media, and Big Tech don't want you to hear.

In 2010 I promised I would always tell people the truth and that I would never vote with re-election in mind. When re-election isn't your primary motivation, those are easy promises to keep. Today, I am announcing I will continue to fight for freedom in the public realm by running for re-election. It is a decision I haven't made lightly. Having already experienced a growing level of vitriol and false attacks, I certainly don't expect better treatment in the future. For my campaign to succeed, I will need the support of every American who values the truth and refuses to allow lies and distortions to prevail.

Tens of millions of dollars will be spent trying to destroy and defeat me. The mainstream media and Big Tech will contribute their powerful and corrupt voices as the unofficial but reliable communication apparatus of the Democrats. We face powerful forces that desire even more power and control over our lives. Their path, paved with false hope and greater dependency, always leads to tyranny. We cannot let them win.

So I will humbly ask, Peter, for your endorsement to help me SAVE AMERICA.
---

Thank you,
Ron Johnson

clean_body: I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion. | | | | Peter, I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion. We were on an unsustainable path that was mortgaging our children's future. Fortunately, Americans decided that a government controlled by liberal Democrats wasn't good for the country, and they elected Republicans to the House to halt President Obama's extreme policies. A Republican majority in the Senate followed in 2014. As I ran for re-election in 2016, we had the prospect of electing a Republican president who could work with a Republican Congress not only to stop the expansion of liberal policies but, we hoped, to reverse some of the damage done during Mr. Obama's administration. I figured we had an opportunity to put America back on the right path, and I was more than willing to dedicate myself to that worthy effort. By and large, Republican policies worked. Regulatory relief and a more competitive tax system helped create a healthy economy with low inflation and record low unemployment. Strengthening the military deterred our enemies, and policies designed to secure the borders dramatically reduced the flow of illegal immigration. During the 2016 campaign, I said it would be my last campaign and final term. That was my strong preference, and my wife's--we both looked forward to a normal private life. However, neither of us anticipated the Democrats' complete takeover of government and the disastrous policies they have already inflicted on America and the world, to say nothing of those they threaten to enact in the future. Nor did we anticipate the pandemic, the government's failed response to it, the loss of freedom that has resulted, and the tyrannical approach taken by the elites who have created and maintained a state of fear that allows them to exercise control over Americans' lives. Instead of everyone working to achieve the goal President Biden stated during his inaugural address--unifying and healing America--it feels as if our nation is being torn apart. As I travel around Wisconsin and talk to citizens who love our country, I know I am not the only one with grave concerns. My message has always been that America is precious, and it is our solemn duty to make sure it survives and thrives for future generations. subject: We'll stop talking about Ohio's maps when the redistricting committee stops playing political games

body:
| Time and time again, Ohio Republicans on the redistricting committee have proven that they're treating the map-making process like a joke -- one made at the expense of Ohio voters.

The Supreme Court has rejected every map the Republican-controlled Ohio redistricting committee has presented. Republicans on the committee are acting like it's too hard to create fair maps that comply with our constitution. Well, if they think doing the job they were elected to do is too hard, Ohio voters will gladly vote them out in November.

Our pressure campaign is working. We have to keep it up and continue to demand fair maps that reflect our state.

**We can't make it any more clear:** Ohio Republicans don't care about giving everyday Ohioans a voice; they care about winning and pushing an agenda that hurts the middle class. And they're going to continue their attempts to pass unfair maps until they get their way. We can't let that happen. Are you with us in the fight?

[**Ohio Republicans need to be held responsible and comply with the Ohio Supreme Court's orders. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Congress has expanded the Supreme Court seven times before. It’s now time for the eighth.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
If we don’t take action, the Supreme Court’s right-wing super-majority will continue to threaten basic liberties for decades to come. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42602754/333608177/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ3U_SCO_E_20220304_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzk3YWJlYi05YTljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JXWZyjVrgD_5o09BYXFVQ9JTctspvXZgdgf3Q6zjdlU=&emci=0597abeb-9a9c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=0c97abeb-9a9c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=9027908)
---
I’m very happy about Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson’s nomination to the Supreme Court. She is an exceptional choice, and I’m so ready to celebrate her making history as the first Black woman justice. As a former public defender, Judge Jackson will bring an invaluable perspective to the Supreme Court. (I’ve been pushing for years to get more judges who’ve worked as public defenders and in the public interest, not just for corporate clients, so this is a big step in the right direction). Plus, she’s already gotten three bipartisan confirmations before — and I’m going to do everything I can to ensure a swift confirmation this time on her behalf. **But, we’re still pushing for more.** Understand this: Mitch McConnell has already installed a 6-3 super-majority, so it’s going to take much more than this single nomination to rebalance the Court and prevent Republican extremists from further damaging our democracy. Voting and abortion rights are hanging by a thread all across the country right now and somehow that’s just the tip of the iceberg. If we don’t take action, the Supreme Court’s right-wing super-majority will continue to threaten basic liberties for decades to come. [_**It’s time to expand the number of justices on the Supreme Court to protect our democracy. Add your name if you agree — and let’s give Judge Jackson at least four more new colleagues.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42602755/333608178/-299026285?refcode=EMZ3U_SCO_E_20220304_V1S2&ms=EMZ3U_SCO_E_20220304_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzk3YWJlYi05YTljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JXWZyjVrgD_5o09BYXFVQ9JTctspvXZgdgf3Q6zjdlU=&emci=0597abeb-9a9c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=0c97abeb-9a9c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=9027908) Not only does the Constitution give Congress the authority to expand the Supreme Court, but Congress has used that authority _seven times before_. It’s not new or radical to suggest adding seats. And the American people see what’s going on here, with public opinion of the Supreme Court recently hitting record lows. Expanding the Supreme Court by four or more seats is a necessary step towards restoring its credibility as an independent institution — one that works for everyone, not just the wealthy and powerful, and not just for far-right extremists. I believe in an independent judiciary. I also believe in a judiciary that upholds the rule of law — not one that ignores it to promote a deeply unpopular and partisan agenda at odds with the Constitution and the settled rights of our people. And when a court consistently shows that it no longer is bound by the rule of law, Congress must exercise its constitutional authority to fix that court. **Expanding the Supreme Court is our best shot at restoring its integrity and legitimacy. Engraved on the entrance of the Supreme Court is a simple phrase: “Equal Justice Under Law.” Americans deserve a Court committed to that fundamental idea — an idea that matters a whole lot more than keeping the Court set at a number that doesn’t even appear in the Constitution.** [_**Add your name to say you’re in this fight to rebalance the Supreme Court and ready to help defend our democracy from Republican extremists.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42602756/333608179/-299026285?refcode=EMZ3U_SCO_E_20220304_V1S2&ms=EMZ3U_SCO_E_20220304_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzk3YWJlYi05YTljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JXWZyjVrgD_5o09BYXFVQ9JTctspvXZgdgf3Q6zjdlU=&emci=0597abeb-9a9c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=0c97abeb-9a9c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=9027908) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42602757/333608180/-299026285?refcode=EMZ3U_SCO_E_20220304_V1S2&ms=EMZ3U_SCO_E_20220304_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzk3YWJlYi05YTljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JXWZyjVrgD_5o09BYXFVQ9JTctspvXZgdgf3Q6zjdlU=&emci=0597abeb-9a9c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=0c97abeb-9a9c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=9027908)**

clean_body: If we don’t take action, the Supreme Court’s right-wing super-majority will continue to threaten basic liberties for decades to come. | | | I’m very happy about Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson’s nomination to the Supreme Court. She is an exceptional choice, and I’m so ready to celebrate her making history as the first Black woman justice. As a former public defender, Judge Jackson will bring an invaluable perspective to the Supreme Court. (I’ve been pushing for years to get more judges who’ve worked as public defenders and in the public interest, not just for corporate clients, so this is a big step in the right direction). Plus, she’s already gotten three bipartisan confirmations before — and I’m going to do everything I can to ensure a swift confirmation this time on her behalf. But, we’re still pushing for more. Understand this: Mitch McConnell has already installed a 6-3 super-majority, so it’s going to take much more than this single nomination to rebalance the Court and prevent Republican extremists from further damaging our democracy. Voting and abortion rights are hanging by a thread all across the country right now and somehow that’s just the tip of the iceberg. If we don’t take action, the Supreme Court’s right-wing super-majority will continue to threaten basic liberties for decades to come. Not only does the Constitution give Congress the authority to expand the Supreme Court, but Congress has used that authority seven times before. It’s not new or radical to suggest adding seats. Expanding the Supreme Court by four or more seats is a necessary step towards restoring its credibility as an independent institution — one that works for everyone, not just the wealthy and powerful, and not just for far-right extremists. I also believe in a judiciary that upholds the rule of law — not one that ignores it to promote a deeply unpopular and partisan agenda at odds with the Constitution and the settled rights of our people. And when a court consistently shows that it no longer is bound by the rule of law, Congress must exercise its constitutional authority to fix that court. Expanding the Supreme Court is our best shot at restoring its integrity and legitimacy. Engraved on the entrance of the Supreme Court is a simple phrase: “Equal Justice Under Law.” Americans deserve a Court committed to that fundamental idea — an idea that matters a whole lot more than keeping the Court set at a number that doesn’t even appear in the Constitution. Peter,

Thank you,

Alex Lasry

subject: Grade Joe Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
President Joe Biden took the podium earlier this week and worked to spin his entire Presidency as a success, yet the facts show it has been nothing but failure after failure. & nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3mht3--fgxr-4qqlpo0&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

|

---
| | | President Joe Biden took the podium earlier this week and worked to spin his entire Presidency as a success, yet the facts show it has been nothing but failure after failure.
_**Inflation has hit a 40 year high.
72% of Americans say skyrocketing gas prices are hurting their pocketbooks.
Over 2 million people have illegally crossed the Southern Border since Biden took office.
Over a dozen U.S cities have set homicide records.
Only 29% of Americans say they’re happy with the direction our country is headed right now.**_
Biden’s first year in office has been a disaster, Fellow Conservative, but his State of the Union seemed to leave most of the failures out. So, we want to hear from you: **what grade do you give Biden?**
| **WHAT GRADE DO YOU GIVE
PRESIDENT JOE BIDEN?**
| | [A](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3mht3-21lde-4qqlpo4/ "A")
---
| [B](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3mht3-21ldf-4qqlpo5/ "B")
---
| [C](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3mht3-21ldg-4qqlpo6/ "C")
---
| [D](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3mht3-21ldh-4qqlpo7/ "D")
---
| [F](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3mht3-21ldi-4qqlpo8/ "F")
---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3mht3-21ldj-4qqlpo9/ "MarcoRubioFooter")
---
| _A personal note from Marco Rubio_ :

Fellow Conservative, did you see what my former Trump Impeachment Manager opponent said about our race?

Demings is a do-nothing Democrat with a laughable record. Schumer and his cronies are propping her up with their multi-million dollar warchests all because they know she'll be a RUBBER STAMP for their radical agenda. If we let up and the Democrats win in Florida, they will KEEP control of the Senate and continue to force their dangerous agenda through Congress. So here's the deal:

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3mht3-21ldk-4qqlpo0/ "Footer Gif")

I really do need your help, Fellow Conservative. People think they need to write huge checks in order to make a difference but that's just not true. I need folks who can give $8, $10, $12.55 or even $17 today.

You know I've reached out a lot, so don't complain if we lose. I'm committed to winning. Are you?
| | [I'M COMMITTED TO WINNING](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3mht3-21ldl-4qqlpo1/ "I'M COMMITTED TO WINNING")

| | |
Fellow Patriot,

The American Truckers Freedom Convoy is UNDERWAY! Two of our convoys have launched and more are set to get rolling in the coming days.

Our grassroots movement has been building for two weeks and now it’s go time. The amazing support from patriots all across the country has allowed us to get this far, **[but we urgently need more gas sponsors to get our Truckers across the country.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zkq14i9p14ca4uq3u659ss9vdlbrki8r7rc1i6i0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5ie6o32cth2bs "but we urgently need more gas sponsors to get our Truckers across the country.")**
**_[FILL A GAS TANK](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1ehfdjq48s3s6p2mlfreeh43btri133vmf6o2uo_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5ie6o32cth2bs "FILL A GAS TANK")_**
This movement is critical in the face of the politicians quietly trying to sweep COVID under the rug while they maintain their emergency powers. **Our message is clear: End every mandate. End every restriction. End the Emergency.**

**[We’re humbly asking you to help us get every truck that wants to join the convoy to our freedom rally in Virginia by chipping in today.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zjglkpdiairsdvf5paiggdi391ret6rflgaq7f7o_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5ie6o32cth2bs "We’re humbly asking you to help us get every truck that wants to join the convoy to our freedom rally in Virginia by chipping in today.")**

The more trucks we get to the Freedom Rally, the more the politicians in DC will listen to our leadership delegation when they go meet with lawmakers.

In Freedom,

American Truckers Freedom Convoy

name: Rosetta Okohson-Reb
subject: It's official: Trish filed to flip MO-02!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trish Gunby for Congress [unsubscribe](https://email
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42604396/333616968/368400405?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAzMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmZhZDExYi05ZjljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RacemsjUfciJOOXNfJDDIwcBczKU4aNuNYZIJS5s69g=&emci=5c43a037-ee9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=f2fad11b-9f9c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=14943357) Peter, There is a lot at stake in every election: climate change, the frightening rise of right wing fascism, sorely needed policing reform, the fight for racial justice and equity, and appalling economic inequality the likes of which we have never seen. We don’t have time to mess around with ladder-climbing politicians who won’t go to the mat for working folks. **I’ve seen Trish step up when it matters—saying clearly what she believes in, and why...and then fighting tooth and nail to deliver for those who put their trust in her.** People like this, with _character, perspective, and grit_ , don’t usually seek public office. In fact, they almost never wade into the rough and tumble of campaigns and politics. **But when they do, you can witness something truly incredible** : a genuine leader, uniting people around ideas, action, and the simple yet powerful notion that things can actually be better than they are now—we just need to fight for it. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42604397/333616969/1023722261?refcode=truegrit&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAzMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmZhZDExYi05ZjljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RacemsjUfciJOOXNfJDDIwcBczKU4aNuNYZIJS5s69g=) **That’s the Trish I know, the woman that flipped a Republican-held seat in 2019 despite every silly pundit saying she would lose. And she will do it again, if we have her back.[That’s why I am asking you personally to get invested and involved in this campaign, this movement, to give the people of Missouri’s Second district the leadership they deserve in Congress. We can do this—we just need to be willing to fight for
