clean_body: Peter, There is a lot at stake in every election: climate change, the frightening rise of right wing fascism, sorely needed policing reform, the fight for racial justice and equity, and appalling economic inequality the likes of which we have never seen. We don’t have time to mess around with ladder-climbing politicians who won’t go to the mat for working folks. I’ve seen Trish step up when it matters—saying clearly what she believes in, and why...and then fighting tooth and nail to deliver for those who put their trust in her. People like this, with character, perspective, and grit , don’t usually seek public office. In fact, they almost never wade into the rough and tumble of campaigns and politics. But when they do, you can witness something truly incredible : a genuine leader, uniting people around ideas, action, and the simple yet powerful notion that things can actually be better than they are now—we just need to fight for it. = That’s the Trish I know, the woman that flipped a Republican-held seat in 2019 despite every silly pundit saying she would lose. And she will do it again, if we have her back.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Our incredible team is doing the work, but we need everyone invested in change to get involved so we can finally beat Ann Wagner this year. Thank you for staying in the fight. In Solidarity, -Rosetta Okohson-Reb Campaign Manager, Trish Gunby for Congress = Trish Gunby for Congress PO Box 430114 Saint Louis, MO 63143 United States Paid for by Trish Gunby for Congress

_**FIRST:**_ I reached out to tell you that I was falling dangerously short of my fundraising goal.

I'm worried, friend. With hours left to meet my midnight fundraising goal, **I'm still falling $7,612 short.** Please, let me explain why this is such a dire moment:
**In the race that will determine Senate control, I'm neck and neck with Marco Rubio – and top Democrats like Fred Guttenberg have said "we need an advocate like Val Demings, whose strength and integrity is exactly what Florida needs to replace him."**
The problem is that the GOP is stacking the cards against me because they KNOW this race is Democrats' best chance to expand our Senate majority. Far-right outside groups are dumping millions into Florida, and the Senate Republican campaign arm is funding a new ad buy to blanket the airwaves with personal attacks against me _._
**I'm looking at my fundraising numbers now, and I won't be able to defend myself from these GOP attacks if I don't reach my goal in the next few hours.**
**[Missing this goal and falling behind in this race could mean handing the Senate right back to Mitch McConnell, so I have to ask: Will you donate $5 or more right now to help me defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and expand our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42604147/333615789/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2558-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWE5MzkwMi05ZTljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6eM6skDMjU0ACUXn63nY-NC73Ybdm06h42ttlL-TCJM=)**
Thank you for your support,

Val Demings

name: Team Victoria
subject: Free Meet & Greet with Victoria Virasingh
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Victoria for Congress
body:
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/91626/images/Screen%20Shot%202021-12-02%20at%202.18.31%20PM.png] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Hello Friend,
The campaign is holding a virtual Meet & Greet with Victoria Virasingh Today, Saturday, March 5th from 4PM - 5PM EST. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mandgmar5]
This Meet and Greet will take place over Zoom and is a great opportunity to get to know Victoria and ask her questions in a personal setting, and meet with other like-minded people who care about Virginia's 8th. There is no cost to attend the event so RSVP today.
A Zoom link will be provided upon RSVP [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mandgmar5] .
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mandgmar5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mandgmar5]
RSVP Here!!! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mandgmar5]
Thank you!
Team Victoria
Sign Up for the Event Here!!! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mandgmar5]
Victoria Virasingh is the daughter of immigrants. She grew up housing insecure and watched her working parents struggle to pull their family out of poverty. But today, even those opportunities to work hard and live the American dream are becoming less and less attainable.
That's why Victoria is running for Congress in Virginia's 8th District -- to create equitable opportunities for those who have been left behind, to expand access for the store owner to the refugee, to support our struggling elders and students, and to lift up working families.
Victoria is a fearless progressive champion who will fight for bold policies to improve the daily lives of Virginians, and she's bringing the fresh new leadership that we need to move our state forward.
Pitch in to help elect Victoria Virasingh as the next voice of VA-08 >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=220105_FR_newyearnewemail_BIO]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=220105_FR_newyearnewemail_BIO]

name: Hillsdale College via CIntel
subject: Your thoughts on American Education
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsoj5bZHUN

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osoj5bZHUN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Fellow American,

Dangerous
left-wing ideologies are taking hold, thanks to a decades-long
campaign by "progressives" to attack the Constitution and
undermine liberty and patriotism.

The
country you and I love will be lost forever if we fail to restore
knowledge about the Constitution among our fellow citizens. We
CANNOT let that happen!

That's
why I am writing to you today and asking you to give your opinion
of the state of education in America.

Give Your
Opinion On The State of American Education

It's
apparent that the current education system is not only failing
millions of young Americans, but it is INDOCTRINATING rather than
EDUCATING them.

These are
the young people that "educators" deliberately deceived. These
are the young people who haven't learned the true history of our
country.

To
preserve liberty and prosperity in America, do you believe it is
essential for Americans to have basic knowledge of American
history and civics, including knowledge about the Constitution?

Are
colleges and universities in your state doing enough to teach
students American history and civics?

If you
are concerned about the current state of our educational system,
please share your opinions by completing the National Survey on
the State of American Education today.

Give Your Opinion On The State of American Education

For our children,

Bill Gray

Class of 2001

Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach

Hillsdale College

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: The odds are stacked against Democrats like me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
If I lose here, Democrats have no chance of holding our Democratic majority in the 50-50 Senate.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42611457/333620518/-1829049351?refcode=mh-jtk736-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODk3MmYzMy1hMjljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nFcr3XktWsLSEEtjQXqUf5VKeYZvjp4FxZJNZF5fBe0=)
---
The closer this race gets, the more Republicans are going to spend, team.
IIn 2016, I won by just 1,017 votes — less than half a percentage point — in one of the most expensive races in New Hampshire history. And 2022 is shaping up to be just as tough and even more expensive.
Extreme right-wing groups have spent more against me than any other Senate Democrat on the ballot this year: over $7.5 million and counting. And political experts recently labeled this race as a toss-up, meaning we can expect another round of right-wing spending.
**If I lose here, Democrats have no chance of holding our Democratic majority in the 50-50 Senate.**
With polls showing a tight race and the far-right spending millions against me, I'm counting on your support now more than ever.
_[**Can I count on you to make your first contribution to give my campaign a much-needed boost?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42611458/333620519/-947982778?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=mh-jtk736-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODk3MmYzMy1hMjljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nFcr3XktWsLSEEtjQXqUf5VKeYZvjp4FxZJNZF5fBe0=)_
The reality is that there is no safe seat in 2022. And news outlets from CNN to The Boston Globe are saying the odds are stacked against Democrats like me.
But I'm no stranger to tough fights. I know what it takes to win in a swing state like New Hampshire. That's why I'm reaching out to you today.
**[_With you behind me, I know we can defend this seat and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate. So please, make your first contribution today._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42611459/333620520/-947982778?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=mh-jtk736-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODk3MmYzMy1hMjljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nFcr3XktWsLSEEtjQXqUf5VKeYZvjp4FxZJNZF5fBe0=)**
Thank you for being on my team!
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
| If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, **[donate now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42611460/333620522/-1829049351?refcode=mh-jtk736-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODk3MmYzMy1hMjljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nFcr3XktWsLSEEtjQXqUf5VKeYZvjp4FxZJNZF5fBe0=)**. clean_body: If I lose here, Democrats have no chance of holding our Democratic majority in the 50-50 Senate. | | | = The closer this race gets, the more Republicans are going to spend, team. IIn 2016, I won by just 1,017 votes — less than half a percentage point — in one of the most expensive races in New Hampshire history. And 2022 is shaping up to be just as tough and even more expensive. Extreme right-wing groups have spent more against me than any other Senate Democrat on the ballot this year: over $7.5 million and counting. And political experts recently labeled this race as a toss-up, meaning we can expect another round of right-wing spending. If I lose here, Democrats have no chance of holding our Democratic majority in the 50-50 Senate. With polls showing a tight race and the far-right spending millions against me, I'm counting on your support now more than ever. = The reality is that there is no safe seat in 2022. And news outlets from CNN to The Boston Globe are saying the odds are stacked against Democrats like me. But I'm no stranger to tough fights. I know what it takes to win in a swing state like New Hampshire. That's why I'm reaching out to you today. = Thank you for being on my team! With every good wish, Maggie Hassan | If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = If you’re reading this from your phone, to automatically sign up for our SMS list. What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)? The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn’t just another alphabet soup political committee. We’re the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 61 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials — thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. 6890 E. subject: Donate Items to Ukraine With Team Makki at Dairy Kurl This Sunday!
body:
Sunday, March 6th from 12-3 p.m. | | | | [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=ae12c45449&e=c2296cffff)
---
|
---
| | |
---
| **Donate to Help Ukrainians and Receive a Free Gift Card From Dairy Kurl!**

---
|
Hi Friend,

Team Makki will be at Dairy Kurl TOMORROW 3/6 from 12-3 pm to help collect personal hygiene and first aid items for Ukraine. Please bring any of the below items and receive a free gift card from our friends at Dairy Kurl!

_**_Needed Items:_**_
-First-aid items, like Neosporin, Band-aids
-Toothbrush/Toothpaste/Mouthwash
-Aspirin/Tylenol
-Body wash/Soap/Deodorant
-Hand Sanitizer/Hand lotion
-Granola bars
-Baby wipes

For those of you who prefer to donate online, please visit the link for Epiphany Ukrainian Catholic Church in St. Petersburg, Florida:
[https://www.epiphanyukrch.com/humanitarian-aid-to-ukraine.html](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=6454c2c17e&e=c2296cffff)

We look forward to seeing you Sunday!

[Dairy Kurl Ice Cream Shop
1555 Gulf to Bay Blvd
Clearwater, FL](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=957ff90938&e=c2296cffff)

name: Tim Ryan
subject: that's not me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
We have a real path to winning this race—but it will take everything we have to pull it off.

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42623302/333630985/-367109815?refcode=20220305_CGVA_Ryan&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjY0OTYzNC1hYjljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cP5ON3kA9MyPGyHTV-jCgTLs0XerFgg19mUFG3-0OcE=)
---

| | Derek, A lot of politicians run for office for money, power, or fame. That’s not me. I was raised by a single mother who worked twice as hard to make sure we had dinner on the table every night. I grew up outside Youngstown where I watched steel mills close and jobs ship overseas that devastated my family members, friends, and neighbors. I first ran for office because I didn’t see many people in power sticking up for families like mine. All they ever cared about was pleasing wealthy donors and shady special interests who wrote them campaign checks. That’s why we do things a little differently around here. We rely on grassroots supporters like you chipping in $20 or $30 at a time to fuel this campaign. But right now, we’re falling behind our fundraising goal. **[Can you make a contribution today -- split between my campaign and CommonGood \-- to help us reach our fundraising goal? I wouldn’t ask if it didn't make a difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42623305/333630986/-1623550794?refcode=20220305_CGVA_Ryan&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjY0OTYzNC1hYjljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cP5ON3kA9MyPGyHTV-jCgTLs0XerFgg19mUFG3-0OcE=)** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42623307/333630987/-368617150?refcode=20211212_CGVA_Kelly&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjY0OTYzNC1hYjljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cP5ON3kA9MyPGyHTV-jCgTLs0XerFgg19mUFG3-0OcE=)** | | | [DONATE $25 ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42623309/333630988/-367109815?refcode=20220305_CGVA_Ryan&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjY0OTYzNC1hYjljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cP5ON3kA9MyPGyHTV-jCgTLs0XerFgg19mUFG3-0OcE=)

clean_body: We have a real path to winning this race—but it will take everything we have to pull it off. | | | = | | Derek, A lot of politicians run for office for money, power, or fame. That’s not me. I was raised by a single mother who worked twice as hard to make sure we had dinner on the table every night. I grew up outside Youngstown where I watched steel mills close and jobs ship overseas that devastated my family members, friends, and neighbors. I first ran for office because I didn’t see many people in power sticking up for families like mine. All they ever cared about was pleasing wealthy donors and shady special interests who wrote them campaign checks. That’s why we do things a little differently around here. We rely on grassroots supporters like you chipping in $20 or $30 at a time to fuel this campaign. But right now, we’re falling behind our fundraising goal. = = | | | = | = | | = | | | = | = Thank you so much for your support. I hope you know how grateful I am to have this team by my side. \-- Tim = (This is a sponsored send hosted by CommonGood. CommonGood is dedicated to helping Democratic campaigns and organizations win critical races in Virginia and across the country.) name: Derek Marshall
subject: An ambitious goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
We’ve had a great start to the year, there’s no doubt about it. **We’ve had close to 1,000 donations since the beginning of our financial quarter.** But now we have less than 4 weeks left until the end of our first quarter of Election Year.
This is the most important fundraising deadline we have EVER had. Why?**Because it’s our first financial milestone of Election Year, and our primary is only three short months away.** We’re gathering more and more support for our campaign from endorsing organizations. **Everyone wants to jump onboard with us because they recognize that we’re building a winning movement. **
**[Before we reach our quarterly deadline at the end of March, will you start investing in my campaign with a monthly recurring donation?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42623812/333632301/1232707546?refcode=3-5&amount=30&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODUzMmUxMC1hZTljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lG_Imp9rcoNLjJLTIhLVXqK9s5nvBSVt30_3chHQTic=)**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42623815/333632302/1232707546?refcode=3-5&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODUzMmUxMC1hZTljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lG_Imp9rcoNLjJLTIhLVXqK9s5nvBSVt30_3chHQTic=)

**Our campaign is built on real principles that matter.** I’m running as a progressive in a traditionally Republican district because I believe deeply in the policies that I know will be life-changing for people across my district, no matter their political party. **We’re not going to leave anyone behind. **
Our voter strategy hinges on connecting with and turning out every single Democrat in the district. And we will also be working hard to persuade non-partisans to vote for me. **If we win all these folks over, victory is ours. **
**[We have a good strategy, great volunteers, and amazing donors. Now we just need the resources to make sure we can execute our ground game to the max. Will you start a monthly donation today and automatically sustain my campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42623816/333632305/1232707546?refcode=3-5&amount=30&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODUzMmUxMC1hZTljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lG_Imp9rcoNLjJLTIhLVXqK9s5nvBSVt30_3chHQTic=)**

**Thank you for coming on this journey with me–I really appreciate it.** Together, I know we can make history and elect a Democrat in California’s 23rd district.

In solidarity,
**Derek Marshall**
Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-23
* * *
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42623817/333632306/1232707546?refcode=3-5&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODUzMmUxMC1hZTljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lG_Imp9rcoNLjJLTIhLVXqK9s5nvBSVt30_3chHQTic=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42623818/333632307/-370388119?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODUzMmUxMC1hZTljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lG_Imp9rcoNLjJLTIhLVXqK9s5nvBSVt30_3chHQTic=&emci=4074ef9a-0f9c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=48532e10-ae9c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=21617867) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42623819/333632308/1746218842?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODUzMmUxMC1hZTljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lG_Imp9rcoNLjJLTIhLVXqK9s5nvBSVt30_3chHQTic=&emci=4074ef9a-0f9c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=48532e10-ae9c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=21617867) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42623820/333632309/1746222677?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODUzMmUxMC1hZTljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lG_Imp9rcoNLjJLTIhLVXqK9s5nvBSVt30_3chHQTic=&emci=4074ef9a-0f9c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=48532e10-ae9c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=21617867)

name: Peter Franchot
subject: Statewide Mass Transit for Maryland
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]Dear Peter,
It is no secret that Maryland’s public transportation infrastructure is woefully inadequate for the needs of the 21st century. Baltimore is our largest city and our cultural crown jewel – yet in the Baltimore metro region, only 9% of jobs are accessible by public transit in an hour or less. To no surprise, the region also suffers from some of the worst traffic congestion in the nation.
If I’m blessed to be your next Governor, I’m going to take Maryland’s transportation infrastructure out of the 20th century and into the 21st by building a world-class, integrated and statewide transit system.
https://secure.ngpvan.com/VaSk2uf0MEiXQ485kAoCXA2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/VaSk2uf0MEiXQ485kAoCXA2]The advantages of mass transit are clear. Better connections between our state’s two largest economic centers, the Baltimore and Washington regions, will lead to greater economic growth. More reliable and extensive transit options will help alleviate congestion on our highways, and lower our carbon footprint.
And new mass transit options in places like Frederick, Western Maryland, Southern Maryland, and the Eastern Shore will provide greater access for employers to regional talent pools – and provide much-needed public infrastructure in areas of the state that are underserved.
Until world-class transit reaches every corner of our state, we will continue to lack a critical driver for economic growth in the 21st century. Will you add your name as a Citizen Co-Sponsor to support my plan to bring statewide mass transit to Maryland? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/VaSk2uf0MEiXQ485kAoCXA2]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer.
Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate
4831 Tesla Dr, Suite J
Bowie, MD 20715
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/d865938d-d485-ec11-94f6-281878b85110/45532e10-ae9c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTUzMmUxMC1hZTljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PMYLElgS0LJxn41y3zfNnG8YYuTgnnr55Eg_mtsGtiY=&id=136194660 .

name: Karen Bass
subject: I need your input, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328)
body:
I want to hear from every single Angeleno in every single neighborhood. Including you.
Team —

It's officially March, which means the primary is a little over three months away. I've been trekking all around our city meeting with health care workers, parents, students, and activists to hear directly from everyday Angelenos.

My top priority is making sure I am fighting for you and your interests, which is why I'm sending you a survey today. I wish I could sit down with every single Angeleno, but reaching out to you over email is the next best alternative.

**[Years of community organizing taught me that city government only works when all voices are included. Will you share your top priorities with me? Tell me what's on your mind by taking our short survey →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42624171/333633142/-1345628023?ms=em22_220304_svry_esrv_gq_act___KB_ettx&refcode=em22_220304_svry_esrv_gq_act___KB_ettx&source=em22_220304_svry_esrv_gq_act___KB_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220304_svry_esrv_gq_act___KB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=gk3Gec%2Ba%2Bph7Mc90%2BvN8NOAcpjl5Fl0PliVA%2B9YVjS1X9JPK5WKtm63x5ErrlBv7O4bzcZn31VcRBOwJUwGsnH1Wh1nHBwSXmr2tf6YkTNxO7U8YfY1%2FHmD2cpjyQVC%2FluE2Nt300Um3nHRdNivixw%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmYyMDFhMi1hZTljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=87mHNDYdydltGcwMYAjbjX8go4y2TSsHiXU4k7jboJU=&emci=22d20416-569b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=7bf201a2-ae9c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=2429742)**

It doesn't matter which neighborhood you live in, often it's the same issues that keep us up at night. It's clear, Angelenos are ready for a leader who will boldly, humanely address the homelessness crisis with a people-first, community-driven approach. Someone who will work to unite us across our differences.

I've never been afraid to make tough decisions. I'm ready to roll up my sleeves and do the work. And I want your voice to be a part of that process.

**[Will you take just two minutes to tell me what's on your mind? I will be meeting with my team next week to discuss our priorities moving forward, and it's crucial I hear from you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42624172/333633143/-1345628023?ms=em22_220304_svry_esrv_gq_act___KB_ettx&refcode=em22_220304_svry_esrv_gq_act___KB_ettx&source=em22_220304_svry_esrv_gq_act___KB_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220304_svry_esrv_gq_act___KB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=gk3Gec%2Ba%2Bph7Mc90%2BvN8NOAcpjl5Fl0PliVA%2B9YVjS1X9JPK5WKtm63x5ErrlBv7O4bzcZn31VcRBOwJUwGsnH1Wh1nHBwSXmr2tf6YkTNxO7U8YfY1%2FHmD2cpjyQVC%2FluE2Nt300Um3nHRdNivixw%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmYyMDFhMi1hZTljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=87mHNDYdydltGcwMYAjbjX8go4y2TSsHiXU4k7jboJU=&emci=22d20416-569b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=7bf201a2-ae9c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=2429742)**

In solidarity,

Karen

Karen is building a grassroots campaign by and for the people of L.A. Thanks to L.A.'s matching funds program, individual donations from residents up to $214 may be matched 6-to-1 by the city, meaning your $5 contribution could become $35. Rush a donation today to support Karen's campaign:

name: Roe v. Wade Update
subject: this could spell BAD news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez
body:
| | |
---
| | **ALERT: Arizona Senate passes ultra-restrictive abortion ban**
---
**Friend, you've been personally selected to respond to our LIVE poll before it closes at midnight:**
---
**WILL YOU CONDEMN REPUBLICAN ATTACKS ON ROE V. WADE?**
---
| | | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42624286/333633686/637196004?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk490-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzFjYjhjMS1hZTljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6e9d1nQOfIqyyhO97mljCZkmfoLuZrMhycv-WxJIOFc=&emci=a1ca2d62-459a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=f31cb8c1-ae9c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=6085109)
---
| [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42624287/333633687/637196004?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk490-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzFjYjhjMS1hZTljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6e9d1nQOfIqyyhO97mljCZkmfoLuZrMhycv-WxJIOFc=&emci=a1ca2d62-459a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=f31cb8c1-ae9c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=6085109)
---
**DEADLINE: 11:59 P.M.| Missing response from dpwillis67@gmail.com**
---
Friend, **this is an outrageous attack on reproductive freedom, and we cannot let it stand without a fight.**
Here's the truth: The decision to end a pregnancy should be made by the person who is actually pregnant and their doctor – not by extremist politicians with an agenda. But** Republican lawmakers here in Arizona passed a bill that _criminalizes_ abortion after 15 weeks – in a direct attack against Roe v. Wade and the reproductive freedom it guarantees.**
This isn't an isolated incident, either. The Hill reports that "Arizona’s new abortion ban is modeled after the Mississippi bill currently being considered by the Supreme Court." **This new front in the war against safe, legal abortion is only growing bigger, and we MUST stop it NOW.**
**That's why we're calling on concerned Americans like you to speak out on reproductive rights – but we're still 86 responses short of our goal, and the midnight deadline is almost here. Please, if you believe in reproductive rights, we need you to make your voice heard now:**
**WILL YOU CONDEMN REPUBLICAN ATTACKS ON ROE V. WADE?**

I value your time, so I’ll cut right to the chase: Her race is heating up with outside groups and Republicans in Washington preparing to spend millions to support her Republican opponents. To combat this, Susie’s team has set an ambitious goal of raising $5,000 before their midnight deadline tonight. For as long as I’ve known her, Congresswoman Lee has been a champion for the values that we fight hardest for as Democrats – equal rights, health care, reliable job opportunities, protecting our environment, and so much more. We’ve had the opportunity to work together on so much of this and pass legislation important to the American people. But I know the only way we can succeed in the fight for our values is if we have champions in Congress like Susie Lee there to lead the charge. And I have to be candid with you: **Susie’s race is shaping up to be extremely competitive. clean_body: | | | = Hi folks, it’s Congressman Adam Schiff reaching out on behalf of my friend, Susie Lee. I value your time, so I’ll cut right to the chase: Her race is heating up with outside groups and Republicans in Washington preparing to spend millions to support her Republican opponents. To combat this, Susie’s team has set an ambitious goal of raising $5,000 before their midnight deadline tonight. For as long as I’ve known her, Congresswoman Lee has been a champion for the values that we fight hardest for as Democrats – equal rights, health care, reliable job opportunities, protecting our environment, and so much more. We’ve had the opportunity to work together on so much of this and pass legislation important to the American people. But I know the only way we can succeed in the fight for our values is if we have champions in Congress like Susie Lee there to lead the charge. And I have to be candid with you: Susie’s race is shaping up to be extremely competitive. But with you in her corner, I know that she will have a fighting chance. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Susie has four Republican opponents running against her who parrot the same anti-democratic talking points as Donald Trump. I’ve seen firsthand how dangerous it is to elect leaders that have no respect for our laws and our democracy. We can’t risk electing another one of Trump’s cronies in Nevada’s Third District or send another voice for his brand of extremism to Congress. We need voices like Susie’s. **Let’s join together to ensure Susie has the resources to succeed this November.**= | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for taking the time to read my note and support Susie in her race. Sincerely, Congressman Adam Schiff California’s 28th Congressional District | | = If you'd like to support Susie Lee For Congress, = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please click | Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress Susie Lee for Congress 5130 S Fort Apache Rd Ste 215-382 Las Vegas, NV 89148

America deserves total energy independence
Patriot -- In light of Joe Biden's State of the Union address, the time has come to send a message that will echo throughout the halls of Washington: **Americans are TIRED of skyrocketing gas prices and our new dependence on Russian oil.**
**[SIGN ON: TELL BIDEN TO REINSTATE THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59745188:6Oa-CUENo:m:1:3299561967:5BA083DC2A66BF6CF0D2AF36C2DC5A7C:r)**

_Under Joe Biden, he greenlit a massive Russian pipeline and canceled the Keystone XL project ..._
Here's the cold hard fact: Thanks to Biden, we're buying over $20 BILLION of Russian -- not American -- oil this year.
You have two choices. Thanks,
House Republicans

name: Rep. Demings
subject: I wanted to share an update on my race, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
| | |
---
I wanted to share an update on my race, friend, and I hope you'll read this through to the end.
The Suffolk University/USA Today Florida poll shows that I can win, but only if I reach more voters: in on-the-ground organizing, in fundraising, in voter registration – nearly every single way you can imagine. And recent polling could be confirming this: I'm trailing 2 points behind Marco Rubio when the last Florida Senate race was decided by just 0.12 points.
Does it worry me? Absolutely. Particularly when I'm just hours from my midnight fundraising deadline and _still_ falling 12% short of my $10,000 midnight fundraising goal. Every dollar I fail to raise now means fewer resources I can pour into mobilizing voters and fighting back when Rubio's airing deceitful attack ads. **It means the GOP and Marco Rubio inch closer to keeping Florida red and flipping the Senate. **
I know you don't want that to happen. I know you care deeply about this race and defending our Democratic Senate majority, and I appreciate that so, _so_ much. But I simply will not have the resources it takes to compete – and most importantly, win – if I don't hit my campaign's daily fundraising goal by midnight.
Every single dollar will make a difference in this must-win race, so I'm asking: Please, donate $5 or whatever you can spare right now to help me defeat Marco Rubio in Florida and defend our Democratic Senate majority. Here's the best link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42625277/333638054/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2553-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzYyOGFmMi1iMjljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GT0H7bStq1pdHraoImQ54yif6vlE8Wnw9FZodbubB1g=)**
With so much gratitude,

Val Demings

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Pivotal update re: the Jan. 6 insurrection
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=7rCgjq%2FwN7V9uPXrraWXMvAXIbOJbzTB&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
**It 's finally happening - there is real potential for Donald Trump to be criminally charged for his relentless lies, conspiracies, and reckless attempts to overturn the 2020 election.**
In a new court filing just this week, the bipartisan committee investigating the January 6 Capitol insurrection alleged that former President Donald Trump and his allies engaged in multiple crimes: conspiracy to defraud the United States and obstruction of an official proceeding of Congress - which, in this case, was the certification of the presidential election.
The committee laid out that after Election Day, the former president had been directly and repeatedly told that he had lost the election and that his claims of fraud were false. In other words, there is ample evidence that he was aware that his lies about a stolen election were indeed just that - a Big Lie. But he intentionally spread this corrosive conspiracy among the American people anyway.
I've been calling for months for criminal charges to be considered against Donald Trump for his role in inciting the insurrection and his brazen attacks on our democracy, and this development is a massive step toward accountability. But we know that obstructionist Republicans will do everything in their power to shield Donald Trump and his allies - including sweeping the facts under the rug.
**That 's why it couldn't be more important for grassroots Democrats like you to continue demanding justice and accountability. I'm looking for 1,000 members of this team to speak out before midnight tonight, and I'm counting on your response:**
[**Should criminal charges be considered for Donald Trump and his allies for their un-American attempts to overthrow our democratic election?**](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-trump-accountability?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1151-su-nd)
Thank you for lending your voice at this critical moment,
Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=TJ327GOscI9MsEynHKQLTfAXIbOJbzTB&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

subject: Big Win against Critical Race Theory – update from the Mississippi Center for Public Policy
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/bigwincrt?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,

**We’ve won! .... almost. Our Critical Race theory bill is now one Governor’s signature away from becoming law.**

In October, the Mississippi Center for Public Policy published a report on Critical Race theory in our state. Our report showed that this extremist ideology is being promoted, and contained model legislation to deal with it. Our bill has now been voted through both the Senate and the House by large majorities.

**This is a big win for common sense in our state.** It is also a crushing defeat for a number of left wing ‘journalist’ activists in Mississippi who ran a campaign of misinformation against the bill.

Contrary to what some extreme progressive ‘journalists’ claimed, our bill does not prevent the teaching of history. Nor does it stop teachers teaching about the Civil Rights movement.

**Our bill is 100 percent consistent with Dr. Martin Luther King’s vision of an America in which people are judged on the content of their character, not the color of their skin. **

The days when a small handful of progressive activists masquerading as journalists can create false narratives about our state are coming to an end. We have shown how we can win.

**Another great thing happened this week; Lord Daniel Hannan gave an extraordinary talk in Jackson. **

Speaking in front of a large crowd, Lord Hannan talked about freedom, ‘woke’ culture and defending the American way of life. Click below to hear what he had to say.
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=c568b8cbba&e=5703353baa)
---
|
**We are hiring!** The Mississippi Center for Public Policy needs a new communications director. We are looking for someone that can help raise our profile even further – not only here in Mississippi, but nationally.

Do you know someone that might be a good fit working for us? [Please send them this link:](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=03821a14cb&e=5703353baa)

**How do we defeat the ‘woke’ elites?** My latest article in the Northside Sun sets out the steps we can take here in Mississippi to defeat this extremist ideology. [Have a read here:](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=07d8ca4863&e=5703353baa)

Have a great weekend!

---
| |
---

Warm Regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
| Ps. Spring has sprung, so I have decided to take my chances in the yard - or garden as we say in England. I have begun planting, and this is the view this weekend from my vegetable patch ...

---
| |
---
| _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?

name: Team Latham
subject: Biden & Warnock are dangerously out of touch
body:
Struggling Americans deserve better
| | | |
---
| |
---
| Fellow Patriot,

This week has been a reminder for all of us of the serious times we are in as a country and across the world. The current priorities out of the leadership in Washington today are not ones that will sustain us as the greatest, strongest nation on the planet.
On Tuesday night we saw Joe Biden double down on his out of touch Far Left agenda. Rather than offering solutions for the hardworking Americans that are struggling to get by, he offered up his failed Build Back Better plan and trillions in new spending as a solution to curb the inflation that is crushing Georgia families and businesses.
I was also very disappointed to see that Joe Biden made no mention of the thirteen brave American service members who lost their lives during his disastrous Afghanistan withdrawal.
Meanwhile, Raphael Warnock is acting as a rubber stamp for Joe Biden and his agenda. The result? The state of the union is, unfortunately, WEAKNESS.
✅ Record Inflation at a 39-Year High
✅ 2 Million Illegal Border Crossings
✅ Terrorist-Run Afghanistan
✅ Out of Control Gas Prices
---
| Also during the SOTU, Joe Biden even mocked our 2nd Amendment Rights and announced a new unconstitutional gun-grabbing agenda.
So we responded. I won't let big government leftists take away our rights. I'm the most pro-gun candidate in my race, and in my view the only gun permit you need is the Constitution.
---
| [Watch our new web ad: 2nd Amendment Fighter](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001c4VzFpjPjg3kpBvA-VaMLDXUQPoK_ZSi_-zmV1vg-YGyrTHZEUYjeClF_ZIZSBJJUnvl8EXokMnYiWxStyOq_1l4CVdzH6iTOVMWeiyf0Vk8IiRYvWrKZJvSap9M3kSkdRsnvw9ZN7DYaqMXYMA6wVClPNK55FZ7rf9tEH190W6eEvip4HG5ZA==&c=K68BfvlUlF0qERQfth-Ef_iGs9K8bJ-kPsPUZHdm_Fnbgeov-Kc-0A==&ch=pTh600ObYYsRqI-b5tLr8HZOezyGwbcxocEGBVcToWUjtcjjCCMrFg==)

---
|
---
| We also made a trip over to the Capitol on Wednesday to support the Constitutional Carry Rally. Protecting our 2nd Amendment Rights is crucial, and it was great to see so many Georgia patriots out there doing just that.
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| Joe Biden's weak posture on the world stage emboldened Vladimir Putin to invade the sovereign nation of Ukraine. Our White House and Pentagon are off mission, and we need experienced leadership to lead American back to a peace through strength posture. [I joined Fox News recently to discuss the Biden administration's agenda of Wokeness = Weakness = War.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001c4VzFpjPjg3kpBvA-VaMLDXUQPoK_ZSi_-zmV1vg-YGyrTHZEUYjeMGj_jHiF4BfYKpPODOo60eDBQFJ2vN0PwktGrz_7YPn_PejFalflnJn86LDsNKi_rTiZbjSSxK-ZOwmuuMTu4WjiBXrnMcmMfC5VxhMGoXrH1lsZXpVYKfUhGhxbnxMbg==&c=K68BfvlUlF0qERQfth-Ef_iGs9K8bJ-kPsPUZHdm_Fnbgeov-Kc-0A==&ch=pTh600ObYYsRqI-b5tLr8HZOezyGwbcxocEGBVcToWUjtcjjCCMrFg==)
---
| [Watch my recent appearance on Fox News here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001c4VzFpjPjg3kpBvA-VaMLDXUQPoK_ZSi_-zmV1vg-YGyrTHZEUYjeMGj_jHiF4BfYKpPODOo60eDBQFJ2vN0PwktGrz_7YPn_PejFalflnJn86LDsNKi_rTiZbjSSxK-ZOwmuuMTu4WjiBXrnMcmMfC5VxhMGoXrH1lsZXpVYKfUhGhxbnxMbg==&c=K68BfvlUlF0qERQfth-Ef_iGs9K8bJ-kPsPUZHdm_Fnbgeov-Kc-0A==&ch=pTh600ObYYsRqI-b5tLr8HZOezyGwbcxocEGBVcToWUjtcjjCCMrFg==)

| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001c4VzFpjPjg3kpBvA-VaMLDXUQPoK_ZSi_-zmV1vg-YGyrTHZEUYjeMGj_jHiF4BfYKpPODOo60eDBQFJ2vN0PwktGrz_7YPn_PejFalflnJn86LDsNKi_rTiZbjSSxK-ZOwmuuMTu4WjiBXrnMcmMfC5VxhMGoXrH1lsZXpVYKfUhGhxbnxMbg==&c=K68BfvlUlF0qERQfth-Ef_iGs9K8bJ-kPsPUZHdm_Fnbgeov-Kc-0A==&ch=pTh600ObYYsRqI-b5tLr8HZOezyGwbcxocEGBVcToWUjtcjjCCMrFg==)
---
|
---
| These issues we are facing as a country are serious. Our country needs authentic, experienced leaders right now, not handpicked celebrities. I'm the only candidate in this race with the relevant experience to lead on day one in the United States Senate. When I meet with voters, they see how my background as a Navy SEAL officer, member of the National Security Council during the Trump Administration, and as a White House Fellow make me the best equipped for the job.
The voters deserve the chance to vet all of the candidates, and I've gladly accepted an invitation to our second debate on April 9th. Unfortunately, [Herschel Walker](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001c4VzFpjPjg3kpBvA-VaMLDXUQPoK_ZSi_-zmV1vg-YGyrTHZEUYjeClF_ZIZSBJJN4jr_HglOh06ntgYk2Nuatzxy6zkCp9u-Dztp-egPnZfRf0wikAWp-md2rqEBh4PJq7Fy6z1MIWXR1E-U5bKe5E_zoxNgnwq&c=K68BfvlUlF0qERQfth-Ef_iGs9K8bJ-kPsPUZHdm_Fnbgeov-Kc-0A==&ch=pTh600ObYYsRqI-b5tLr8HZOezyGwbcxocEGBVcToWUjtcjjCCMrFg==) continues the Biden Basement Strategy and hasn't committed to attend. Georgia voters deserve to hear from all of the candidates and decide who is most capable of taking on Raphael Warnock and serving the great people of Georgia.
---
|
---
| As we approach the final few months before the primary election on May 24th, I would be grateful for your financial support at any level to help us reach our goal of getting TV ads on air, sending mailers, reaching people in digital media, knocking on doors, making phone calls, and more!
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001c4VzFpjPjg3kpBvA-VaMLDXUQPoK_ZSi_-zmV1vg-YGyrTHZEUYjeKh6hOGuUoSWe5R3AzfAxXNingbrznevPa1CQk2DzJJzDpc2BE7-OvYKGFVduBaX6GdnOMU0PpULlxyOLhDBlu7zZiuUXPwMF2-RWg8F3gnZDLQc1sgwJTOgNAl0rpNqxEiTmywQt0qt&c=K68BfvlUlF0qERQfth-Ef_iGs9K8bJ-kPsPUZHdm_Fnbgeov-Kc-0A==&ch=pTh600ObYYsRqI-b5tLr8HZOezyGwbcxocEGBVcToWUjtcjjCCMrFg==)
---
|
---
|

| Above all, thank you for all of the support that you've shown me as we work to take back our country. Make sure you stay up to date with our campaign by following us on [Facebook](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001c4VzFpjPjg3kpBvA-VaMLDXUQPoK_ZSi_-zmV1vg-YGyrTHZEUYjeHmegLltTiYrSCLgEQ2PmjizoLLJ8zjicfKEj_u9IY5mi6ll20h9AKxK1vpnBDXgghWwD-Jn-2bN7CmnNfoVtFFnLrKgqNkA8Q7wilT9xLwVEOjUSyCP8YI=&c=K68BfvlUlF0qERQfth-Ef_iGs9K8bJ-kPsPUZHdm_Fnbgeov-Kc-0A==&ch=pTh600ObYYsRqI-b5tLr8HZOezyGwbcxocEGBVcToWUjtcjjCCMrFg==), [Twitter](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001c4VzFpjPjg3kpBvA-VaMLDXUQPoK_ZSi_-zmV1vg-YGyrTHZEUYjeHmegLltTiYrMBN_PS2Nf5Ocw5H_f-h0M99VZxzbZcF4Ns6LWKHKx_K7W0qMqixPqFA5V3Mp2Cu8ijPR8sWr1HepIQ42NJLzOafKphpWoKDY&c=K68BfvlUlF0qERQfth-Ef_iGs9K8bJ-kPsPUZHdm_Fnbgeov-Kc-0A==&ch=pTh600ObYYsRqI-b5tLr8HZOezyGwbcxocEGBVcToWUjtcjjCCMrFg==), and [Instagram](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001c4VzFpjPjg3kpBvA-VaMLDXUQPoK_ZSi_-zmV1vg-YGyrTHZEUYjeLEBYrK20RFjdXM3RgyctBlF6q7Z0gp9bQqcvs-b1FANXwzhSNovxfrXJPhCpQ6UuGYMPi3gj6VXlG8pgrNHfrWVuUiyZ3GREt2nxvovYvBhAzpOu_gIHYw=&c=K68BfvlUlF0qERQfth-Ef_iGs9K8bJ-kPsPUZHdm_Fnbgeov-Kc-0A==&ch=pTh600ObYYsRqI-b5tLr8HZOezyGwbcxocEGBVcToWUjtcjjCCMrFg==).

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Your help is needed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
A dear friend of mine is running for Congress in one of the most competitive races in the nation and she needs our help to achieve victory | [](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=e8b72ebb0895467aaf478616bae01529&_e=EDWXt756nH1dRQFEeuyQTbRRz193CShoGTArAwsL3nSk8GAxYL9rJp9KW06uwMMmTOEhFkTssSDfq8vxIm1eUF29jUhnw-uD-U7g1KJwGITAaDGTP4Sy9h9vA-JNrm-HWfd72wgAt4h0VKYG_2b2sDshnamOOf0C2QyrkwXfpvy0bX4Gh0wI5LnhaT8NB-1Uo073x-52OsNq9wppjPxw1D5H53sTwJWXWmBy3-torPfGeVMw3wFTWpf3h29n5tjAMDH_U81t4souI8MrLC_bQV0mWn6vT_y38lhqRjEFEzZl38D2Q9-ISqkbpF9XmC1Sf-6U05An31jlJjVWMNsvdfzZ4rJaSC2QbW4oYJ6oSNZOLsaoAJxSCpCE5AlS0vkQoNHpPOjc_yx8c4lV77nA-Z1MGinMUoLJQfFbMNwmy7V89qwD55HOL06aIrNOwdv8_qw2IiyA-XR3e1PnX6A0bG40vRpFeXjFiuyapSZ8CcFtOkvSfu-iEgA4lPT3kahi)
---
Fellow patriot,

Democrats love to virtue signal non-stop, and cancel anyone who disagrees with them. For a long time, it worked.

But now, conservatives know the Left’s game, and how to beat it. The key is to be PROUD of our beliefs, ignore the liberal attacks, and tell everyday working-class Americans what we believe -- and how our principles make their lives better.

Now, we’re seeing Republicans of all stripes filing to run for office, saying what’s on their mind, and defending our shared beliefs.

Let me be clear: The Republican Party welcomes anyone who shares our values. My friend Monica De La Cruz knows that, too. In 2020, **Monica fell short just 6,588 votes from winning a seat in Congress that has been held by Democrats for over 118 years**. Had she been successful, Monica would have been the first Latina Republican ever elected to Congress from South Texas.

clean_body: A dear friend of mine is running for Congress in one of the most competitive races in the nation and she needs our help to achieve victory | Fellow patriot, Democrats love to virtue signal non-stop, and cancel anyone who disagrees with them. For a long time, it worked. But now, conservatives know the Left’s game, and how to beat it. The key is to be PROUD of our beliefs, ignore the liberal attacks, and tell everyday working-class Americans what we believe -- and how our principles make their lives better. Now, we’re seeing Republicans of all stripes filing to run for office, saying what’s on their mind, and defending our shared beliefs. Let me be clear: The Republican Party welcomes anyone who shares our values. My friend Monica De La Cruz knows that, too. In 2020, Monica fell short just 6,588 votes from winning a seat in Congress that has been held by Democrats for over 118 years. Had she been successful, Monica would have been the first Latina Republican ever elected to Congress from South Texas. Will you please to help me end 118 years of Democrats holding the congressional seat she's currently running for? I encouraged Monica to try again – a 6,000 vote deficit is easily overcome with the right message and enough support. . I’m reaching out today because we need to send a strong message that we’re ready to defend this seat – no matter what. | | | Thanks to redistricting, VA-02 just got a lot more competitive. In fact, it’s the most competitive House race in the entire country. Some folks don’t believe that we can hold this seat – but those are the same folks who thought this team couldn’t flip VA-02 back in 2018. The support of everyone on this grassroots team made the difference in that race, and we ended up winning by less than 6,000 votes. This time around it could be even closer. That’s why I need to know that this grassroots team is ready to defy the odds again – | | Thank you, Elaine | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, . If you’d like to remove yourself from our list, please click . If you'd like to support Elaine for Congress, click below to make a donation! | | = Paid for by Elaine for Congress PO Box 66191 Virginia Beach, VA 23466 United States Elaine Luria is a retired member of the US Navy. Use of her military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the US Navy or the Department of Defense._

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Have you seen this?
body:
I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. They assume t
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3go3v6ggemp7pf03g70mk9qatn51r7lrrui56io_rp22sh2s8i66ob3clg66o76cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onje3ir6c33ekqn3d9le8o66tlk6ioe0ohm69p3ed37chh6ccbicdgmep1jeiqn0puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdjr4dj666rj6or7mthmcclgm9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. They assume they are taught the same lessons we learned growing up—that America is a land of freedom and opportunity where anyone has a chance at success. From what I’ve seen, this isn’t always the case. [**However, I want to know what you’ve seen.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2rak3i7h0bn5t7j8euv26lqaqco5q0cnts7dndo_rp22sh2s8i66ob3clg66o76cjh2bs) [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbqp1c4faalq6uldatge4qhse3t902o4i16v1d30_rp22sh2s8i66ob3clg66o76cjh2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ I believe that **children as young as elementary age are being taught to reject our American values.** They are told that our Founding Fathers were massively flawed and that it overshadows the nation they built. They hear that our Constitution is “out of date” and needs to be “modernized.” Progressives are rewriting our nation’s history and they are doing it with our youngest and most vulnerable. We cannot let this happen! At the start of 2022, I’m going to be meeting with political leaders and educational “experts” across the country. **I’m going to make sure people know what is really happening in our schools.** I want to be able to share with them the thoughts of people who are closest to the issue. [**Specifically, I would like to include your thoughts.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfeudcr15h30rdabcvc78355k9tnl2d56ouiflug_rp22sh2s8i66ob3clg66o76cjh2bs) The American Cornerstone Institute, a nonprofit I recently founded, has created a unique survey. We’re trying to gauge the state of America’s Educational System by surveying people like you. I’d like to ask you to give me 2 minutes of your time so we can better understand the problems that exist in our educational system. You can access the survey here...

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/education_survey/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zir8d1f44mrpqcp1tt81vef76i8s3k3qqioq4rc8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3clg66o76cjh2bs) Thank you for your consideration. Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2021 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

We can’t let Trump run for office ever again.

He cozied up to dictators.

He damaged our democracy.

And he encouraged insurrection.

The warning signs are all there:

body:
We need a strong conservative majority to PROTECT the unborn.
| | | Peter,

On Monday, the Democrats tried and failed to ram through one of the most radical pro-abortion bills in U.S. history.

They want to codify Roe v. Wade to create a FEDERAL RIGHT to abortion.

**Under the so-called “Women’s Health Protection Act” existing restrictions would be thrown out the window, to allow abortions for any reason right up until birth.**

We succeeded in blocking this radical legislation. But it was close.

Show where you stand – sign our petition.

\- Coach

name: Laura Neuman
subject: What Women's History Month means to me
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42626362/333643967/-1623135755?refcode=neu_headerlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDkyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Njc5YjZhMS1iYTljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gHmJtI09DkvnrgiHtC0nIn-0jx5U4owtcoaSuFVgrmU=)

| | Peter, March is Women’s History Month – a month dedicated to celebrating the accomplishments and contributions of women throughout history. As the only Democratic woman running for Governor of Maryland, I’m reminded of the women before me who fought for my ability to vote, own property, have my own credit card – let alone run for the highest office in my state. But I’m also reminded of how far we have to go for women to truly reach equality. **2.3%** That's the percentage of venture capital that goes to women-led companies. That’s down from an all time high of 2.8%...in 2020. Twenty years ago, I was a CEO raising venture capital. Any idea what percentage of venture capital went to women back then? _2.3%_. We can do better. We must do better. For all the folks out there saying there aren’t enough female entrepreneurs, I say you’re not seeing them. If you believe in investing in women, you will find them. As Governor, I will fight to break down structural barriers and champion legislation to create a better future for all the women and girls who will come after me. **[If you’re with me, will you chip in $25 or more to my campaign to become Maryland’s first woman governor?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42626363/333643968/2042683516?refcode=EM_BS_NEU_220305_FR_WHM_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDkyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Njc5YjZhMS1iYTljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gHmJtI09DkvnrgiHtC0nIn-0jx5U4owtcoaSuFVgrmU=)** | | | [Chip in $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42626364/333643970/2042683516?refcode=EM_BS_NEU_220305_FR_WHM_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDkyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Njc5YjZhMS1iYTljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gHmJtI09DkvnrgiHtC0nIn-0jx5U4owtcoaSuFVgrmU=)

subject: The GOP wants to enact their ultra-radical agenda without anyone standing in their way.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
November’s elections are truly underway. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42597251/333584875/823540626?refcode=ea.86b18dba-909c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.86b18dba-909c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmIxOGRiYS05MDljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rt1noGmDYpewu5ub6E7dlW54GyGEmWCRUFMYlrfDTds=&emci=fe4f6a7f-f69b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=86b18dba-909c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=1049176)
| REPUBLICANS SET THEMSELVES UP FOR A LEGISLATIVE _SUPERMAJORITY_ →

_**Elections proceeding under gerrymandered maps**_

**[FIGHT BACK: Donate to help Roy Cooper support Democrats across North Carolina>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42597261/333584887/435245919?refcode=ea.86b18dba-909c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.86b18dba-909c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmIxOGRiYS05MDljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rt1noGmDYpewu5ub6E7dlW54GyGEmWCRUFMYlrfDTds=)** **[RUSH A DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42597274/333584900/435245919?refcode=ea.86b18dba-909c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.86b18dba-909c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmIxOGRiYS05MDljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rt1noGmDYpewu5ub6E7dlW54GyGEmWCRUFMYlrfDTds=)**
---
Peter,
**Last night was the deadline for candidates to officially file for November’s elections — and they’re running under district lines that BLATANTLY favor the Republican legislators who drew them.**
November's elections are truly underway, and Democrats are running with a _massive_ disadvantage.
GOP members of the legislature who controlled the redistricting process have done everything possible to guarantee themselves a supermajority. **If they succeed, Republicans will be able to push through their ultra-radical agenda without ANYONE being able to stand in their way.**

November's elections are truly underway, and Democrats are running with a massive disadvantage. name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We launched a lawsuit against Twitter.
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59747285:JKArlUENB:m:1:3317145305:56D3C8870B9B4767E7AC90AFD2E34F9E:r) Dear Peter, I'm not going to beat around the bush... we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state. My team at the Center for American Liberty has recently uncovered evidence of powerful elected politicians colluding with Big Tech corporations like Facebook and Twitter to de-platform and silence conservatives like you and me. **In other words, we 've caught big government using tax-payer funding to silence their political opponents.** And if someone does not immediately stand up against this, the freedoms enshrined in our Constitution will become nothing more than meaningless words on a piece of paper. That's why we launched a lawsuit against Twitter, U.S. Senator Alex Padilla, and a handful of liberal elected officials for their state-sponsored plot to eliminate our First Amendment liberties - _and we need your help to win._ **[Will you join us in our lawsuit against Twitter and Sen. Padilla and help defend the First Amendment?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59747285:JKArlUENB:m:1:3317145305:56D3C8870B9B4767E7AC90AFD2E34F9E:r)** Let me explain... Like millions of Americans after the 2020 presidential election, conservative activist Rogan O'Handley took to Twitter to express his concerns about the dubious election procedures and skepticism of the results. [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59747285:JKArlUENB:m:1:3317145305:56D3C8870B9B4767E7AC90AFD2E34F9E:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59747285:JKArlUENB:m:1:3317145305:56D3C8870B9B4767E7AC90AFD2E34F9E:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59747285:JKArlUENB:m:1:3317145305:56D3C8870B9B4767E7AC90AFD2E34F9E:r) Shortly after the election, many of Rogan's tweets were removed by Twitter and his account was permanently suspended for "violating the government's rules about election integrity." _Hopefully, I don 't need to explain to you that censoring or de-platforming ANY American for their political beliefs or opinions is a gross violation of the First Amendment. _ But it gets much worse... When Rogan tried to figure out why he was censored, he found that bureaucrats working for then-California Secretary of State, Alex Padilla, had explicitly instructed officials at Twitter to silence him. You see, Alex Padilla was being considered to fill Kamala Harris' vacated seat in the U.S. Senate - and he was afraid that Rogan's tweets would hurt his image and chances of being appointed. **So, the office of Alex Padilla immediately instructed his press secretary to contact Twitter and shut Rogan up.** **From:** California Secretary of State Communications Department **To:** Twitter **Date:** Tuesday, November 17th, 2020 at 12:31 PM Hi, We wanted to flag this Twitter post: [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59747285:JKArlUENB:m:1:3317145305:56D3C8870B9B4767E7AC90AFD2E34F9E:r) From user @DC_Draino. In this post user claims California of being a culprit of voter fraud, and ignores the fact that we do audit votes. This is a blatant disregard to how our voting process works and creates disinformation and distrust among the general public. Twitter then flagged the post as misinformation, deleted it, and -- a few weeks later -- permanently banned Rogan from the their site. [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59747285:JKArlUENB:m:1:3317145305:56D3C8870B9B4767E7AC90AFD2E34F9E:r) That's why my team and I at the Center for America Liberty are suing Twitter, now-Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber, and a handful of other liberals for their involvement in this blatant assault on the First Amendment. But the only way we can take on the deep pockets and deep connections of these tyrants is with the help of patriotic Americans like you. [**Will you help us fund this critical lawsuit by sending a generous, tax-deductible contribution of just $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59747285:JKArlUENB:m:1:3317145305:56D3C8870B9B4767E7AC90AFD2E34F9E:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon. Two years ago, I founded the Center for American Liberty with the purpose of protecting our First Amendment freedoms and civil liberties from being destroyed by today's left. We've taken on Governor Gavin Newsom in California when he unconstitutionally shut down small businesses, banned people from going to church, and kept millions of children locked up in their homes--out of school--during the pandemic. We've taken on Antifa for viciously assaulting and nearly killing journalist Ando Ngo who exposed Antifa's vile, anarchic plot to destroy the United States and turn it into a socialist utopia. **And now, we 're taking on Twitter, Sen. Alex Padilla, and others for colluding to eliminate Rogan O'Handley's freedom of speech. ** But as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is with the generous help of like-minded conservative patriots like you. And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000. _After all, we are taking a multi-billion-dollar company, the state of California, and a handful of well-connected politicians._ [**So, can I count on you to help us stand up to Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla by making a tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59747285:JKArlUENB:m:1:3317145305:56D3C8870B9B4767E7AC90AFD2E34F9E:r) I'm not exaggerating when I say that this is the legal battle that will define our generation - and the future of our country. Will we sit back and allow elitist politicians, billion-dollar corporations, and faceless government agencies to continue to trample our constitutional freedoms? Or will we prove that WE, the American people, are still in control of our own lives? [**Please join us in this critical fight to defend the First Amendment by contributing $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59747285:JKArlUENB:m:1:3317145305:56D3C8870B9B4767E7AC90AFD2E34F9E:r) Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. For four years, leftist politicians and mainstream media figures would not let go of the bogus and unproven accusation that President Trump colluded with Russia to "steal" the 2016 election. But now that there is clear evidence that a California elected official colluded with big tech to censor conservatives who wanted to comment on the 2020 election those same leftists are dead-silent. I am absolutely fed up with left's hypocrisy, double-standards, and blatantly unconstitutional behavior. [**That 's why I'm urgently asking you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty to help us fund our lawsuit against Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla. **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59747285:JKArlUENB:m:1:3317145305:56D3C8870B9B4767E7AC90AFD2E34F9E:r) [**DONATE**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59747285:JKArlUENB:m:1:3317145305:56D3C8870B9B4767E7AC90AFD2E34F9E:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59747285:JKArlUENB:m:1:3317145305:56D3C8870B9B4767E7AC90AFD2E34F9E:r) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59747285:JKArlUENB:m:1:3317145305:56D3C8870B9B4767E7AC90AFD2E34F9E:r) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
(C) The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59747286:JKArlUENB:m:1:3317145305:56D3C8870B9B4767E7AC90AFD2E34F9E:r) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177
---

name: Team Samuels
subject: Voters deserve fair maps
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BEN SAMUELS FOR CONGRESS
body:
We believe in democracy. That means voters should choose leaders and both sides should accept those decisions. But here in Missouri, the state government is fighting to make sure elected officials can determine who their voters are. The proposed map creates SEVEN conservative districts and ONLY ONE that is not. | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42626444/333644227/-626788757?refcode=220305-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWIyMzc3YS1iYjljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yyztIi2alW2C5p8C6ZOpANh0s5x7CeHMBbZB0rF05No=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42626445/333644228/-626788757?refcode=220305-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWIyMzc3YS1iYjljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yyztIi2alW2C5p8C6ZOpANh0s5x7CeHMBbZB0rF05No=) Dear Friend, We believe in democracy. That means voters should choose leaders and both sides should accept those decisions. But here in Missouri, the state government is fighting to make sure **elected officials can determine who their voters are.** The proposed map creates SEVEN conservative districts and ONLY ONE that is not. This is not a question of partisan politics. This is a question of fair democratic representation. Every Missourian deserves to have their voice heard on EVERY level. **[Donate now to Ben Samuels for Congress and elect someone who believes in fairness.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42626446/333644229/-626788757?refcode=220305-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWIyMzc3YS1iYjljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yyztIi2alW2C5p8C6ZOpANh0s5x7CeHMBbZB0rF05No=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | **[**DONATE $10 >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42626447/333644231/-626788757?refcode=220305-email&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWIyMzc3YS1iYjljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yyztIi2alW2C5p8C6ZOpANh0s5x7CeHMBbZB0rF05No=)** | **[**DONATE $25 >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42626448/333644232/-626788757?refcode=220305-email&express_lane=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWIyMzc3YS1iYjljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yyztIi2alW2C5p8C6ZOpANh0s5x7CeHMBbZB0rF05No=)**

We know that Trump and his Big Lie conspiracy theory is hurting our democracy, but the combination of voter suppression and gerrymandering could set us on a dangerous plan.
**[Our democracy is in danger. Ben knows that Americans prefer freedom and choice to suppression and lies. We need leaders like that. Rush in $15 now!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42626453/333644237/-626788757?refcode=220305-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWIyMzc3YS1iYjljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yyztIi2alW2C5p8C6ZOpANh0s5x7CeHMBbZB0rF05No=)**
