name: Delegate John McGuire III
subject: Session Update Jan 2022 Week 8
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire
body:
Navy SEAL Father Business Owner
---
| | | | | | 2022 Session Update Week 8
---
| VA Delegate John McGuire (Navy SEAL - Father - Business Owner)
---
|
---
| The General Assembly convened on January 12, marking the beginning of the 402nd legislative session of the House of Delegates.
---
| We have much work ahead of us to make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family. It is an honor to be your voice and fight for our conservative values in Richmond. Inflation, taxes, public safety, education, School Choice, Ukraine, election integrity, infrastructure, rural broadband, healthcare, and more are on the minds of fellow Virginians. Governor Youngkin and the rest of us in the General Assembly are working hard to address your concerns. We will send this newsletter out once per week while in session. We have one week to go!
---
| COVID Mandates
---
|
---
| It is past time to live with COVID, treat it like the flu, and move on. Students across Virginia went to school Monday mask optional. Republican Governor Glenn Youngkin ordered State Agencies, including Public Colleges and Universities, to stop requiring employees to be vaccinated. Attorney General Jason Miyares[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jxWKejTCQF9PUTBAfKArnlr8qdAVg2s58XiQKaIfD5F8HyU-iXIy5TUauG2TZzBdqWjM9KNYOYdcfZ8_XCffLCftV2ZEN4DUe6OZm6dptU16-SGqsvZBrHWDPdRAU_hrhId8vAXnbjxdrhkBrHkIE_pzMjrhw4zbHgRUYGaIAphXWP3ExP3YxpoLjEfsKkeqNiHtNqiMwd0qoa_D5bOjCF51_JdRfGuLvauEsjGFjZPLCHULHGeYcjV8FxZSofcoTP4q-TwNcvpiV-eVxYj4cmICD-GlKlWr&c=PDdb_pekoDkqt7UKsqmcbGI19V2eqyAhWmMSXGq7VQa20SIK618OQQ==&ch=v-3LyimWO5G1yaWGbiEZQAu7w1RoauR9Or08c9wqV7PJ5kYxyFHeeA==)issued a legal opinion that public campuses are not authorized to impose vaccination mandates for students.
The University of Virginia said Monday it will stop threatening to disenroll students who do not have booster shots this semester. The New Civil Liberties Alliance (NCLA) welcomed the University's decision to reverse its mandate and recognizes that booster mandates, especially for young people and those who have just recovered from COVID-19, are unconstitutional, unethical, and unsupported by the science.
---
| Lunch with Governor Youngkin in Louisa County
---
|
---
|
---
| It was an honor to have lunch with Governor Glenn Youngkin in Louisa to discuss current issues, such as eliminating the grocery tax, reducing taxes on Veteran retirement pay, and strategizing as we wrap up session. We are trying to get big things done in the next week! He also got a chance to greet other local elected officials and to taste Donna's awesome BBQ! #SmokinEddies
---
| CPAC 2022
---
|
---
---
---
| The theme at CPAC 2022 was "Awake Not Woke". It was an honor to receive one of the highest awards for Conservative Excellence and to represent Virginia at CPAC 2022 in Orlando. Conservative Chair of the House Freedom Caucus Congressman Jim Jordan kicked off the Lawmakers Reception by thanking fellow lawmakers for fighting for conservative values. The Conservative Political Action Conference is the largest and most influential gathering of conservatives in the world. Launched in 1974, CPAC brings together hundreds of conservative organizations, thousands of activists, millions of viewers and the best and brightest leaders in the world.
Trump had us fired up for almost two hours at CPAC. You can watch his full speech [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jxWKejTCQF9PUTBAfKArnlr8qdAVg2s58XiQKaIfD5F8HyU-iXIy5TUauG2TZzBdiwI1qL78kK7JBHVnakPrwsxwe6mHniIC1KjvwQVCLamfE9uVGjOCTqWd2qdqcqJETqgw5P09e9rSdYIB55heoNN3Ig9juNzknwhXhX1BPe9cCY9ucGlDhA==&c=PDdb_pekoDkqt7UKsqmcbGI19V2eqyAhWmMSXGq7VQa20SIK618OQQ==&ch=v-3LyimWO5G1yaWGbiEZQAu7w1RoauR9Or08c9wqV7PJ5kYxyFHeeA==)! For a list of President Trump's Accomplishments click [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jxWKejTCQF9PUTBAfKArnlr8qdAVg2s58XiQKaIfD5F8HyU-iXIy5TUauG2TZzBdqAAWnELBrkc4SbgmNeuz9aUBenmzfWYJpGZ7TB58b8K93pF32CJ81rTzwApop_XWKoE_Tb3J0UI0SaQMd9CksGPfOF1Vb8H8ovXwljzhBlZx30oIeJ7QCvZ_kbuRBgGRDEs5yLXUcqnNLtJA6UA6eg==&c=PDdb_pekoDkqt7UKsqmcbGI19V2eqyAhWmMSXGq7VQa20SIK618OQQ==&ch=v-3LyimWO5G1yaWGbiEZQAu7w1RoauR9Or08c9wqV7PJ5kYxyFHeeA==).
It was great to see fellow Virginia conservative Congressman Dave Brat at CPAC.
---
| Joe Thomas Radio Interview CPAC
---
|
---
| While in Orlando, FL, I did an interview with our friend and Conservative radio talk show host, Joe Thomas, of Charlottesville's "In-The-Morning" show. We covered a lot of ground. We discussed Ukraine, Biden's failed administration, and legislation going through the General Assembly. [Click Here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jxWKejTCQF9PUTBAfKArnlr8qdAVg2s58XiQKaIfD5F8HyU-iXIy5TUauG2TZzBdWRh0ld-dSakqKUMwvokI5FEcEMCncd4fBWIesKlHN1YTRU1q1yzjWkqSHVk-tWOqN2oRd3rQnUvltsb4aAYG2exalA5qCPr_71pSPbeKhs4rFRrq6-LCOtRy9Ror1GPlH2gNpPqfyVE_SHLhpqAZGemTjEF7EZhxg-0v_naysPVStLL4pixMFg==&c=PDdb_pekoDkqt7UKsqmcbGI19V2eqyAhWmMSXGq7VQa20SIK618OQQ==&ch=v-3LyimWO5G1yaWGbiEZQAu7w1RoauR9Or08c9wqV7PJ5kYxyFHeeA==) for the interview.
---
| Family Foundation Breakfast
---
|
---
| Saturday, it was a huge honor to introduce our friend and Congressman Rob Wittman at the Family Foundation breakfast. He is the ranking member of Congress in Virginia, sits on the Armed Services Committee, and is on the front lines ensuring we get a majority in November. Delegate Mike Cherry is having a great first session in the General Assembly. He started us off with a prayer and then gave a legislative update.
---
| Chris and Jennifer Colsey Louisa County
---
|
---
| It is encouraging to meet constituents who care about what is going on in the General Assembly. Thank you Chris and Jennifer Colsey in Louisa County for taking time to discuss policy and local issues with me. We need more people to get involved.
---
| John McGuire for Senate District 10
---
|
---
| In case you missed it, I announced my candidacy for the Senate of Virginia's 10th District for 2023.
List of the new VA Senate District 10 Counties:
Hanover Powatan Louisa Fluvanna Goochland Buckingham Appomattox Amelia Prince Edward Cumberland
You cannot vote for me this year, but you can send prayers, sign up to become a volunteer, and more. Please tell friends to join Team McGuire at john@mcguireforvirginia.com
---
| Pray for Ukraine
---
|
---
| The unnecessary Russian war with Ukraine is causing the death of thousands of innocent people. Now the Russians have taken control of the largest nuclear power plant in Europe. Ukrainian President Zelenskyy is setting an example for the world by showing great courage and strength in the face of extreme tyranny. Real sanctions, such as going after Russian oil, and fully resupplying Ukrainians can make a difference. May God grant strength to the people of Ukraine during these trying times.
---
| Speaker's Bible Study
---
|
---
|
Secretary of the Commonwealth Kay Coles James led the weekly Wednesday Speaker's 7am Bible study this morning. She discussed John 15:1-8 and mentioned that her theme was "unbothered", meaning she puts God first and doesn't worry about negativity.

---
| Veteran Retirement Pay Tax Reduction
---
|
---
| My bill, HB 1128, to reduce taxes on Veteran Retirement Pay passed the House with 98 yes votes. This bill had an emergency clause, no age requirement, and would reduce taxable retirement pay for retired Veterans 20k year one, 30k year two, and 40k the third year on. Unfortunately, the Senate would not accept my bill that passed the House. The senate version, carried by Senator Reeves, had no emergency clause, an age requirement of 60, and reduced taxes on retired Veteran pay 5k year one, 10k year two, and 15k the third year on. Delegate Barry Knight helped us work out a compromise. The compromise bill will have no emergency clause, has an age 55 requirement, will reduce taxable retirement pay for retired Veterans 10k year one, 20k year two, 30k year three, and 40k the fourth year on. I'll keep you posted as we make progress on veteran issues!
---
| Cut the Grocery Tax
---
|
---
|
---
| Promises kept! Governor Glenn Youngkin day one game plan. There was a "Cut the Grocery Tax" rally at the Capitol building. My friend and fellow Delegate Joe McNamara is carrying the HB 90 bill which will cut taxes for Virginians by approximately $500 million per year!
---
| Democrats Support Criminals
---
|
---
| On a slew of party line votes, VA State Senate Democrats killed 17 out of 20 Republican bills this week that would have made it easier for law enforcement to keep violent criminals off our streets. The theme under Democrat rule has been, "police are bad, criminals are good." Clearly, Democrats learned nothing from last year's elections, when Virginians made it clear that they want safer communities, not more crime.
---
| SB 36: Repeal "Predator Protection Act"
---
|
---
| Many you remember the boy who attacked a girl in the bathroom in Loudon County and the superintendent tried to cover it up. The Senate version to repeal HB 257, "Predator Protection Act", passed the House and is headed to the Governor. Police and parents should be informed on stalking, abduction, and sexual battery cases. Our children are number one and must be protected.
---
| Fentanyl Overdose Bill Killed in Senate
---
|
---
| My bill, HB108, was killed in the Senate this week. This bill would have made it a felony homicide for someone to distribute fentanyl and other controlled substances, which results in a fatal overdose. We have a fatal overdose epidemic in Virginia. In fact, Richmond is the center of these deaths. How many more Virginians need to die before the General Assembly takes seriously the unprecedented health emergency caused by drug traffickers?
---
| Solar Farm Bills
---
|
---
| We are huge supporters of farmers and agri-business. We must preserve rural Virginia from these outside companies that destroy thousands of acres of land, so I continue to vote no on Solar Farm bills. What are your thoughts?
---
| Catalytic Converter
---
|
---
| There is a catalytic converter theft epidemic in Virginia. We are working on a couple of bills that would increase penalties for those who steal or sell stolen catalytic converters.
---
| State of the Union
---
|
---
| The State of the Union under President Biden can be summed up in one word: failure. Inflation failure, border failure, Afghanistan failure, COVID failure, supply chain failure, Ukraine failure, and crime failure. Republican Congresswoman Lauren Boebert spoke up and reminded Joe Biden and others to remember our 13 fallen who were killed in action during the failed withdrawal from Afghanistan.
---
| Charity Basketball
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| We raised $50,263 for the VCU Massey Cancer Center. In a Basketball game fundraiser, Glenn Youngkin and his staff beat the Lobbyists 38-34. The House of Delegates beat the State Senate 33-26. Since our financial goal was met, Republican Delegate Matt Faris shaved the mustache off of Democrat Delegate Mike Mullins. We had a great time blowing off steam in a bipartisan way for a good cause.
---
| Military Caucus
---
|
---
| I attended the weekly Wednesday General Assembly Military & Veterans Caucus with U.S. Marine and Lieutenant Governor Winsome Sears, fellow veterans, and other fellow legislators.
---
| Our Intern: Josh Usry
---
|
---
| Josh Usry, who is a Goochland High School football player, came to shadow me at the General Assembly this week. He has a bright future and would like to attend a service academy. Thank you, Josh, for your interest to serve
---
| SB 656: Sexually Explicit Material
---
|
---
| Parental Empowerment, a bill giving parents the power to review sexually explicit material before it is taught in the classroom, has passed both chambers of the General Assembly and is headed to Gov. Glenn Youngkin's desk, fulfilling one of the key promises of the Republican's campaign for office.
---
| Pro Life
---
|
---
| Unfortunately, all pro-life bills such as "born alive" and "20-week abortion ban" failed to pass in the General Assembly this year. Democrats in the Senate supported by organizations like Planned Parenthood defeated all efforts to protect the life of the unborn and the mother. That is why we must win the Senate next year. I will never stop fighting to protect our most vulnerable.
---
| 2nd Amendment
---
|
---
| Unfortunately, all pro-2nd Amendment bills including "repealing red flag laws" failed to pass in the General Assembly this year. Democrats in the Senate do not believe it is our God given right to protect ourselves and our family. What part of "Shall not be infringed" do they not understand?
---
|
Women's History Month
---
|
---
| In 1987, Congress expanded Women's "Week" to Women's "Month" since it passed a resolution (and the President issued a proclamation) designating the month of March, "Women's History Month". I recommend you stop by the Capitol and visit the Virginia Women's Monument, a state memorial in Richmond, Virginia, commemorating the contributions of Virginia women to the history of the Commonwealth of Virginia and the United States of America. Learn more [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jxWKejTCQF9PUTBAfKArnlr8qdAVg2s58XiQKaIfD5F8HyU-iXIy5TUauG2TZzBdrXBVP5lQiP_N2pDDnltnBXJHlfmMJrN4xUToVycqQpNI5eDj3CoruXiv3BmACgr9OiK1hEbq2_6BI-aPehCfFf3DAQs1-5Dh1Rdiz8yoX3KFN8QzWtdNkWbGaYhRpq96&c=PDdb_pekoDkqt7UKsqmcbGI19V2eqyAhWmMSXGq7VQa20SIK618OQQ==&ch=v-3LyimWO5G1yaWGbiEZQAu7w1RoauR9Or08c9wqV7PJ5kYxyFHeeA==).

Our caucus focuses on issues related to taking care of our veterans in Virginia. Great to see so many friends and supporters there! #VeteransCaucus #America #GoNavy

clean_body: Navy SEAL Father Business Owner | | | | | | 2022 Session Update Week 8 | VA Delegate John McGuire (Navy SEAL - Father - Business Owner) | | The General Assembly convened on January 12, marking the beginning of the 402nd legislative session of the House of Delegates. | We have much work ahead of us to make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family. It is an honor to be your voice and fight for our conservative values in Richmond. Inflation, taxes, public safety, education, School Choice, Ukraine, election integrity, infrastructure, rural broadband, healthcare, and more are on the minds of fellow Virginians. Governor Youngkin and the rest of us in the General Assembly are working hard to address your concerns. We will send this newsletter out once per week while in session. We have one week to go! | COVID Mandates | | It is past time to live with COVID, treat it like the flu, and move on. Students across Virginia went to school Monday mask optional. Republican Governor Glenn Youngkin ordered State Agencies, including Public Colleges and Universities, to stop requiring employees to be vaccinated. Attorney General Jason Miyares a legal opinion that public campuses are not authorized to impose vaccination mandates for students. The University of Virginia said Monday it will stop threatening to disenroll students who do not have booster shots this semester. The New Civil Liberties Alliance (NCLA) welcomed the University's decision to reverse its mandate and recognizes that booster mandates, especially for young people and those who have just recovered from COVID-19, are unconstitutional, unethical, and unsupported by the science. | Lunch with Governor Youngkin in Louisa County | | | It was an honor to have lunch with Governor Glenn Youngkin in Louisa to discuss current issues, such as eliminating the grocery tax, reducing taxes on Veteran retirement pay, and strategizing as we wrap up session. We are trying to get big things done in the next week! He also got a chance to greet other local elected officials and to taste Donna's awesome BBQ! #SmokinEddies | CPAC 2022 | | The theme at CPAC 2022 was "Awake Not Woke". It was an honor to receive one of the highest awards for Conservative Excellence and to represent Virginia at CPAC 2022 in Orlando. Conservative Chair of the House Freedom Caucus Congressman Jim Jordan kicked off the Lawmakers Reception by thanking fellow lawmakers for fighting for conservative values. The Conservative Political Action Conference is the largest and most influential gathering of conservatives in the world. Launched in 1974, CPAC brings together hundreds of conservative organizations, thousands of activists, millions of viewers and the best and brightest leaders in the world. Trump had us fired up for almost two hours at CPAC. You can watch his full speech ==! For a list of President Trump's Accomplishments click ==. It was great to see fellow Virginia conservative Congressman Dave Brat at CPAC. | Joe Thomas Radio Interview CPAC | | While in Orlando, FL, I did an interview with our friend and Conservative radio talk show host, Joe Thomas, of Charlottesville's "In-The-Morning" show. We covered a lot of ground. We discussed Ukraine, Biden's failed administration, and legislation going through the General Assembly. == for the interview. | Family Foundation Breakfast | | Saturday, it was a huge honor to introduce our friend and Congressman Rob Wittman at the Family Foundation breakfast. He is the ranking member of Congress in Virginia, sits on the Armed Services Committee, and is on the front lines ensuring we get a majority in November. Delegate Mike Cherry is having a great first session in the General Assembly. He started us off with a prayer and then gave a legislative update. | Chris and Jennifer Colsey Louisa County | | It is encouraging to meet constituents who care about what is going on in the General Assembly. Thank you Chris and Jennifer Colsey in Louisa County for taking time to discuss policy and local issues with me. We need more people to get involved. | John McGuire for Senate District 10 | | In case you missed it, I announced my candidacy for the Senate of Virginia's 10th District for 2023. List of the new VA Senate District 10 Counties: Hanover Powatan Louisa Fluvanna Goochland Buckingham Appomattox Amelia Prince Edward Cumberland You cannot vote for me this year, but you can send prayers, sign up to become a volunteer, and more. Please tell friends to join Team McGuire at john@mcguireforvirginia.com | Pray for Ukraine | | The unnecessary Russian war with Ukraine is causing the death of thousands of innocent people. Now the Russians have taken control of the largest nuclear power plant in Europe. Ukrainian President Zelenskyy is setting an example for the world by showing great courage and strength in the face of extreme tyranny. Real sanctions, such as going after Russian oil, and fully resupplying Ukrainians can make a difference. May God grant strength to the people of Ukraine during these trying times. | Speaker's Bible Study | | Secretary of the Commonwealth Kay Coles James led the weekly Wednesday Speaker's 7am Bible study this morning. She discussed John 15:1-8 and mentioned that her theme was "unbothered", meaning she puts God first and doesn't worry about negativity. | Veteran Retirement Pay Tax Reduction | | My bill, HB 1128, to reduce taxes on Veteran Retirement Pay passed the House with 98 yes votes. This bill had an emergency clause, no age requirement, and would reduce taxable retirement pay for retired Veterans 20k year one, 30k year two, and 40k the third year on. Unfortunately, the Senate would not accept my bill that passed the House. The senate version, carried by Senator Reeves, had no emergency clause, an age requirement of 60, and reduced taxes on retired Veteran pay 5k year one, 10k year two, and 15k the third year on. Delegate Barry Knight helped us work out a compromise. The compromise bill will have no emergency clause, has an age 55 requirement, will reduce taxable retirement pay for retired Veterans 10k year one, 20k year two, 30k year three, and 40k the fourth year on. I'll keep you posted as we make progress on veteran issues! | Cut the Grocery Tax | | | Promises kept! Governor Glenn Youngkin day one game plan. There was a "Cut the Grocery Tax" rally at the Capitol building. My friend and fellow Delegate Joe McNamara is carrying the HB 90 bill which will cut taxes for Virginians by approximately $500 million per year! | Democrats Support Criminals | | On a slew of party line votes, VA State Senate Democrats killed 17 out of 20 Republican bills this week that would have made it easier for law enforcement to keep violent criminals off our streets. The theme under Democrat rule has been, "police are bad, criminals are good." Clearly, Democrats learned nothing from last year's elections, when Virginians made it clear that they want safer communities, not more crime. | SB 36: Repeal "Predator Protection Act" | | Many you remember the boy who attacked a girl in the bathroom in Loudon County and the superintendent tried to cover it up. The Senate version to repeal HB 257, "Predator Protection Act", passed the House and is headed to the Governor. Police and parents should be informed on stalking, abduction, and sexual battery cases. Our children are number one and must be protected. | Fentanyl Overdose Bill Killed in Senate | | My bill, HB108, was killed in the Senate this week. This bill would have made it a felony homicide for someone to distribute fentanyl and other controlled substances, which results in a fatal overdose. We have a fatal overdose epidemic in Virginia. In fact, Richmond is the center of these deaths. How many more Virginians need to die before the General Assembly takes seriously the unprecedented health emergency caused by drug traffickers? | Solar Farm Bills | | We are huge supporters of farmers and agri-business. We must preserve rural Virginia from these outside companies that destroy thousands of acres of land, so I continue to vote no on Solar Farm bills. What are your thoughts? | Catalytic Converter | | There is a catalytic converter theft epidemic in Virginia. We are working on a couple of bills that would increase penalties for those who steal or sell stolen catalytic converters. | State of the Union | | The State of the Union under President Biden can be summed up in one word: failure. Inflation failure, border failure, Afghanistan failure, COVID failure, supply chain failure, Ukraine failure, and crime failure. Republican Congresswoman Lauren Boebert spoke up and reminded Joe Biden and others to remember our 13 fallen who were killed in action during the failed withdrawal from Afghanistan. | Charity Basketball | | | | | We raised $50,263 for the VCU Massey Cancer Center. In a Basketball game fundraiser, Glenn Youngkin and his staff beat the Lobbyists 38-34. The House of Delegates beat the State Senate 33-26. Since our financial goal was met, Republican Delegate Matt Faris shaved the mustache off of Democrat Delegate Mike Mullins. We had a great time blowing off steam in a bipartisan way for a good cause. | Military Caucus | | I attended the weekly Wednesday General Assembly Military & Veterans Caucus with U.S. Marine and Lieutenant Governor Winsome Sears, fellow veterans, and other fellow legislators. | Our Intern: Josh Usry | | Josh Usry, who is a Goochland High School football player, came to shadow me at the General Assembly this week. He has a bright future and would like to attend a service academy. Thank you, Josh, for your interest to serve | SB 656: Sexually Explicit Material | | Parental Empowerment, a bill giving parents the power to review sexually explicit material before it is taught in the classroom, has passed both chambers of the General Assembly and is headed to Gov. Glenn Youngkin's desk, fulfilling one of the key promises of the Republican's campaign for office. | Pro Life | | Unfortunately, all pro-life bills such as "born alive" and "20-week abortion ban" failed to pass in the General Assembly this year. Democrats in the Senate supported by organizations like Planned Parenthood defeated all efforts to protect the life of the unborn and the mother. That is why we must win the Senate next year. I will never stop fighting to protect our most vulnerable. | 2nd Amendment | | Unfortunately, all pro-2nd Amendment bills including "repealing red flag laws" failed to pass in the General Assembly this year. Democrats in the Senate do not believe it is our God given right to protect ourselves and our family. What part of "Shall not be infringed" do they not understand? | Women's History Month | | In 1987, Congress expanded Women's "Week" to Women's "Month" since it passed a resolution (and the President issued a proclamation) designating the month of March, "Women's History Month". I recommend you stop by the Capitol and visit the Virginia Women's Monument, a state memorial in Richmond, Virginia, commemorating the contributions of Virginia women to the history of the Commonwealth of Virginia and the United States of America. Learn more ==. | Military & Veterans Caucus Legislative Reception | | | | We held our Veterans Caucus Reception at the Virginia War Memorial with special speakers Gov Youngkin, Lt.Gov Sears, AG Miyares, and General Williams. Our caucus focuses on issues related to taking care of our veterans in Virginia. Great to see so many friends and supporters there! #VeteransCaucus #America #GoNavy | 2022 McGuire LEGISLATION McGuire Legislation as Chief Patron: == == taxes on military retirement pay. | McGuire Legislation as Chief Co-Patron: == == This bill includes HB59 and passed the floor 59-40. Now headed to the senate. == == This bill includes my bill HB 187 and is headed to the senate. == == | McGuire Legislation as Co-Patron: == for list | | | | THANK YOU! | I am committed to adhering to the principal duties of Government, as stated in our Declaration of Independence, the protection of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. I look forward to seeing you in the District. In the meantime, please continue the teamwork and let me know what you are thinking. You can reach me at deljmcguire@house.virginia.gov or 804-698-1056. | | | | | God Bless, Delegate John McGuire Virginia House District 56 900 East Main Street Pocahontas Building, Suite E213 Richmond, VA 23219 Phone: 804-698-1056 == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA | | | STAY CONNECTED | == == == Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire | | McGuire for Delegate | Friends of John McGuire, 11357 Nuckols Road # 156, Glen Allen, VA 23059 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireforvirginia.com powered by

County Executive Alsobrooks officially endorsed Wes in front of a crowd of hundreds of supporters at our rally in Upper Marlboro, and it’s a big deal: this is a highly-coveted endorsement from the leader of Maryland’s second-largest jurisdiction.
**[Donate NOW to keep up our momentum on this big day>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42626635/333644677/492827243?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220305alsobrooks_tw_60da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTM2ZWEyMS1iZDljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VSChiuOU26A76yBg5_5CvA-pKG5keVmfVaDDSWPukeI=)**
Here’s what County Executive Alsobrooks had to say about why she’s backing Wes in this gubernatorial race:
_“I have seen Wes Moore connect with people and bring them together to chart a vision for the future. It is clear Wes Moore has the vision, integrity, and the ability to move our state forward and deliver for families in Prince George’s County and across Maryland. I believe that Wes Moore is the leader that we need in this moment, and I fully support his effort to be our next Governor.”_
---
County Executive Alsobrooks joins Anne Arundel County Executive Steuart Pittman, as well as Gov. Parris Glendening and dozens of other state and local leaders across Maryland who endorse Wes for governor. _No other candidate in this race has achieved this kind of coalition of support._

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ben=20Smilowitz?=
subject: The kind of leadership we need in Washington
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ben Smilowitz for Congress_
body:
In my time as a social justice and accountability advocate, I’ve seen firsthand how a failure of initiative results in disaster. | | | |
---
| | | Dear Peter,

As a longtime social justice and accountability advocate, I’ve seen first-hand how a failure of initiative results in disaster.

>From protecting our fragile Democracy, to the lack of quality and affordable healthcare, our intensifying climate disasters, and soaring housing costs, we have a number of challenges facing our district, nation, and world. We need leaders in Washington that are able to lead us through multiple crises.
**It’s time we elect leaders that are fully focused on addressing our greatest challenges.**
We need representatives that put our communities first. Too many members of Congress represent big business and special interests. The money in our politics is toxic and it tips policy to the benefit of profits and big business, not people.

Yes – one solution is reversing Citizens United.

Until that happens, we need to prioritize electing grassroots candidates and reject those that spend millions of dollars on campaigns and expose their conflicts of interest.
**I’m running for Congress because transparency and accountability should be guiding principles for our leaders. **
I’ve been focused on advancing the public interest for the last 25 years. After Hurricane Katrina, I founded a nonprofit dedicated to improving disaster relief and humanitarian aid. It’s an independent watchdog focused on accountability, transparency, and effectiveness.

Our government needs exactly that: accountability, transparency, and effectiveness advocates everywhere, especially in Congress.

This is our opportunity to elect a candidate that will put people first – not profits, not big business, not competing interests. You.
**Join our grassroots campaign today.**
---
| [DONATE ](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=555f2e7bde&e=0faa9de128 "DONATE ")
---
| We must work harder to achieve the change we want to see in our district, country, and world. Our current representation isn’t going to get it done and we can’t afford to wait any longer.

-Ben Smilowitz
---
| | | _Paid for by Ben Smilowitz for Congress_
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Ben Smilowitz for CongressPO Box 275Gaithersburg, MD 20884-0275
[Add us to your address book](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/vcard?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=67b0595157)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=67b0595157&e=0faa9de128&c=2383ad50cc) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=67b0595157&e=0faa9de128&c=2383ad50cc).

While we’re excited, we remember who stonewalled the last Democratically nominated Supreme Court Justice from making their way to the bench – With a 50-50 tied Senate, we can’t afford to take anything for granted. | DASS is a national organization supporting the election of Democratic Secretaries of State who are committed to protecting and preserving voting rights and ballot access for all Americans through fair, honest, open, and accurate elections. name: Morgan Harper
subject: “Angry Black woman”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220305-748-footer-ak&t=1002&akid=748%2E90090%2E5LAvjg ]Morgan Harper

This is
what we are running against in this race. This is why we need to stand up
to right-wing extremism. Last month, I debated Josh Mandel for the second
time and things got nasty.

During last month’s debate, Josh Mandel:

* Said I’m “dumber than AOC.”
* Called me “angry” multiple times during the debate.
* Characterized Black Lives Matter activists as “thugs.”

I refuse to be characterized as an “angry black woman” for fighting for
what’s right. I’m more motivated than ever to run this race for the
people.

[ https://act.morganharper.org/go/29278?t=1003&akid=748%2E90090%2E5LAvjg ]We’re in an uphill battle against extremely racist and sexist rhetoric
from opponents who will do whatever they can to discredit me and our
campaign. We’re less than 60 days away from the primary. Can you help me
fight back by donating $5 or anything you can right now?

It’s UNACCEPTABLE that in 2022, Black women like me still have to face
these racist and sexist comments when we speak up, but what’s even more
unfortunate is that this isn’t anything unique.

People like Josh Mandel have told Black women what we should do and what
we should say for too long! I’m sick of my fellow Black women and girls
having to endure this narrative and not having the space or opportunity to
fight back.

Josh Mandel’s comments are an example of the insidious racial stereotypes
thrown at Black women every day and I won’t stand for it.

They say we’re too loud, too angry, too much. People like Josh Mandel
don’t want people who look like me to take up space. But I refuse to be
silenced. I’m passionate about creating a better Ohio and a better world —
and I’m not going to slow down now.

[ https://act.morganharper.org/go/29278?t=1004&akid=748%2E90090%2E5LAvjg ]Can you help power our campaign today by donating $5?
Black women candidates raise on average half of what white candidates
raise, so it’s critical that our grassroots campaign has a steady stream
of donations before the primary election.

[ https://act.morganharper.org/go/29284?refcode=em20220305-748&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=748%2E90090%2E5LAvjg ]Contribute $5

We’ve NEVER elected a Black woman from Ohio to the U.S. Senate. I won’t
stop until we change that. And I refuse to let someone like Josh
Mandel stand in the way.

Thank you for your time and support,

Morgan

[ https://act.morganharper.org/go/29278?t=1024&akid=748%2E90090%2E5LAvjg ][IMG]

Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate in Ohio

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. To remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1025&akid=748%2E90090%2E5LAvjg

Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio.

name: Freedom Alerts
subject: Biden’s SOTU Blunder
body:
You’ve got to see this, Friend
| |
---
| | Joe Biden delivered his first State of the Union address this week and in true Biden style, it was riddled with embarrassing mistakes, seemingly random pauses, and nonsensical comments – he even managed to mistake **“Ukrainian”** for _**“Iranian.” **_
---
| | | [ ](http://email.mail.freedomdefense.net/c/eJxdUd3OlDAQfRq4g5QppXDBhe76afRKE7PRm6a0w25NKUhLNvs9vcOKmpi0zfz1zJwztgchKtN1ueuBATDORCWYYLysuYS2AjSC0x10VrNJO1-OK6KdJ4sjhohlwJTf-kGPDKtRdro1tbGDsMxyziw2XcO7sc19f0tpiRl_k8ELnXR3KeFamnkib8AQHj_mW4hzIDcmnbZIRlV3HeNQSclFXdOAHDL-QihnYBk0iYz3xevP5fz5Ehb58RqaS3uXX07UpNnSpCa0bpuoCvfRj2Cct9UgBQfbal23WhTBeKWnxbvxcRQZcrW7hmer37oU-6MGZ4k3gaRNDX4LFld1SKK0xzVFNVq1M0CPMRLQH8Q5JAz7yNSt-GA2i6frcv9OaRW8s5T4L3hzdqdaf-Nf2SrztbfL3XnvYiNpGdfnNki__Ji8z-TbDOD5C-CpNPyjePnki9c1vNtTcKI3PRb8W3dAlIdOkMnzL295quQ)
---
| | Governor Ron DeSantis of Florida started off his visit to the University of South Florida **by asking the masked students behind him to remove their masks.** Governor DeSantis said, “We’ve gotta stop this COVID theater.”

name: Ohio Senate Update
subject: URGENT: Trump’s endorsement looming
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:

Folks, Tim’s Republican opponents are in a race to the bottom
for Donald Trump’s endorsement, and word is it could happen any day now.

The moment Trump endorses one of Tim’s extremist opponents, this race
kicks into overdrive—which means we’ve got a small window to get ready for
the flood of money and GOP attacks that are sure to follow.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/8393?t=1014&amount=25&akid=2613%2E3611125%2EZZsE9v ]Will you rush an urgent donation to help us prepare for this critical
turning point in our race? Please, it’s important. We can’t waste a single
second in the fight to expand the Democratic Senate majority.

Trump knows control of the Senate hinges on Ohio. That’s why he held his
very first 2021 rally here. That’s why he’s picking his right-wing protege
very carefully. That’s why billionaire special interests are dumping more
than $80 million here.

We’ve got to act quickly. A Trump endorsement would be a HUGE game changer
for our race and it’s absolutely critical we use this time to get our
message out in front of voters.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/8393?t=1021&amount=25&akid=2613%2E3611125%2EZZsE9v ]We need to take advantage of this small window and hit the gas pedal on

name: Dave Giles
subject: The Constitution
body:
Hello Peter! I believe in the Constitution and I will continue to support and defend the Constitut
| | |
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/261510?id=4777266.5396.1.6ebd7b804a4da3012f2ea342032b04c1)
---
**__Hello Peter!**
---
**I believe in the Constitution**
and
I will continue to support and defend the Constitution.
My father is a WWII veteran and instilled these God given values into me. **I will support what is in the constitution and reject what is not.**
The Tenth Amendment states
**"The powers not delegated to the United States by the Constitution, nor prohibited by it to the States, are reserved to the States respectively, or to the people."** When elected I will start resolutions to
# **Stop and Reject Government Overreach** such as:
▪ the Department of Education (revert to the states or the people),
▪ the EPA (revert to the states or the people),
▪ and promote for the people a flat/fair tax,
▪ limit mandates to seven days
▪ limit or revoke the "Patriot Act" (no more political prisoners like Jan 6)
| ▪ | the Department of Education (revert to the states or the people),

clean_body: Hello Peter! I believe in the Constitution and I will continue to support and defend the Constitut | | | | Hello Peter! I believe in the Constitution and I will continue to support and defend the Constitution. My father is a WWII veteran and instilled these God given values into me. I will support what is in the constitution and reject what is not. The Tenth Amendment states "The powers not delegated to the United States by the Constitution, nor prohibited by it to the States, are reserved to the States respectively, or to the people." When elected I will start resolutions to Stop and Reject Government Overreach such as: ▪ the Department of Education (revert to the states or the people), ▪ the EPA (revert to the states or the people), ▪ and promote for the people a flat/fair tax, ▪ limit mandates to seven days ▪ limit or revoke the "Patriot Act" (no more political prisoners like Jan 6) | ▪ | the Department of Education (revert to the states or the people), ---|--- ▪ | the EPA (revert to the states or the people), ---|--- ▪ | and promote for the people a flat/fair tax, ---|--- ▪ | limit mandates to seven days ---|--- ▪ | limit or revoke the "Patriot Act" (no more political prisoners like Jan 6) ---|--- and The Sixth Amendment states "...., the accused shall enjoy the right to a speedy and public trial" \-------------------------- Support Dave Giles because "I am the most qualified candidate to serve you". 100% of my time \- no other obligations | | Thank you! body:
Peter, Our Republican inner circle needs new members, and we want YOU to become one of our card-carrying patriots. [](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=1909fba49d794e13be00b24942ca5f67&_e=vVODwhyRoa5xd_Y-yaFzqpd0ezkyZW4bKcuiVKyOs9CQAUFhM64LWQHd7J70XA-_FojOtctF2X-ev6HUtjPV7paHCiAOTXubmN03FYZgpkFMR8KtRhe8egnMKlSR2fGuVJYfHkBE0qG4L8BED18NCuBRaozZM6-iEWlaB1SMrXNPI33X89HFs6pK8KJfrXxECWMSTNT90SOhxdSlVpY3qlJ0zD2eojHXvh7c7YKWAjqsYU7Z6ijl8Yk8rq3h7k4qaEv60sgUZ-4Uhts3hUKNqObDIjT3DAX0VlXd7UA3r939eQYh6tE5g45Kl1eHEZDmZwU11KuItKEiqFoarU5leTE02ZHIaNL5-sgeZNHo_OPvafelVOHTHz8df5qXKj6p4w9Mm4n8hbMCTGznhtweJJE0idr8Ef_hjoqHtQQGw8Y%3D) We set aside one patriot membership card with your name on it, but this offer is only valid until 11:59 PM TOMORROW NIGHT.

There is a long list of conservatives waiting to join our club, Peter.

_So if you don’t claim your card, someone else will take your spot._

With your membership card, you’ll be able to show the world that YOU are a card carrying patriot - and _no one_ will be able to doubt your loyalty to making America great.

body:
Disconnected from Reality

| [](http://links.colinschmitt.com/u/click?_t=2efbf9f7f9b54008ada1569759c619c2&_m=4f1b69d7dfa14cc194d5f18355468033&_e=gz38c7he4B54HHEZD4il2rOsH6z_CmZhNRkPlkTMR9asSMU0chzqLXqIp2zv36u-fQGgDHxk3tstWlTMtk-e0lvorsEQa2VQhQ9LEDCLX1OdypvwYwKfwaYJ_IYByTGdb5GRN-X9AnWQjqW8eyzxmaLeNLZTFXLpIJ2qSKLFB25TS7EA_1mzWGIuDnwHYXbXXrVDzRZJfX5Ju97ktCic4Cn3F_NhoGWYaCEkfALiDGIsV1sF_nBGfRSrN6buVdDHW7-hlvB8TCvNxdqoQQV5T_IFWYsbPuveHyKnH1FyW0wAn49Do15VYIwX3zP2QWulDphSQFarz5EG4QdOgfgx2vJTst96vw7xa-tWjnKDklF-H9dYi3OIyXsh_GQLVJqwBVPktkdoL0PgTvUP7UvOZjJ_4j67hxSNjCFzvtfu5i_VCIXex04mPAuoXzhc6cuj4RT2p4h7mkqeNO3tJtURVAO3vx4DluHArMhc4hDQlba7IRLUrTXimiLrGnlRG9xsI6tM-dB0Y3HhRfqQMbca6A%3D%3D)
---

Both Biden and his top political lieutenant, Sean Patrick Maloney refuse to admit their mistakes, and the American people continue to suffer.

Inflation is raising costs for families, parents don’t have a say in their children's education, there is a humanitarian crisis at our southern border, our cities and suburbs are overrun with crime, and Europe on the edge of another World War...

**Why can’t Biden take responsibility for his failures? And why does Sean Patrick Maloney enable Biden to continue to destroy the fabric of our Nation?**

We need to hold Biden and Maloney Responsible in 2022 and help Republicans restore checks and balances to our government that the American people deserve!
| [**HOLD BIDEN RESPONSIBLE**](http://links.colinschmitt.com/u/click?_t=2efbf9f7f9b54008ada1569759c619c2&_m=4f1b69d7dfa14cc194d5f18355468033&_e=gz38c7he4B54HHEZD4il2rOsH6z_CmZhNRkPlkTMR9asSMU0chzqLXqIp2zv36u-fQGgDHxk3tstWlTMtk-e0lvorsEQa2VQhQ9LEDCLX1OdypvwYwKfwaYJ_IYByTGdb5GRN-X9AnWQjqW8eyzxmaLeNLZTFXLpIJ2qSKLFB25TS7EA_1mzWGIuDnwHYXbXXrVDzRZJfX5Ju97ktCic4Cn3F_NhoGWYaCEkfALiDGIsV1sF_nBGfRSrN6buVdDHW7-hlvB8TCvNxdqoQQV5T_IFWYsbPuveHyKnH1FyW0ysf5oxeQ8yXeJR5bYQnRv0MmFxJv6uyoMRI-LitoazcmREWoPtIqwPeBru5v48noZ37mLbEcKUBOKRG_MnQwYoHRHuuiEqmjMqh3Iig1X2Ojc340TNB_EDm5JCvoiYZMTtlMXloq76a-m0vRO1DWqTTKyYqZpOw4fVfH8BnpghJ7pLK1h6zWWoCvSnZHEdknBZPmsTwsi4p_C0OCqQPdeMtgaK7q-4tZW2XHZNobgg-zGyHxVZZUsj25qld6sa5h8%3D)
---
[**HOLD MALONEY RESPONSIBLE**](http://links.colinschmitt.com/u/click?_t=2efbf9f7f9b54008ada1569759c619c2&_m=4f1b69d7dfa14cc194d5f18355468033&_e=gz38c7he4B54HHEZD4il2rOsH6z_CmZhNRkPlkTMR9asSMU0chzqLXqIp2zv36u-fQGgDHxk3tstWlTMtk-e0lvorsEQa2VQhQ9LEDCLX1OdypvwYwKfwaYJ_IYByTGdb5GRN-X9AnWQjqW8eyzxmaLeNLZTFXLpIJ2qSKLFB25TS7EA_1mzWGIuDnwHYXbXXrVDzRZJfX5Ju97ktCic4Cn3F_NhoGWYaCEkfALiDGIsV1sF_nBGfRSrN6buVdDHW7-hlvB8TCvNxdqoQQV5T_IFWYsbPuveHyKnH1FyW0zKbFjALgYa5D8akGAq91V_tY5uIjNpl2r8KsnHDGfYA7IxtQcRmzrvNDUEgVkUDGHwh8qa47P3I5o7Q8XVjz9DC3qHrsvII20SSpUhtsjslUt2SQCX_IrRNVCWbKpr2XKt_DZsQhZANTNCGsi1axo6rDcXRL6OwricuoDvkjLJybdidPaWAyXmQW4SV6sIkpZkG05Rqxg-moraDChg_5Xx-nDhZUfWaZ1TNg4aQRA9J254cIKClFQSDXXLzrX1ClA%3D)
---

**[Voters will have a clear choice this November and we must win back our congressional seat and congressional majority for our Hudson Valley Values that will make our daily purchases affordable again, help small businesses, secure our border, empower families' role in education and support our police.](http://links.colinschmitt.com/u/click?_t=2efbf9f7f9b54008ada1569759c619c2&_m=4f1b69d7dfa14cc194d5f18355468033&_e=gz38c7he4B54HHEZD4il2rOsH6z_CmZhNRkPlkTMR9asSMU0chzqLXqIp2zv36u-fQGgDHxk3tstWlTMtk-e0lvorsEQa2VQhQ9LEDCLX1OdypvwYwKfwaYJ_IYByTGdb5GRN-X9AnWQjqW8eyzxmaLeNLZTFXLpIJ2qSKLFB25TS7EA_1mzWGIuDnwHYXbXXrVDzRZJfX5Ju97ktCic4Cn3F_NhoGWYaCEkfALiDGIsV1sF_nBGfRSrN6buVdDHW7-hlvB8TCvNxdqoQQV5T_IFWYsbPuveHyKnH1FyW0wAn49Do15VYIwX3zP2QWulACLS-0CAGUGLQTkdTJ9lRYYF_4N1lp8RgI1PS5bSHKncV2p4AJq2l58fwg0LKmrK0-1WIxn7xU3USOCpJOei2XNDNvCpPavgJhPS8luixm6AwDxWDzElnma9T6PdWXi5DS49MVtUVp1f-RKthXBdgfLeKdqT9RhDYTavfPYwkXj3-7eNkr2XFDgmIS0kpuxSyL-MykTuV54hdAW16rRbPQ%3D%3D)**

---
**Peter, government corruption in the United States is the worst it’s been in over a decade – but New York and my office are leading the charge to fight back against it!**

This didn’t just happen overnight. While corruption has been steadily increasing for years, some administration’s “policy for sale” governing philosophy and the ever-present COVID-19 pandemic have only helped corrupt people grow more powerful.

**Peter, when New York’s officials put their own best interests before the people they’re meant to serve, New Yorkers suffer.** The duty of government officials is to fight for their people – not to make sweetheart deals with oil companies, profit from Big Pharma, or turn a blind eye to skyrocketing housing prices. And yet, too many officials have been bought or intimidated by the same powerful interests that continue to harm New Yorkers.
As your attorney general, it’s my duty to hold these corrupt individuals accountable – but the roots of corruption run deep. **I’ll never waver in my fight to stand up against powerful interests, but I need to know if I have your support.**

[**My team put together this quick one-question survey, so we can gauge how many fearless fighters will join me in the fight against corruption, but I’m 93 responses short. So please, take 5 seconds now and let me know: **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42603792/333613914/1412969507?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWE5MzkwMi05ZTljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-cugGnkZ8sOLzG9bQynVN_qjVzhv0xTsdoEkvnycyVg=&emci=98ffdb50-9994-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=99a93902-9e9c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=25369504)

name: Paul Schimpf
subject: Schimpf from the Trail 03/05/22
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Citizens for Schimpf · P
body:
| [](http://www.schimpf4illinois.com/?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=march_05_2022_from_trail&n=1)
---
Friend, We hope this week treated you well. The two big political topics this week were the State of the Union Address and the federal indictment of former Illinois House Speaker Mike Madigan. In a SOTU speech that will be quickly forgotten, President Biden addressed very little of the concerns that are on the minds of Americans. He said practically nothing about crime, the border, or inflation. All signs indicate that his failed presidency will lead to a Republican wave in November.
The big Illinois political news was the indictment of Mike Madigan. Former Speaker Madigan enabled the rise of JB Pritzker. Speaker Madigan and the political class that he embodies are why Illinois voters are ready for commonsense leadership they can trust. Also this week, I had the opportunity to spend some time discussing my campaign with Vanessa Wetterling at WRAM. You can listen to my interview on WRAM by clicking [HERE](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=zfkKahPwhZfyaj-BlVBxNFue3C1bHFmhDvrWY8AMAHsiPYvcYRljQW2Yo1TlbYIjt0hiSPzz9-GDXY1RvgnFUb_rlagrnugELBw7SHxN6nCkH4EyKmR_7PGz1FLGD4_kcH0cRdJCMKZa0WJszeo7zVtwNlveBEEZdY8i24oXBIc&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=march_05_2022_from_trail&n=2).

* * *
**Volunteer of the Week** Our volunteer to highlight this week is Jefferson County Sheriff Jeff Bullard. Sheriff Bullard is a member of our Law Enforcement Advisory Council, recently spoke on our behalf in Washington County, and gathered 118 petition signatures for us! Thank you, Sheriff Bullard, for your friendship, support, and service to our state!
[If you'd like to volunteer on our campaign, click here.](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/volunteer?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=march_05_2022_from_trail&n=3)
* * *
Thanks for reading and have a great weekend, Paul

Paid for by Citizens for Schimpf · P.O. Box 16, Waterloo, IL, 62298\. A copy of our report, filed with the State Board of Elections, Springfield, IL, will be available for download or purchase from them. We do not pay for email addresses. We have your email address either because you signed up for our list at an event, you entered your email address online, or you gave your email address to us or one of our friends.
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/unsubscribe?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=march_05_2022_from_trail&n=4).
You can also keep up with Paul Schimpf on [Twitter](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEGmWwYfQ_yWb41Zx1QyVyU&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=march_05_2022_from_trail&n=5) or [Facebook](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6g5cWifaQHs4q1ylFw89qVcMpLCIQGbbcgOLvTMfF-ic&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=march_05_2022_from_trail&n=6).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=march_05_2022_from_trail&n=7), software for leaders.

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC**
body:
Say less. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpHIgPjZTod5LVCLRGJ5EuVnvDHqljinnhSRx27Y-QsvG6M20ZQaQYFyLcafJBZA0q_52woGq5E0l8WcIG6HNbXXCM7V8OcDMnXy0jzi7DbnwC2qL-usRDCqeedE4-j9QvzXcGQNaU2AfUGt6xL8aTr2kJ5VfUye5TEHU3AgPXtQAKv8XXn4oaBjccoZ_fYLFIesEv9JfwVDAlJN57lgKEPlLF0nUDqgkjCznOcIzaulvXxEn9atIlZ8-lBQk0LLlVHBR3dxaR-Bm2rghz49Dh2DsSgwI4CC-kGIJRbA6Z6RYJVeLEpTa2oIrGpjKCZvFfk/3k3/c6CJfoW2RzaJQXJBY4ggRw/h0/IKRU2YwyVqf2MhOkABOhtfxOIIJwyD4OgLKDHB7nsrU)
Peter, You know who’s part of our movement to primary Kyrsten Sinema? **James Carville.** The longtime Democratic strategist didn’t mince words in an interview with Vox after Sinema sided with Republicans on the filibuster. Carville said he “doesn’t know what the hell [Sinema’s] thinking” and that she would lose a primary. **We agree.** Though we’re not supporting a specific candidate yet, we’re doing the long-term work of building up a primary challenge against Sinema. Her betrayal on the filibuster, fidelity to Republican donors, and refusal to listen to Arizona voters give us no other choice. **[If you agree with James Carville, will you consider donating $5 to the Primary Sinema Project today? You’ll help ensure that Arizonans can replace Sinema with a real Democrat as soon as her term is up.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSYz366cNZeTpWHXPvfGXpqDZA95ro3JINxih0LNWeOmvfPcIlamcw5K3ufzvRJCjp9lFtM0PvGv78jcsrm58K4oGaow1k0tx2CoUjmPyVs5K-hTcT_b_2WaMCTN-Nxwe8kg2G8B_O0g_rzJvCPt7jTNSitfWVgf8qf8SZkO67SLAsh_3fpUYMu3yxKU6KrwDZKP8rzs6auUxiEfYK_9QCIU0-khHEGb8pf_Z7uN3uy41t48SS3FROq0G7Pk7im3sYHUPaXJzXUPurdq0YJR7fea1WMi7yTj8YquYmcI0_cVqF3ymXLO_UF83S61ZHrMkwiMX9U0ztl79S5CKrs4UoBQgSKoMhXL4h3qE2Q_4Luno/3k3/c6CJfoW2RzaJQXJBY4ggRw/h1/GVz-PjclsN8AGhBnsC7dHR0y3V_jlaFcPRPzWwRe0ws)** **[Contribute $5](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSYz366cNZeTpWHXPvfGXpqDZA95ro3JINxih0LNWeOmv-YkzfWxFSorDSTPzpP4YpaWm4pqXr7jhv7Fu7xHBbbJQB-KTM2MO2PJo9jtpVzRls0AnDSeu7kDbc6vt5oZzzwgNzJUwZdv15VzAO_nwhatWs4KR-ixalilk61c2bpaTCFR7fefuFZI6xIjI3OoCkTP-Yv4fxBxOE1dj9EL15IhkaiwJKsKNnBjUlFIiLRTaiNEn5hC4ukqH5oESEqWbA6kgTQwXbhFrZKUgTel-T0-ZCeLRW2vBGPLogcXdhLoUlQNahC9iBtpVBr6eYNUBMEWEK8T8J5NIJJVnc2yOn5mV9GPyGvbB84jKWErugcgw/3k3/c6CJfoW2RzaJQXJBY4ggRw/h2/a4nl5wvXflNhkO4PXiS4E5DrgQm-TGZk_cPSzrT7djI)** Carville is just one big name in Democratic politics to turn against Sinema. EMILY’s List and NARAL, two of Sinema’s biggest institutional fundraisers in 2018, rescinded their support after she sided with Joe Manchin and Republicans on the filibuster. The Arizona Democratic Party even formally censured Sinema. Our momentum has never been stronger. clean_body: Say less. | | | Peter, You know who’s part of our movement to primary Kyrsten Sinema? James Carville. The longtime Democratic strategist didn’t mince words in an interview with Vox after Sinema sided with Republicans on the filibuster. Carville said he “doesn’t know what the hell [Sinema’s] thinking” and that she would lose a primary. We agree. Though we’re not supporting a specific candidate yet, we’re doing the long-term work of building up a primary challenge against Sinema. Her betrayal on the filibuster, fidelity to Republican donors, and refusal to listen to Arizona voters give us no other choice. Carville is just one big name in Democratic politics to turn against Sinema. EMILY’s List and NARAL, two of Sinema’s biggest institutional fundraisers in 2018, rescinded their support after she sided with Joe Manchin and Republicans on the filibuster. The Arizona Democratic Party even formally censured Sinema. Our momentum has never been stronger. But we need to ensure we translate it into actual, on-the-ground resources in Arizona — because when the primary rolls around, you can bet Sinema and her corporate allies will be spending tens of millions to defend her seat. Thank you for pitching in today, Peter. Every dollar will go to Arizona organizers on the ground who are holding Sinema accountable and laying the groundwork for another Democrat to replace her. More soon, Primary Sinema Project | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. body:
I'm falling 23% short at the worst possible moment
| | |

If I'm going to be able to fight back against these lies, it's critical that I reach my midnight deadline – **but I'm falling 23% short at the worst possible moment.**

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Join us for a post-primary thank you call
body:
Join us for a virtual post-primary get-together, to celebrate our victories but also get ready for the fight ahead.
#
Peter,
Greg Casar won his primary and Jessica Cisneros came within striking distance of defeating corporate Democrat Henry Cuellar.
**The movement showed up for Greg and Jessica. On behalf of all of us at JD, thank you!** That’s why we wanted to be sure you were among the first to know about our post-TX primary get together and thank-you event on March 7th at 7:30 PM ET.[ Can you join us on Zoom for the virtual event with Greg and Jessica?**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97052?t=2&akid=22272%2E1203867%2EPFR7HN)
**[RSVP »](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97052?t=3&akid=22272%2E1203867%2EPFR7HN)**
You’ll hear directly from Jessica and Greg, as they say thank you to the supporters that powered their campaigns, as well as JD staffers who will outline the fight ahead to beat Henry Cuellar and elect Jessica Cisneros in the runoff.
[Please click here to register to join us on Monday, March 7th at 8 pm ET. Zoom link provided after RSVP!](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97052?t=4&akid=22272%2E1203867%2EPFR7HN)
**[RSVP »](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97052?t=5&akid=22272%2E1203867%2EPFR7HN)**
We hope to see you there!
Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=6&akid=22272%2E1203867%2EPFR7HN) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=7&akid=22272%2E1203867%2EPFR7HN) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220305-22272-footer&t=8&refcode2=22272_1203867_PFR7HN&akid=22272%2E1203867%2EPFR7HN)**
---
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: [us@justicedemocrats.com](mailto:us@justicedemocrats.com)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=9&akid=22272%2E1203867%2EPFR7HN)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=22272%2E1203867%2EPFR7HN)

name: Charles Booker
subject: Poverty is a policy choice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

I wish I was joking,
Peter...

A few weeks ago in Kentucky, GOP legislators considered a bill that would
defund local communities and school districts in order to pay for a tax
cut on private planes.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/16828?refcode=em20220305-1629&amp%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=1629%2E346206%2E47GjIm ][IMG]

Let me tell you why this is striking. It’s not just because it shows how
out of touch these lawmakers are (though it does do that very clearly).
It’s because this is yet another example of how poverty becomes a policy
choice.

Every time politicians decide to give tax breaks to their rich donors, the
rest of us pay for it.

We pay for it in overcrowded classrooms. We pay for it in broken axles
from the potholes in our roads. We pay for it in cuts to Medicaid, social
security, and food stamps. I am sick and tired of working people being
told to pull ourselves up by our bootstraps when we have no boots to begin
with.

Our elected leaders should be investing in solutions that we know would
lift millions out of poverty: fully funded public schools, affordable
prescription drugs, and a guaranteed universal basic income.

Ending poverty is also a policy choice. We just need leaders with the
conviction to do it. This is why I’m running for the Senate. And it’s why
I’m asking if you’d join me.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/16828?refcode=em20220305-1629&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1629%2E346206%2E47GjIm ]Please chip in $5 or whatever you can today to our
campaign, and help me replace Rand Paul in the Senate so we can end
poverty once and for all.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/16828?refcode=em20220305-1629&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1629%2E346206%2E47GjIm ]Contribute $5

Together, we can usher in the representation we deserve from our Senate.
But I can’t do this alone: [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/16828?refcode=em20220305-1629&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=1629%2E346206%2E47GjIm ]If you’re with me, I hope you can chip
in $5 or anything you can right now to support our
grassroots-funded movement.

Together,

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220305-1629-footer&t=1024&refcode2=1629_346206_47GjIm&akid=1629%2E346206%2E47GjIm

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1629%2E346206%2E47GjIm

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: House Republicans
subject: Tell Biden: Reinstate the Keystone XL Pipeline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
America deserves total energy independence &n; bsp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3mkdc--fgxr-4qqlpo5&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

Fellow Conservative -- In light of Joe Biden's State of the Union address, the time has come to send a message that will echo throughout the halls of Washington: **Americans are TIRED of skyrocketing gas prices and our new dependence on Russian oil.**
**[SIGN ON: TELL BIDEN TO REINSTATE THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3mkdc-21mqn-4qqlpo2/)**
**Under President Trump, America was ENERGY INDEPENDENT!**
_Under Joe Biden, he greenlit a massive Russian pipeline and canceled the Keystone XL project..._
Here’s the cold hard fact: Thanks to Biden, we’re buying over $20 BILLION of Russian -- not American -- oil this year.
You have two choices. [**1) You can sign onto our petition to restore American energy independence and lower gas prices for ALL of us...**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3mkdc-21mqo-4qqlpo3/) _Or 2) You can watch Joe Biden buy more Russian oil and see prices go EVEN HIGHER._
**[SIGN ON: TELL BIDEN TO REINSTATE THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3mkdc-21mqp-4qqlpo4/)**
[**If you believe in American Energy Independence, Democracy, and the Keystone Pipeline, sign your name onto our petition right now.**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3mkdc-21mqq-4qqlpo5/)
Your signature today is important, Fellow Conservative.
Thanks,
House Republicans

body:
The radical left’s policies are hurting America. Read more >>

https://secure.winred.com/jennifer-ruth-green/why-im-running?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=GreenJR_PG-e-why-im-running-ic1-20220303-a_20220303&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=PG-e-why-im-running-ic1-20220303-a&utm_agency=PG
Peter,

We are living in an altered state of reality in America under Democratic rule. Inflation is at record-highs, crime is spiking, gas prices are through the roof, the border has been thrown wide open, and our enemies are emboldened.

And what is the radical left doing? Doubling down on the policies that caused this mess!
https://secure.winred.com/jennifer-ruth-green/why-im-running?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=GreenJR_PG-e-why-im-running-ic1-20220303-a_20220303&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=PG-e-why-im-running-ic1-20220303-a&utm_agency=PG
I’m running for Congress because I still believe in America. As a service member, I understand what it means to protect our country. I’m a battle-proven leader who has never been afraid to do the right thing.

name: Stand with Ukraine
subject: Ukraine’s courage should be a wake-up call for us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin
body:
Shame on the Biden Administration for not providing support sooner. [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=46a309cbf574450da71005633aeeceed&_e=jPQdk2o1xyKOnLe6K4asLrCN_Mhox1OpexuEAcI2jNONHnItHYNOIxAYvl6kFw63ApSm84uooIsYcWKd4rQMioa0FkUBArlreQUxmD-U_VoN58EgnkIMtYlE7mQgSGAVszNSQ8GI06GImW_Dhluv2Wf9yuxnv7Hm3b1S86uRD8P9uB7tLJDXIy0pi8Owcr_wYmVw8ffzzVJzDknOCUonP67--L7TnxziOoGaG7OIlmr4msVtjoy1Z-PALOTCej3kF9Dx-kkOvL641ryGQkThTbh9p3uY4E1it7dt4y5Y_PMkGOryRAjyUF_ihXkur_6lfgAEI-0r3O4L-Ne0zByXAnATgsyHyi4-fFAZ_UA3zOOFqsguWzmWU4bx4upkg1rAtwej0Hey94GK3r0Mj1F-LhvioYz-k-Bdnu31jvzKOVamHzOc7Knym7bzd9Lqc-Gt) Peter, From President Zelensky serving on the frontlines to armed citizens defending their homes, the Ukrainian people are showing the world what true strength, courage, and leadership look like. _It’s time for the Biden Administration to take notes –– and action._ **Congressman Gallagher outlined the current state of the conflict and his efforts to pressure the White House to**[**stand with Ukraine****.**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=46a309cbf574450da71005633aeeceed&_e=22IKu4oWksdSgJr9sKv3-0-9AihNTIEq5afYysX6GZzceKxc6zvD-xvEua_8sMmtK8W5Ciy5Z4os3Vc7LhBQo-MI9jhfP_tMgQER7PE43geb8WtpVy0Z2wBhatUrppJXNdTym1zTYpBfkPyWp8EKkKH4gCn_A27_QVTaj25LiIHqCq6wJbMOpnOZyZfl4GNF1UxM9z3cipR6-KBIec1oge75viQ-KFej-XDZwFYMKlNrGb2wYufSiDFtI68k4FF0yKWmY2XWjrEMJGqbGWEcjTUb498jtCwyGjA5VeCJgAmjH8AKXie1JoWc1xYorjJ1EAmqE_4SmimDjpUlxd-iAaUEVsWpzZGXyHhVA6ueET2oCPRPH0ZCJU0sKu941mwpF9P_qGsBbhe-BHkzh12802MoOmgiRzg7TiLU8sLLuDEUs9-W_30oCyan64UW3QxbPsuQhbZC02ceA4-mMTh0_EmdXozC3Z4Vh8slILXA9ceRKYYggKewTfgXKPXw532qRXeAgynn0zyXfxUx4tfxYxveBWJQFefnqEMS3jpWX6JQNwNjCBWlOAJ-4JzZeROd0me9zmtwafs4CyVxppLn7tIiRlSoTIlR03kXTZucGzTVfqD6UCC0G1Q_IjEYJ689CbaXZ6M53QahZDsq2gH1hs4pckQXRXA7z7Uh_WZA2aI48w0Adh6XIAQOavZzW_BdcsrSKUk65irThtM9kZfCuAuiq6TWmWhyOEhLW5RYnrdddtptBFwpvdzR1ltZYXNxDXY8YezMAerJ7JG9EesfpzFcfIVnTMeAznTpdrYu-f6uwNH7xlz-5mshv7Gea8bulb2Z_fA6hpi2KevoLcDaybSHjiiof24EeBsELkikxWxk-QimrKD_ry3S9lIagfJb4fTy8q4s2tCRMcw148Hgef43NTVf9eic8zyFHi-iDSm_gE1Bds0SThVa1H4iMDqvhZc5ZLjpjCrzRL42ma7-uq_4LeY5rAO3vq9NepgkbodzpFp5-KUbpZjsITIy8fTU9SS7A3gfa7G9qHc6Z6nAw757pNlbzIwGT-bpY0RyMTHXx8HUmtUbuu_zzAgNiY9_) Watch Mike’s interviews below and [**sign the petition here**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=46a309cbf574450da71005633aeeceed&_e=jPQdk2o1xyKOnLe6K4asLrCN_Mhox1OpexuEAcI2jNONHnItHYNOIxAYvl6kFw63ApSm84uooIsYcWKd4rQMioa0FkUBArlreQUxmD-U_VoN58EgnkIMtYlE7mQgSGAVszNSQ8GI06GImW_Dhluv2Wf9yuxnv7Hm3b1S86uRD8P9uB7tLJDXIy0pi8Owcr_wYmVw8ffzzVJzDknOCUonP67--L7TnxziOoGaG7OIlmpJW6y7MiFG7QM4EwxWDidUEJr2-UTIXxmoh2ylXGDwNpOuII5RVVHu5yIQ3L3lWHme8vlB8Qwo9qdw-1_AQmC9iq2W1DGVDIX-ZkLa587Ltx_A8eDFnj7QwqMj5d6kmvNOQxVycnWHlTBwnm5JLwfeAJYcQ_LE7s59s7l13Lb_NYxgETvw-iuoWuK0XTLV1DqF65TZoLbjFN2dEM2d_B4V) to urge the Biden Administration to take action. **"Shame on us for not providing support more quickly"** [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=46a309cbf574450da71005633aeeceed&_e=jPQdk2o1xyKOnLe6K4asLrCN_Mhox1OpexuEAcI2jNONHnItHYNOIxAYvl6kFw63ApSm84uooIsYcWKd4rQMioa0FkUBArlreQUxmD-U_VoN58EgnkIMtYlE7mQgSGAVszNSQ8GI06GImW_Dhluv2Wf9yuxnv7Hm3b1S86uRD8P9uB7tLJDXIy0pi8Owcr_wYmVw8ffzzVJzDknOCUonP67--L7TnxziOoGaG7OIlmrEJRdMkAQ1AfDIc1-AFK7IOL7ZaWgU12YwwTwK6_HBVsGt7VdrBt0nbpwRWY4638Lzw9z8CdyYEE_Ba2g41YT39CuNNVFf6fSXZSAj2SWPIZYiq2hZCCgaeSb4j6o5ozAHJ-HaTHqWIN4aEyVOTPKghestaR0gbLeILonHzWOpPV9P2KLp-FKLzn1rlvHZKacdSg8i7nvSs6XAbtk5dnXU) **Bottom Line:**_“_ _The remarkable courage on display of grandmas picking up rifles to defend Kyiv, you have border guards in the South telling Russian warships to 'go to hell'. You have Zelensky himself leading from the front, begging us for more ammunition. That courage should inspire us. Shame on us for not providing support more quickly.”_ **"It’s Time for America to Wake Up"** [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=46a309cbf574450da71005633aeeceed&_e=jPQdk2o1xyKOnLe6K4asLrCN_Mhox1OpexuEAcI2jNONHnItHYNOIxAYvl6kFw63ApSm84uooIsYcWKd4rQMioa0FkUBArlreQUxmD-U_VoN58EgnkIMtYlE7mQgSGAVszNSQ8GI06GImW_Dhluv2Wf9yuxnv7Hm3b1S86uRD8P9uB7tLJDXIy0pi8Owcr_wYmVw8ffzzVJzDknOCUonP67--L7TnxziOoGaG7OIlmr8JhzMgse2pp3pOpjkrZFYMWULZnHKyNGY0gFWywRdqmyc1v9QDNNaOikRCBpCTI4qVSQon9Hayz1WD5CYxYKAVLRjVTX3TqQQdzTw-HyQb94bF6w3U2mH7-BIqz9qXjMrpzxKAOVBo_Qf6_KJWhhEoC_N4c0xqqloep-t1RjIkONbEAIZek5gxhCkv-sx2xnCbDML-T3JxKltoAFTqKBx) **Bottom Line:**_“_ _Shame on us for being so slow to help a friend, our friends in Ukraine who are demonstrating the will to fight. We could have armed them to the teeth. It wouldn't have required us to put our own boots on the ground, and made this even more difficult for Vladimir Putin. But of course, the Biden administration was wedded to this threat of sanctions, the only strategy that ultimately failed to deter Putin."_ [**STAND WITH UKRAINE**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=46a309cbf574450da71005633aeeceed&_e=jPQdk2o1xyKOnLe6K4asLrCN_Mhox1OpexuEAcI2jNONHnItHYNOIxAYvl6kFw63ApSm84uooIsYcWKd4rQMioa0FkUBArlreQUxmD-U_VoN58EgnkIMtYlE7mQgSGAVszNSQ8GI06GImW_Dhluv2Wf9yuxnv7Hm3b1S86uRD8P9uB7tLJDXIy0pi8Owcr_wYmVw8ffzzVJzDknOCUonP67--L7TnxziOoGaG7OIlmqXYIHcCKw_U5sfZLrSDPD5mrnZtAhVaR4n3NuYPsM2kYbFSlJMbEwxPaa7nxFbYCQCok8mrnUrVI61nXIVAIqeZiZpb64qCNyiT5GRyAjjMBSWBckupY3vDPZq_07LiFL4uO-3XTVTIjdFJf0Zv3XF6d4u1FuHS0V5Y87iJmTZsgmeHdTOO59BPIAluxVTyQwpp5eGCwq0m_-Iqr5Kpffe) Our team is closely monitoring this situation and will keep you updated as more unfolds. Thank you, Gallagher Press Team | |

name: Max Steiner
subject: Some Republicans are switching from supporting Putin to now supporting Ukraine.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42618141/333628774/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjY2NjJjOS1hNzljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2LMHq-oOnJOw0Qy4oW7kxHADSK8Hw1Te7rP0-qd8p5s=)
It's that time again, friend. As you know, Army reservists are required to spend at least one weekend per month and several weeks per year at training. That’s what I’ll be up to this weekend -- away at training. Heading to training has taken on a new meaning in the past week. With a war raging in Ukraine, it's a sobering reminder that our armed forces need to stay mission ready and able to defend the nation at a moment's notice. Over the past two weeks, we've seen a number of Republican politicians and personalities pivot from supporting Vladimir Putin to supporting Ukraine. This pivot is overdue, but I'm afraid that it is not sincere. We cannot trust Republicans with political power until they are willing to criticize those in their own party, like Donald Trump or Tucker Carlson, who PARROTED Putin's propaganda for years. **Ukraine needs our support, Republicans just want to use it as a tool to criticize Biden. We’ve been ill-served by far-right Republicans who make speeches based on political expediency rather than what’s genuinely good for international peace.** [**We're hoping to maintain our fundraising momentum while I'm gone training, so we set a goal of raising $5,000 in online donations before the weekend closes. Will you chip in $3, $15, or even $35 today? Your contribution means we won’t fall behind while I’m away.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42618142/333628775/360059203?refcode=em-3.5.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjY2NjJjOS1hNzljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2LMHq-oOnJOw0Qy4oW7kxHADSK8Hw1Te7rP0-qd8p5s=) I enlisted in the Army because I wanted to defend our institutions. This crisis is proof that Congress would be better served with some people in the room who have actual military experience. Thanks for your support, Max
Democrat and Combat Veteran for Congress | **[Donate »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42618143/333628776/360059203?refcode=em-3.5.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjY2NjJjOS1hNzljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2LMHq-oOnJOw0Qy4oW7kxHADSK8Hw1Te7rP0-qd8p5s=)**

name: Ted Cruz
subject: My friend Monica needs YOUR help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
Monica would be the first Hispanic female -- and the first Republican to represent this South Texas district ... EVER. | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=2db110825d5e4f59b6811f93a05d1f52&_e=mv-QfT_32vsarG-1rVPR_zbFkdhYf8L_2kkc0XXvoiy5BLt_BANxpe5kAJqk3ZAJP7sf_oOkExUa5PMACmuzMgtu6ZuNL2Pdw8-Fz3SRk7-bA3BPZkqFbk06LWLT3IGBVwnPOn_p8miaVRxMU5oQZGKIqBCo-f04hW9dx3fs-TXR5DKrAHQsWB1Jd6xKLbv2ru-JtTa_KKZTGXAvL5yzVuyDtbpnAtsJoSM3hPAHszqkEVxkT4YfrKHWx9INQbS9dVOuG7kEjZritbrVrXTZ-wvGXKiW44hmaFnyYFcXbGx4aH80-vYwQgxroWzsMPXObcBt3f0QL1o_mh68uYi02Vgp-CSizH6C5MXmokb7QOhcJIwNFdgJQdkTY19lmSnLFzv6IiU73kIIAtF1SNgTKvEspQzT8kHVuh4bIlvETDrd-3psivt5TR8HTARXUEXfqO3B3F3BGd-_Kn_qDz7zR4Wn2YwU2FmfibMFXul3CXDXXliNnDK3mWtuxxtVkQDZ)

Fellow patriot,

Democrats love to virtue signal non-stop, and cancel anyone who disagrees with them. For a long time, it worked.

But now, conservatives know the Left’s game, and how to beat it. The key is to be PROUD of our beliefs, ignore the liberal attacks, and tell everyday working-class Americans what we believe -- and how our principles make their lives better.

Now, we’re seeing Republicans of all stripes filing to run for office, saying what’s on their mind, and defending our shared beliefs.

Let me be clear: The Republican Party welcomes anyone who shares our values. My friend Monica De La Cruz knows that, too. In 2020, **Monica fell short just 6,588 votes from winning a seat in Congress that has been held by Democrats for over 118 years**. Had she been successful, Monica would have been the first Latina Republican ever elected to Congress from South Texas.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=2db110825d5e4f59b6811f93a05d1f52&_e=mv-QfT_32vsarG-1rVPR_zbFkdhYf8L_2kkc0XXvoiy5BLt_BANxpe5kAJqk3ZAJP7sf_oOkExUa5PMACmuzMgtu6ZuNL2Pdw8-Fz3SRk7-bA3BPZkqFbk06LWLT3IGBVwnPOn_p8miaVRxMU5oQZGKIqBCo-f04hW9dx3fs-TXR5DKrAHQsWB1Jd6xKLbv2ru-JtTa_KKZTGXAvL5yzVuyDtbpnAtsJoSM3hPAHszqkEVxkT4YfrKHWx9INQbS9dVOuG7kEjZritbrVrXTZ-wvGXKiW44hmaFnyYFcXbGz1uwYqdbkQS8EwqmITpypqCJjulx6vQSkvo5fwy-GyoY0S8W_4CbY_PoftOGvGbh4HWNEd1avsiuIg3VqwKLnIngG15N9AzXWjCvgYHUg0dmay3q2fZNbhRWk2V8-kxCVMkiLKg0onG9ZA7a-u4vaLRF7Hu-OcuJxOu1n6KXH-QV6CzX3O9MefIMt92hDL7XfJhnfcIPJC9RfaEOEQSpBc)

We need more people like Monica in Congress; she is living proof of the American Dream. She knows that in America, when you set your mind to something you can achieve it. She was raised by a single mother in a Texas border town, despite the hardships, Monica struck out on her own to realize her own American Dream. Armed with her faith and support from her Mother, Monica grew up to become one of the top insurance agents in South Texas.

We need people like Monica in Congress. A woman who knows what hard work is; a woman who has the perseverance and grit to deliver for her community.

**Republicans only need to pick up FIVE seats next year to win back the House, and I can tell you that Monica’s race is one of the best chances we have at flipping a BLUE seat RED!**

On behalf of my friend Monica, **[I’m asking you to give generously](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=2db110825d5e4f59b6811f93a05d1f52&_e=mv-QfT_32vsarG-1rVPR_zbFkdhYf8L_2kkc0XXvoiy5BLt_BANxpe5kAJqk3ZAJP7sf_oOkExUa5PMACmuzMgtu6ZuNL2Pdw8-Fz3SRk7-bA3BPZkqFbk06LWLT3IGBVwnPOn_p8miaVRxMU5oQZGKIqBCo-f04hW9dx3fs-TXR5DKrAHQsWB1Jd6xKLbv2ru-JtTa_KKZTGXAvL5yzVuyDtbpnAtsJoSM3hPAHszqkEVxkT4YfrKHWx9INQbS9dVOuG7kEjZritbrVrXTZ-wvGXKiW44hmaFnyYFcXbGxQQjsFHsWREWN4StxDzoNIpeFBejAmmkwBCFHO8p30iEczgWlI2p_-9_72ffHNxBCD0oUrRKSGFHNEH6kh0-t01rSzyH4wyhu4-A0HRQe_xIy9Cjl5_6YH4t0pmzUo0ovoLL7R6j_UkznwsoX8R-qO57AVRyRDBLfTnyT-8hzXFkE1KaxS_wNLpF6OZKb9MSkDeqzNRoKYeMGXzG-Z43rj)** – whatever that means to you. Monica will represent our entire Party in the House, and she’ll make us all proud.

[ HELP ME GET MONICA TO WASHINGTON»](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=2db110825d5e4f59b6811f93a05d1f52&_e=mv-QfT_32vsarG-1rVPR_zbFkdhYf8L_2kkc0XXvoiy5BLt_BANxpe5kAJqk3ZAJP7sf_oOkExUa5PMACmuzMgtu6ZuNL2Pdw8-Fz3SRk7-bA3BPZkqFbk06LWLT3IGBVwnPOn_p8miaVRxMU5oQZGKIqBCo-f04hW9dx3fs-TXR5DKrAHQsWB1Jd6xKLbv2ru-JtTa_KKZTGXAvL5yzVuyDtbpnAtsJoSM3hPAHszqkEVxkT4YfrKHWx9INQbS9dVOuG7kEjZritbrVrXTZ-wvGXKiW44hmaFnyYFcXbGzirVklD9jUXV7jKTWbTJj-A-6qdo8Ctcfn0SSM8xO8n70Yy9BogLh74A1-6kG-N7tdXsCf9T7IsZ56hP9BhxdaHcg4otbJMzqvwj6UjwzLdq0RmCxiy9l5GEDWkuK8Shts-_9VtY05g7tTNfUYA0P4d3os4ivX6cnVSTRrR6PfZ4pwsfKjS4w38-ghVNTAP_AVnwg0ET9lyW64Ybo1shoy)

name: Welch for Vermont
subject: We cannot let Mitch McConnell become Majority Leader again. Here’s why:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
One donation at a time—that’s how we win.

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=123%2E61531%2EbEqgj-)
Hello,
Here are five words that would mean a whole lot of trouble for our country: Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell.
Just look at his track record. He’s stolen Supreme Court seats, handed big tax breaks to giant corporations and the wealthy, and tried to rip health care away from tens of millions of Americans. Losing just one seat to the Republicans makes him the majority leader again, and that would crush the progressive agenda our country needs.
Electing Peter Welch as Vermont’s next senator not only helps keep Mitch McConnell out of power, it helps put one more progressive champion in the Senate. He’s someone who will fight for the Green New Deal, Medicare for All, and putting working families’ needs front and center.
[**The 50/50 Senate hangs in the balance. We’re not taking any money from corporate PACs, so we’re building this campaign one donation at a time. Can you pitch in $15 to help elect Peter and keep the Senate blue?**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1481?t=3&akid=123%2E61531%2EbEqgj-)
_If you’ve saved payment info with ActBlue Express, you donation will process automatically:_

---
| [$3](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1481?t=14&amount=3&akid=123%2E61531%2EbEqgj-)

| [OTHER](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1481?t=12&akid=123%2E61531%2EbEqgj-)

Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans have made winning back power their top priority ever since they lost it. But instead of doing the right things to earn people’s votes and trust, they’ve leaned into more bad ideas and regressive policies—while threatening our right to have our voices heard at the ballot box.
There’s no way we can trust Mitch McConnell or any of his Republican cronies with the future of our country. We have to elect Peter Welch as Vermont’s next senator to stop that from happening. And donating now—when donations go the furthest, instead of closer to the election—is one of the best ways to make sure we win.
[**If you’re able to, please chip in $15 or any amount to elect Peter Welch to the Senate and fight for our progressive values.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1481?t=7&akid=123%2E61531%2EbEqgj-)
Thank you!
Team Welch
