clean_body: One donation at a time—that’s how we win. - Hello, Here are five words that would mean a whole lot of trouble for our country: Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell. Just look at his track record. He’s stolen Supreme Court seats, handed big tax breaks to giant corporations and the wealthy, and tried to rip health care away from tens of millions of Americans. Losing just one seat to the Republicans makes him the majority leader again, and that would crush the progressive agenda our country needs. Electing Peter Welch as Vermont’s next senator not only helps keep Mitch McConnell out of power, it helps put one more progressive champion in the Senate. He’s someone who will fight for the Green New Deal, Medicare for All, and putting working families’ needs front and center. - If you’ve saved payment info with ActBlue Express, you donation will process automatically: | - | - | - | - | - | - Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans have made winning back power their top priority ever since they lost it. But instead of doing the right things to earn people’s votes and trust, they’ve leaned into more bad ideas and regressive policies—while threatening our right to have our voices heard at the ballot box. There’s no way we can trust Mitch McConnell or any of his Republican cronies with the future of our country. We have to elect Peter Welch as Vermont’s next senator to stop that from happening. And donating now—when donations go the furthest, instead of closer to the election—is one of the best ways to make sure we win. - Thank you! I wanted to give you an important update on our strategic plan to reelect Senator Hassan.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42628358/333656496/-1829049351?refcode=jtk730-fr-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTNhZTA2NC1kMjljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-7yXNdTrIxb9CHJpWqQmT0VAbLstfac6KreI-rcgkNk=)

I need you to hear this: I wanted to give you an important update on our strategic plan to reelect Senator Hassan. This is a longer email, but I hope you’ll give me a minute to explain.
Maggie’s last race was won by just 1,017 votes - the tightest margin in the country. An election this competitive is a marathon, not a sprint. What we do right now could be the difference between winning or losing in November.

**That’s why I just authorized an unprecedented $13 MILLION ads investment to get our message out, keep this Senate seat blue, and protect Democrats’ Senate majority.**
New Hampshire is a state with expensive media markets. And with the most competitive race on the map, waiting any longer to make these reservations would mean potentially losing the opportunity to reach the voters we need. **That’s not a risk I was willing to take.**

**But here's the thing, everyone: we don't have all of the money yet – not even close. That means to execute this plan we can’t miss a single goal, starting with today’s.**

**Yes, this is a risk, but it's one we have to take.** The latest polling is showing Sen. Hassan statistically tied with a GOP opponent, political experts just labeled this race a toss-up, and The Hill is saying that "the Senate majority will go through New Hampshire."

Our first ads budget benchmark is tomorrow, and we still need to raise another $20,000 to keep us on track so we can reelect Sen. Hassan and keep the Senate blue.

**[Please pitch in $5 or more right away to keep this seat blue, reelect Sen. Hassan, and protect our Democratic Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42628360/333656498/-947982778?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk730-fr-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTNhZTA2NC1kMjljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-7yXNdTrIxb9CHJpWqQmT0VAbLstfac6KreI-rcgkNk=)**

| | Peter,

Crime is rising across our state as liberal politicians and radical district attorneys push an agenda that actually empowers criminals. They are out of control!

As you probably know, I am a staunch supporter of our men and women in blue. Not only that but I helped found Orange County’s Gang Reduction Intervention Program.

This has been a personal mission of mine for many years.

That’s why I thought it would be nice to show our support for California’s police. If you agree, will you sign your name to say just how much you appreciate them?

name: Angel Montalvo for Congress 2022
subject: Angel Montalvo For Congress - Rising Tide Newsletter
body:
Hello Friend,

February has come to an end. We have about 6 months before the primary on August 23rd. Thank you to all our volunteers who participated in our canvass this past Saturday and Sunday in Coral Gables! Continue to read below for some more upcoming events and news on what is currently going on in our state regarding legislation.

Haven’t signed up to volunteer yet? [HERE](https://forms.gle/8HY4A42pTdMY1MLB7) is the link for signing up, if you haven’t already! Please also share with your networks!

Upcoming Events

Last weekend, we collected almost 100 petitions! With the energy from our first launch so palpable, we’re continuing our outreach for petitions as we march closer towards the primaries.

We will officially be hosting canvass launches every weekend for the next few months.We hosted a canvass today at Coral Gate Park 12:00 PM ET.

Interested in joining other canvasses? [RSVP HERE](https://forms.gle/yJNNLTmPVNbaVTse8).

Weekly Review

The People’s Progressive Caucus: The board of the People’s Progressive Caucus (PPC) of Miami met at the Hialeah Starbucks currently organizing a union drive. Our orders were placed under the name of “Union Strong” as a sign of solidarity with the workers. I joined the board of the PPC because of the values reflected in this gesture. With so much of our local economy centered on the service industry, it is imperative that we mobilize and organize our service workers.

That’s where our power lies. After participating in this meeting I am reassured knowing that some of the most passionate and dedicated organizers I have met, day in and day out, volunteer their precious time.

Follow the People’s Progressive Caucus of Miami on Facebook today: <https://www.facebook.com/PPC305> Support the Hialeah Starbucks Workers union drive by following them on Instagram @sbworkersunitedhialeah <https://www.instagram.com/sbworkersunitedhialeah/>

Angel was recently a guest on Real Stories, Gente Real to talk about what this campaign means for him and his community.
Listen to Angel’s appearance on Real Stories, Gente Real below.
[Spotify](https://open.spotify.com/episode/5bGzZ7mRUtr2vtlcQYCPrR?si=9ELqXC2wRJSYRJ5cE5hVdQ)
[Website](https://realstoriesgenterealpodcast.buzzsprout.com/1772161/10155655)

Current Events

HB 1557: Sadly, the controversial “Don’t Say Gay” bill has passed the Senate Committee. The legislation was passed last week by the House in a 69-47 vote. The state Senate Appropriations Committee on Monday advanced the bill by a vote of 12 to 8.

LGBTQ+ rights groups on Monday condemned the Senate committee’s passage of the bill.
“Removing LGBTQ people and topics from public schools will only work to further shame a group of young people who already face disproportionate rates of discrimination, bullying, and suicide attempts,” Amit Paley, CEO and Executive Director of The Trevor Project, said in a statement.
“LGBTQ students and families deserve to see themselves reflected in the classroom. What they don’t deserve is stigma and censorship from the government.” ([The Hill](https://thehill.com/changing-america/respect/equality/596178-florida-dont-say-gay-bill-passes-final-senate-committee))
________________________________
HB 7: The Florida House of Representatives also passed the “Stop WOKE Act” on Thursday. Dubbed the “Stop WOKE Act,” which stands for wrongs to our kids and employees, it bans the teaching of critical race theory, which addresses systemic racism in the U.S., alleging it widens racial divisions—the concept becoming a national flash point. ([The Hill](https://thehill.com/changing-america/respect/diversity-inclusion/595732-florida-house-passes-stop-woke-act-to-limit))
________________________________
HB 5: Florida Senate poised to pass bill banning abortions after 15 weeks. Though it’s mirrored after a 2018 abortion bill passed in Mississippi that is now before the U.S. Supreme Court, the bill’s sponsor in the Senate, Ocala Republican Dennis Baxley, says other states could follow Florida in passing similar legislation.
“I think that this is the time and the place for Florida to really set an example for the whole country,” Baxley told reporters on Wednesday. “When we move on something, it frequently moves across a lot of states.” ([BayNews9](https://www.baynews9.com/fl/tampa/politics/2022/03/02/florida-senate-poised-to-pass-bill-banning-abortions-in-florida-after-15-weeks-))
________________________________
HB 537: A bill that would create consumer protections for tenants who choose to pay a monthly fee instead of a security deposit cleared the full House on Thursday with [an 88-27 vote](https://www.myfloridahouse.gov/Sections/Bills/floorvote.aspx?VoteId=20991&BillId=74105&&).
Security deposit alternatives allow renters to avoid paying a security deposit — often equivalent to a full month’s rent — and instead pay a monthly fee. ([FloridaPolitics](https://floridapolitics.com/archives/500825-house-passes-security-deposit-alternative-bill/))
________________________________

These pieces of legislation are intended to cause severe harm to our communities. They were drafted and submitted by corporations and the politicians they own in order to obfuscate their complete and utter lack of substantive policy solutions to the issues that affect our communities. Make no mistake, they intend to keep a strangle-hold on the power that rightfully belongs to the people, at any cost. The price is far too steep, we cannot continue to allow our communities to pay that price.

Our campaign is centered on the premise that our policies speak to the needs of our communities. From housing to healthcare, jobs, and climate we know that in order to enact the policies we require we must reject the corrosive influence of big money.

It’s up to us to do the work and get our message out there. That is precisely what we intend to do.
____________________________________
Fundraising: [https://bit.ly/ContributeMontalvo4Congress](https://bit.ly/ContributeMontalvo4Congress)
Website: [https://www.montalvoforcongress.com/](https://www.montalvoforcongress.com/)
Instagram: [https://bit.ly/3BIgS5S](https://bit.ly/3BIgS5S)
Facebook: [https://www.facebook.com/MontalvoForCongress](https://www.facebook.com/MontalvoForCongress)

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: A work of unsurpassed beauty
body:
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—
[View this message in your browser](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z6v5ejg28iai0v75jrsid11927njdpdn6onr5t2g_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cli69ob4c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqct9hmcp7acdkmgprcd9m6kpr2sjk66pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t34smo6bd73eeq78pdmclqr8slhm1hmapb6cgqn7c3mcerm8c73c1gbco5le8o6fkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup3cphhmipm9pti65j3ao5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
| | This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2ztjt1gi7h07lhmv53c9kuke5q1lt5v3e8ufoe0so_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cli69ob4c5h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend, While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **“The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King”** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This is why we’ve produced our online course, “The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King,” which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z58r9lmd4i6ool3d6rk9ifplfrvtni8437u8l4i0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cli69ob4c5h2bs)** By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**
---
| [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zks4gsttvjkbqloauibgh33m97uciktjioahfhng_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cli69ob4c5h2bs)
---
| | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying **“The David Story.”**

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** If you’d like to secure a DVD box set of **“The David Story”** while they’re available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.

Reserve your DVD box set using the secure link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zmgublkgkothtl99l1ei32mk0n9ntekgjfsu1kqo_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cli69ob4c5h2bs)**
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Self Reliance Central, [please use this preferences page](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/prefs/9z2zb7mqtdpfhgarr34icovj5gko5sd3vpjnfcohjgg).
1602 Belle View Blvd #381, Alexandria, VA 22307

[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zo6qud24lfqe7gu5ccbnodj03pp9q6j1pgdvk9j8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or1cdim8p71chgm49fg)

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: I stand with the LGBTQ+ community
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
We need to send a unified message to the Senate.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42621475/333630661/1884979347?refcode=BLU-SJC-20220305-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NmI5MTVkOS1hYTljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AktF2yoNfzsMyINF9kdisaOUT-nz1yc8y41X-sB8Vq8=)
---
| I have been deeply upset in recent days by news of the anti-LGBTQ+ policies being proposed in states like Florida and Texas, with similar legislation in the works in many other states. **These policies would cause incalculable harm to LGBTQ+ individuals,** including banning discussion of sexual orientation or gender identity in schools and requiring teachers to inform parents if their child is a member of the LGTBQ+ community.

**As the proud sister of two LGBTQ+ siblings and the proud representative of Hillcrest, the heart of San Diego’s LGBTQ+ community, I take attacks on the LGBTQ+ community very seriously.**

All members of the LGBTQ+ community deserve to be safe regardless of what state they are in. That’s why I am working to ensure all of our siblings have equal protection under federal law. I’m especially proud to be an original co-sponsor of the Equality Act, a bill that prohibits discrimination on the basis of sex, gender identity, and sexual orientation in housing, employment, education, credit, the jury system, and more.

**The House passed this landmark piece of legislation with bipartisan support one year ago.** All eyes are on the Senate — if the Equality Act passes there, President Biden has promised to sign it into law.

We need to send a unified message to the Senate — that the LGBTQ+ community deserves equal rights and dignity under federal law, and the time to act is now. [_**Will you add your name today to show your support for the Equality Act?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42621476/333630662/-1049962057?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NmI5MTVkOS1hYTljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AktF2yoNfzsMyINF9kdisaOUT-nz1yc8y41X-sB8Vq8=&emci=e90c51b8-dc9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=66b915d9-aa9c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=14239920)
---
| [SIGN NOW ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42621477/333630663/-1049962057?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NmI5MTVkOS1hYTljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AktF2yoNfzsMyINF9kdisaOUT-nz1yc8y41X-sB8Vq8=&emci=e90c51b8-dc9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=66b915d9-aa9c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=14239920)
---
Thank you for your support on this crucial issue,

clean_body: We need to send a unified message to the Senate. | = | I have been deeply upset in recent days by news of the anti-LGBTQ+ policies being proposed in states like Florida and Texas, with similar legislation in the works in many other states. These policies would cause incalculable harm to LGBTQ+ individuals, including banning discussion of sexual orientation or gender identity in schools and requiring teachers to inform parents if their child is a member of the LGTBQ+ community. As the proud sister of two LGBTQ+ siblings and the proud representative of Hillcrest, the heart of San Diego’s LGBTQ+ community, I take attacks on the LGBTQ+ community very seriously. All members of the LGBTQ+ community deserve to be safe regardless of what state they are in. That’s why I am working to ensure all of our siblings have equal protection under federal law. I’m especially proud to be an original co-sponsor of the Equality Act, a bill that prohibits discrimination on the basis of sex, gender identity, and sexual orientation in housing, employment, education, credit, the jury system, and more. The House passed this landmark piece of legislation with bipartisan support one year ago. All eyes are on the Senate — if the Equality Act passes there, President Biden has promised to sign it into law. We need to send a unified message to the Senate — that the LGBTQ+ community deserves equal rights and dignity under federal law, and the time to act is now. | Thank you for your support on this crucial issue, Sara * | | = Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress Sara Jacobs for Congress 660 Pennsylvania Ave SE Suite 202 Washington, DC 20003 United States | | | ---|---|--- = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please

body:
One of Steve’s largest obstacles in this campaign is “The Big Lie.”

We’ll be candid, Friends. One of Steve’s largest obstacles in this campaign is “The Big Lie.” It’s a completely ridiculous conspiracy theory — but Republicans are pushing it for a reason. Steve’s far-right opponents think that if they can get Nevadans to believe the election results were tainted by widespread voter fraud in our state, they can not only motivate GOP voters to turn out in huge numbers, but also use the lie as a pretext for getting rid of mail-in voting. **[That’s why we can’t let this disinformation go unanswered. Steve urgently needs your help to take on the Big Lie and fight back against the false accusations that Nevada’s elections are rigged. clean_body: That’s not a typo. | Peter, In 2021, Democrats raised nearly $1.3 BILLION online from small-dollar donors. That number doesn’t even include the millions they’ve raked in from megadonors like Soros and Bloomberg. They raised all that cash for one express purpose: To keep power in Washington. With the path to the House majority running through South Florida, Nancy Pelosi is going to spend a huge chunk of that money right here in my congressional district to try and FLIP my bellwether seat. I won’t sugarcoat things: this is very, very bad. I know it’s asking a lot, but we need a surge of grassroots contributions right away to help us catch up. Can I count you in, Peter? Conservatives raised just $559 million online last year – less than half the $1.3 BILLION Democrat total. That puts the Left almost $700 million ahead with just eight months to go until election day, and we’re running out of time to cut into their advantage. To put it bluntly, you have two choices, Peter. clean_body: I know we’ve been sending a lot of emails lately, so I’ll keep it brief. This might sound crazy: but could you pitch in just $1 or more to our campaign today to elect Josh Riley to Congress and defend the House? | = | Peter, I know we’ve been sending a lot of emails lately, so I’ll keep it brief. = | = | = I know you might be asking yourself right now,“these races cost hundreds of thousands, if not millions of dollars. What good is my $1 going to accomplish?” Well, Peter, it sends a statement that our campaign isn’t funded by rich and powerful corporations. No, instead it’s powered by committed Democrats who are ready to build on the progress we made in 2020 and now protect our fragile majority in the House by flipping NY-22 and electing Josh Riley. Data shows this race is one of the best pickup opportunities for Democrats in the country, but it will be close. Peter, one thing is clear, the road to keep the House in Democrats’ hands runs through this district. And in a close race like this one, every contribution counts: especially since Josh is not taking a penny from corporate PACs or special interests. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = We appreciate all you do. As a passionate Democrat, you already know what’s at stake here. Governors have the power to appoint senators, sit on redistricting commissions, and sign — _**or _NOT_ sign**_ — anti-voting rights bills into law. The health of our democracy will be at risk if we don’t do _everything_ we can to secure Democratic gubernatorial victories here in Ohio and across the country. John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

clean_body: | It’s all hands on deck right now. Friend — Have you heard? John and his primary opponent are TIED. name: Team Erica Smith
subject: Will you add your endorsement?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US
body:
[1]Erica Smith

Erica Smith is a single mother, educator, three-term state senator, and
dirt-road Democrat who spent her life fighting for rural communities and
farmers in Eastern North Carolina.

Now she’s running to represent NC-01 — her home district – to give everyday
people a voice in Congress.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/es-em-202203-05-endorse-erica-smith/?source=em20220305-960&t=1006&akid=960%2E3698%2EH3vtVh ]Will you add your name to give Erica your personal endorsement?

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/es-em-202203-05-endorse-erica-smith/?source=em20220305-960&t=1007&akid=960%2E3698%2EH3vtVh ]Endorse Erica »

Three months ago, Erica launched this campaign for Congress on the promise
to fight for a New Deal for rural communities, take on corporate
monopolies, and restore power back to the people.

Since then, we’ve been building a powerful movement for working people in
North Carolina's 1st District and beyond.

We’ve also collected critical endorsements. From Democracy for America —
founded by former DNC chair Howard Dean — to the Working Families Party,
Elect Black Women, and 20+ elected officials. Now, we’re hoping to receive
another crucial endorsement — YOURS!

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/es-em-202203-05-endorse-erica-smith/?source=em20220305-960&t=1008&akid=960%2E3698%2EH3vtVh ]With
less than 75 days until our primary, can you endorse Erica Smith for U.S.
Congress? It’s going to take a strong Democrat who will fight for our
values and an unprecedented amount of support from people like you to
protect NC-01’s open seat.[ https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/es-em-202203-05-endorse-erica-smith/?source=em20220305-960&t=1009&akid=960%2E3698%2EH3vtVh ]Endorse Erica »

NC-01 is a highly competitive, must-win seat for Democrats.

That’s why we’re working hard to send Erica to Congress — where she’ll
fight for rural broadband, voting rights, bold climate action, and
reproductive rights. In fact, Erica is the ONLY pro-choice Democrat in
this race.

Erica represented more than half of the counties in our district in the
state senate — and she’s never lost an election here. But we know we’re up
against anti-choice and extreme, far-right GOP opponents *and* megadonors.

Every endorsement, donation, and supporter sharing our message with a
friend or family member will make a big difference.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/es-em-202203-05-endorse-erica-smith/?source=em20220305-960&t=1010&akid=960%2E3698%2EH3vtVh ]So, will you endorse Erica and our campaign today? Your personal
endorsement will show the strength of our grassroots movement and help us
build even more support moving forward.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/es-em-202203-05-endorse-erica-smith/?source=em20220305-960&t=1011&akid=960%2E3698%2EH3vtVh ]Add your endorsement »

Thank you for all you do,

Team Erica Smith

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220305-960-footer&t=1012&refcode2=960_3698_H3vtVh&akid=960%2E3698%2EH3vtVh

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=960%2E3698%2EH3vtVh

PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US

That's why we’re counting on your $5 donation by 11:59 p.m. tonight so we can hit our $10,000 goal, stay on track to compete with GOP spending and counter attacks against Abby. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Val Demings (personal)
subject: Why I'm running
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
I'm reflecting on this historic campaign – and I've decided I need to tell you a little bit more
#
I have 15 minutes of free time this morning, Peter. It may not sound like much – but I've been working long hours in Congress to pass President Biden's agenda, and a gap in my schedule like this is rare.
So, as I'm sitting with my husband, Jerry, and drinking my coffee, I'm reflecting on this historic campaign – and I've decided I need to tell you a little bit more about my decision to run for U.S. Senate.
Back when I was growing up in Jacksonville, I went to segregated schools, washed dishes and worked at McDonald's. But my mom saw something special in me. She'd tell me I was _destined_ for something bigger.
So, when I thought about 2022 and what our country needed to build back better after a disastrous presidency, I thought about her everlasting words to me: "Never tire, Val." I thought about the hardworking families like mine who deserve a leader that understands their lives, their struggles and their dreams. I thought about our country's need to expand our Democratic Senate majority to protect our democracy. And, in the background of all of this, I heard my mother's voice in my head telling me I could win.
So, I decided to run. And now, I'm two points away from Marco Rubio in a race that can decide Senate control, and the stakes are higher than ever: We have a 50-50 split in the Senate. If we lose just one seat, Mitch McConnell regains Senate control – and three Democratic seats are already rated toss-ups.
It's critical we win in Florida – and this race is tight right now, Peter. I'm proud that our movement has an average donation of just $28.45, but building a people-powered movement means it's going to take all hands on deck to compete against the GOP's millions in dark money already pouring into Florida.
My 15 minutes are almost up, and I have to run to my next call: I hate to ask this, but if you believe in this campaign and want to help me defend our Democratic Senate majority, will you donate $5 today? Here's the best link to contribute:
**[secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-220222-demings](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42629220/333659996/1564704153?refcode=pm_em_220305_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzM3MWIzNy1kYjljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dC5gLbptS6E-vTkBjFznT2MoGjzdKMlQTGbk1mfgGss=)**
All the best,
Val Demings
** **
** **
** **

****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42629221/333659997/1564704153?refcode=pm_em_220305_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzM3MWIzNy1kYjljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dC5gLbptS6E-vTkBjFznT2MoGjzdKMlQTGbk1mfgGss=)****

name: American Trucker Freedom Fund
subject: Can you cover the cost of fuel for one of our Freedom Truckers?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Great American Patriot Project
body:
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59747470:JMeOvUENd:m:1:3253819041:93728D0B8647CB2841635AE085B8C9B0:r)
---
| | |
Peter,

A grassroots movement like we've never seen before is sweeping across our country as you read this email. Since we put out the call for the American Truckers Freedom Convoy, thousands of truckers have signed up on our website, and tens of thousands more are organizing with our state captains.
**_[FILL A FREEDOM CONVOY GAS TANK](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59747470:JMeOvUENd:m:1:3253819041:93728D0B8647CB2841635AE085B8C9B0:r "FILL A FREEDOM CONVOY GAS TANK")_**
Why are we trucking across the country in protest? **_Simply put, we 've had enough, and we're betting you have, too._**

Tyranny has been sweeping across our country for the past two years; lockdowns, forced masking, vaccine mandates, and many other restrictions.

**The same tyranny swept across Canada too...and our brave brothers and sisters in the Freedom Convoy _lit a spark that 's going to ignite the light of liberty in the hearts of every freedom loving man, woman, and child on earth._**

We intend to carry that torch from across the country to Washington, D.C.
**_[FILL A FREEDOM CONVOY GAS TANK](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59747470:JMeOvUENd:m:1:3253819041:93728D0B8647CB2841635AE085B8C9B0:r "FILL A FREEDOM CONVOY GAS TANK")_**
Since the lockdown politicians insisted we give up our liberties in exchange for safety, and one thing has become absolutely clear: **_no politician or government action can slow the spread of COVID-19, they can only accelerate the spread of authoritarianism_**.

That's why we're trucking across the country to Washington D.C., it's time the government gives up their "emergency powers" and returns them to where they belong: the people.
**_[FILL A FREEDOM CONVOY GAS TANK](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59747470:JMeOvUENd:m:1:3253819041:93728D0B8647CB2841635AE085B8C9B0:r "FILL A FREEDOM
CONVOY GAS TANK")_**
**Free people don 't have to protest for Freedom.**

If we don't act now, **_we 'll see the exact same authoritarian takeover our brothers and sisters in Canada are experiencing right here in the USA..._** and half of the country will go along with it because they are afraid of having their bank accounts frozen, human rights suspended, or worse.

Right now, thanks to the overwhelming support from patriots across the country, our convoy is growing larger and larger everyday with Truckers from Fresno, to Bismark, to Cleveland, to Baton Rouge signing up to join.

But, the cost of this convoy grows with every Trucker who signs on, and that's why we're reaching out today to ask you to sponsor a Trucker in what could be the largest peaceful protest in history.
;**_[$15 = 10 Miles](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59747471:JMeOvUENd:m:1:3253819041:93728D0B8647CB2841635AE085B8C9B0:r "$15 = 10 Miles")_**
**_[$30 = 20 Miles](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59747472:JMeOvUENd:m:1:3253819041:93728D0B8647CB2841635AE085B8C9B0:r "$30 = 20
Miles")_**
**_[$75 = 50 Miles](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59747473:JMeOvUENd:m:1:3253819041:93728D0B8647CB2841635AE085B8C9B0:r "$75 = 50 Miles")_**
**_[$150 = 100 Miles](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59747474:JMeOvUENd:m:1:3253819041:93728D0B8647CB2841635AE085B8C9B0:r "$150 = 100 Miles")_**
**_[$375 = 250 Miles](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59747475:JMeOvUENd:m:1:3253819041:93728D0B8647CB2841635AE085B8C9B0:r "$375 = 250
Miles")_**
**_[$750 = 500 Miles](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59747476:JMeOvUENd:m:1:3253819041:93728D0B8647CB2841635AE085B8C9B0:r "$750 = 500 Miles")_**
**_[$1,500 = 1,000 Miles](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59747477:JMeOvUENd:m:1:3253819041:93728D0B8647CB2841635AE085B8C9B0:r "$1,500 = 1,000 Miles")_**
**_[$5,000 = FULL TRIP](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59747478:JMeOvUENd:m:1:3253819041:93728D0B8647CB2841635AE085B8C9B0:r "$5,000 = FULL
TRIP")_**
The Freedom Convoy must be the movement heard around the world, and we're asking for your most generous gift to make that a reality.

**[Can you cover the cost of fuel for 50 miles for one of our Freedom Truckers?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59747470:JMeOvUENd:m:1:3253819041:93728D0B8647CB2841635AE085B8C9B0:r "Can you cover the cost of fuel for 50 miles for one of our Freedom Truckers?")**

The time is now to take patriotic, beautiful, peaceful action, or we may never regain the freedoms we once had. **_We 're not in the business of telling our children and their children what it was like when America was free, [but we can't do it alone.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59747470:JMeOvUENd:m:1:3253819041:93728D0B8647CB2841635AE085B8C9B0:r "but we
can’t do it alone.")_**

**[Help fuel our convoy as we take direct action to regain our freedoms and ensure we never lose our liberty again.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59747470:JMeOvUENd:m:1:3253819041:93728D0B8647CB2841635AE085B8C9B0:r "Help fuel our
convoy as we take direct action to regain our freedoms and ensure we never lose our liberty again.")**

Honk Honk,

American Truckers Freedom Fund

Right now, thanks to the overwhelming support from patriots across the country, our convoy is growing larger and larger everyday with Truckers from Fresno, to Bismark, to Cleveland, to Baton Rouge signing up to join. But, the cost of this convoy grows with every Trucker who signs on, and that's why we're reaching out today to ask you to sponsor a Trucker in what could be the largest peaceful protest in history. ; "$15 = 10 Miles" "$30 = 20 Miles" "$75 = 50 Miles" "$150 = 100 Miles" "$375 = 250 Miles" "$750 = 500 Miles" "$1,500 = 1,000 Miles" "$5,000 = FULL TRIP" The Freedom Convoy must be the movement heard around the world, and we're asking for your most generous gift to make that a reality. "Can you cover the cost of fuel for 50 miles for one of our Freedom Truckers?" The time is now to take patriotic, beautiful, peaceful action, or we may never regain the freedoms we once had. We 're not in the business of telling our children and their children what it was like when America was free, "but we can’t do it alone." "Help fuel our convoy as we take direct action to regain our freedoms and ensure we never lose our liberty again." Honk Honk, American Truckers Freedom Fund Paid for by Great American Patriot Project This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system March 29, 2021. Last week, our opponent was the #2 campaign advertiser on Facebook in the ENTIRE COUNTRY - second only to the governor of Texas, who had a primary election this week. With the Texas primaries now over, our opponent will likely move into the #1 spot on the next Facebook advertising report.

Friend, our hard-fought battle to elect Joe Biden and flip the Senate in 2020 has led to a historic moment: President Biden has nominated the first Black woman to the Supreme Court! Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson is an incredible jurist who started as a public defender and would bring a much-needed perspective to a court that's currently being pushed drastically to the right by Trump's _three_ ultra-conservative appointees.
But with Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans gearing up to threaten Judge Jackon's confirmation process, we need President Biden and Senate Democrats to act FAST so that we can protect the future of the Supreme Court.

With everything from voting rights to reproductive freedom at stake in this fight, we're asking concerned Americans like you to speak out now. **But with time running out before our live poll closes at midnight tonight, we're still missing 38 responses from PA.** **So please, before our deadline, tell us:**
**Do you think the Senate should confirm President Biden's Supreme Court nominee?**

name: Andy Levin
subject: re: My most recent endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Levin for Congress
body:
Maxine Waters endorsed our campaign! Are you with us?
| | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42626660/333644760/-1948756003?ms=em-header&refcode=em_20220304_f_a_watersbump&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2I4YWU1MS1iZDljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DckdIa4gY4Vj0yhJNwcf7JVocnrypIJOhZ0EaU-XvZw=&emci=d43fd21d-a99c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=97b8ae51-bd9c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=22034926)

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42626661/333644761/-1948756003?ms=em-header&refcode=em_20220304_f_a_watersbump&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2I4YWU1MS1iZDljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DckdIa4gY4Vj0yhJNwcf7JVocnrypIJOhZ0EaU-XvZw=&emci=d43fd21d-a99c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=97b8ae51-bd9c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=22034926)
---
| | Peter, I wanted to reach out and make sure you saw the news — Chairwoman Maxine Waters endorsed my reelection campaign! Serving in Congress is the greatest honor — not only to help those in my community, but also getting to work with fellow progressive champions on the issues that matter most. Maxine and I have worked together in the Congressional Progressive Caucus to help working families across the country, and I’m so excited to have her support for our team and our movement. I admire Maxine’s devotion to workers rights, voting rights, racial justice, and more. Together, I know we can win and continue to deliver the progressive agenda for hard working Americans. [_**If you’re with her, please chip in to our campaign right away. March is a big month, and we need all hands on deck.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42626662/333644762/286183310?refcode=em_20220304_f_a_watersbump&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2I4YWU1MS1iZDljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DckdIa4gY4Vj0yhJNwcf7JVocnrypIJOhZ0EaU-XvZw=) Let’s go! Andy \--- Begin Forwarded Message --- Peter, I have exciting news I wanted to tell you personally: I’m endorsing my friend and colleague Andy Levin in his reelection campaign for Michigan’s new Eleventh District. I’ll explain why in a minute, but first, [_**can you join me in supporting him by chipping into his campaign right away?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42626663/333644763/882283677?refcode=em_20220304_f_a_watersbump&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2I4YWU1MS1iZDljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DckdIa4gY4Vj0yhJNwcf7JVocnrypIJOhZ0EaU-XvZw=) Working in close partnership with Andy in the Congressional Progressive Caucus and the U.S. House, I’ve seen firsthand his commitment to fighting for human rights, workers’ rights and racial justice. In this moment, progressives need their voices heard, and he’s the right person for the job. Andy has _always_ walked the walk. We’ve seen him help health care workers to organize with the SEIU, and in the House, he continues to be an anti-racism co-conspirator — fighting for housing justice, economic justice, and so much more. [_**Peter, we must keep progressive voices like Andy’s in Congress this year — can you chip in today to support his reelection campaign and power the progressive movement?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42626664/333644764/882283677?refcode=em_20220304_f_a_watersbump&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2I4YWU1MS1iZDljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DckdIa4gY4Vj0yhJNwcf7JVocnrypIJOhZ0EaU-XvZw=) To put it simply, we need bold leadership from individuals like Andy in the room where decisions are made. He is ready to roll up his sleeves and do the hard work necessary to make differences in the lives of American families — he uses his platform to uplift his community and bring light to the issues that impact working people every day. [_**Please give whatever you can today — even a few dollars makes a difference — to help Andy keep his seat in Congress and garner the support we’ll need to maintain and expand our Democratic majority.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42626665/333644765/882283677?refcode=em_20220304_f_a_watersbump&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2I4YWU1MS1iZDljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DckdIa4gY4Vj0yhJNwcf7JVocnrypIJOhZ0EaU-XvZw=) Thank you for your support, Chairwoman Maxine Waters
---
| |
---
| | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42626666/333644766/882283677?refcode=em_20220304_f_a_watersbump&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2I4YWU1MS1iZDljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DckdIa4gY4Vj0yhJNwcf7JVocnrypIJOhZ0EaU-XvZw=)

clean_body: Maxine Waters endorsed our campaign! Are you with us? | | | | | Peter, I wanted to reach out and make sure you saw the news — Chairwoman Maxine Waters endorsed my reelection campaign! Serving in Congress is the greatest honor — not only to help those in my community, but also getting to work with fellow progressive champions on the issues that matter most. Maxine and I have worked together in the Congressional Progressive Caucus to help working families across the country, and I’m so excited to have her support for our team and our movement. I admire Maxine’s devotion to workers rights, voting rights, racial justice, and more. Together, I know we can win and continue to deliver the progressive agenda for hard working Americans. = Let’s go! Andy \--- Begin Forwarded Message --- Peter, I have exciting news I wanted to tell you personally: I’m endorsing my friend and colleague Andy Levin in his reelection campaign for Michigan’s new Eleventh District. I’ll explain why in a minute, but first, = Working in close partnership with Andy in the Congressional Progressive Caucus and the U.S. House, I’ve seen firsthand his commitment to fighting for human rights, workers’ rights and racial justice. In this moment, progressives need their voices heard, and he’s the right person for the job. Andy has always walked the walk. We’ve seen him help health care workers to organize with the SEIU, and in the House, he continues to be an anti-racism co-conspirator — fighting for housing justice, economic justice, and so much more. = To put it simply, we need bold leadership from individuals like Andy in the room where decisions are made. He is ready to roll up his sleeves and do the hard work necessary to make differences in the lives of American families — he uses his platform to uplift his community and bring light to the issues that impact working people every day. = Thank you for your support, Chairwoman Maxine Waters | | | | | = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Levin for Congress | Andy Levin For Congress P.O. Box 1050 Birmingham, MI 48012 United States | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you believe you received this email in error or wish to no longer receive emails from us, .

Hello,
I happen to know a few genuine heroes. In my book, Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky is the definition of today's hero.
Do not forget: This is the same President Zelensky who Donald Trump tried to withhold Javelin missiles from unless Zelensky opened a fake investigation into Joe Biden.
And that is the same phone call that got Trump impeached the first time. The same phone call my Republican opponent Senator Chuck Grassley agreed was “perfect.”
Trump and Grassley sided with Vladimir Putin for 4 years – and now, we are seeing an emboldened Russia rearing its ugly head.
If I defeat Chuck Grassley this November and turn Iowa blue, I will be the most senior military person ever-elected to the United States Senate. You can be sure I’ll always side with democracy and those defending democracy.
Mitch McConnell’s Super PACs are already readying millions of dollars in attacks, but I’m not taking a dime in corporate PAC money, so I’m counting on grassroots donors like you if we’re going to fight back and win.
The early polls show a close race, but we need to raise another $35,000 before our deadline at midnight tonight, and right now we’re still short:
[**Please, may I count on you to chip in $5 or more right now – every dollar you can spare before our critical deadline – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42629878/333681441/-42398318?refcode=em20220305pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2IwNWZjZi1lODljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dxV9YueF3gJO4-YAJH607oW55I_BWuMEb41KWCpF4-4=)

name: John Fetterman
subject: Windows 95
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
This is a story about my time in AmeriCorps.
#
Derek, in a minute I'm going ask you for a personal favor: **[To make your first $5 donation to our grassroots campaign to flip this seat blue and add another voice for working families to the U.S. Senate.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45135?amount=5&refcode=em20220305-4849&t=1&akid=4849%2E434096%2EdymWXx)**
But before I get to that, I wanted to tell you about a point in my life that inspired me to get involved in public service: **My time in AmeriCorps.**
Waaaaaaaay back in 1995, I decided to quit my job and join AmeriCorps. My site was the Hill House Association in Pittsburgh's legendary Hill District. There, I taught GED classes to young mothers + fathers, and set up the very first computer labs in the neighborhood.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45135?refcode=em20220305-4849&t=2&akid=4849%2E434096%2EdymWXx)
I had just begun my personal and professional commitment to work against our nation’s raging racial + economic inequality. I had the great fortune of serving two years there.
Two years may not sound like a long time, Derek, but here's the truth: It was all the time it took for me to never look back. I learned in those few years that there was so much work to be done. **So I've committed every year of my life since then to making meaningful progress for working Pennsylvanians, no matter their ZIP code, race, sexual orientation, or income level.**
[****](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45135?refcode=em20220305-4849&t=3&akid=4849%2E434096%2EdymWXx)
Back then, Windows 95 was cutting-edge technology. Safe to say, a *lot* has changed in the last 25+ years. But while our nation's political policies and priorities certainly may have changed, my core principles haven't.
**I’m humbled to be in this journey alongside you as I run for U.S. Senate, Derek, and I'm proud to be running on a quarter-century record of championing these core principles, places, and people.**
>From my days in AmeriCorps to today, my values have stayed steady. They’re the values behind this campaign, the ones I know you and I share. And together, we can bring these values to Washington D.C.
**[That’s exactly what I'd do in the Senate — but truth be told, I'll need a whole lot of help from you and this team to get there. If you can chip in $5 or more to help fuel our grassroots campaign today, I'd be so grateful.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45135?refcode=em20220305-4849&t=4&akid=4849%2E434096%2EdymWXx)**
**[Chip in »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45135?amount=5&refcode=em20220305-4849&t=23&akid=4849%2E434096%2EdymWXx)**
__
Thank you for being in my corner. I can't tell you how much it means to me that you're here in this fight alongside me, Gisele, and our whole campaign.
More soon,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
P.S. In all my years of public service — and even a few years before that — my sole focus has been on one thing: **Making life tangibly better for working people all across Pennsylvania.[If that's what you think PA's next Senator should be focusing on, then I'm respectfully asking you to chip in your first $5 to our campaign today. Every single grassroots donation goes a long way.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45135?amount=5&refcode=em20220305-4849&t=24&akid=4849%2E434096%2EdymWXx)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220305-4849-footer&t=25&refcode2=4849_434096_dymWXx&akid=4849%2E434096%2EdymWXx)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=26&akid=4849%2E434096%2EdymWXx)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=4849%2E434096%2EdymWXx)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Rick Scott
subject: This is how we RESCUE AMERICA
body:
Peter,
In case you missed it, I released an 11-point plan to RESCUE AMERICA and bring our country back after the disastrous, far-Left Biden Administration.

Republicans can’t just sit by idly and wait to react anymore - _we need a plan to guide us as we rebuild after the Democrats tried to destroy us_.

[**In case you missed it, here is my Rescue America Plan:**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=3006beb1f9f24baa95bd9ff16997efe3&_e=PE790FYnnhzFssA6F9qFTV1woO4VOq7XrwrWKFQYYJCsjVj_Q8x2ou6O89hGD-aLhc-KtFCp2nbJD8152Qctq_5sGJf3dbsPesC-405DpA4NXAkaUEtVNRSLdRcAo9XZ7nWQqPaUOfl10o-ajhj-KqfFjqqfVkrTscPUDm-eVULUPzWUhsNSoIRe-vOkI4V8t39f5GlAkCHZO-6mlfhjxiIkjR7NVMUOI4Ab77TgrPTJY5timqo6ny7m8JgO7rY9ft_rL2zVMLGjHwIn6SDRsgY3aq-e_-9q_dN5BWT-hs-QSPO_M8bp-EnEEqDxDI33JgqtdYAbEar-Vmwg8X6Kt697Dwozhz-fooVvSZ4wwz-ku7pTzUil7xTB---3zalKI-xbR-_0HUOg8JSQRQ0cvzD7U80Br21Lavr8lkWi3eM%3D)
* **Our kids will say the pledge of allegiance, salute the Flag, learn that America is a great country, and choose the school that best fits them.**
* **Government will never again ask American citizens to disclose their race, ethnicity, or skin color on any government forms.**
* **The soft-on-crime days of coddling criminal behavior will end. We will re-fund and respect the police.**
* **We will secure our border, finish building the wall, and name it after President Donald Trump.**
* **We will grow America’s economy, starve Washington’s economy, and stop Socialism.**
* **We will eliminate all federal programs that can be done locally, and enact term limits for federal bureaucrats and Congress.**
* **We will protect the integrity of American Democracy and stop left-wing efforts to rig elections.**
* **We will protect, defend, and promote the American Family at all costs.**
* **Men are men, women are women, and unborn babies are babies.**
* **Americans will be free to welcome God into all aspects of our lives.**
* **We are Americans, not globalists.**

clean_body: Peter, In case you missed it, I released an 11-point plan to RESCUE AMERICA and bring our country back after the disastrous, far-Left Biden Administration. Republicans can’t just sit by idly and wait to react anymore - we need a plan to guide us as we rebuild after the Democrats tried to destroy us. Our kids will say the pledge of allegiance, salute the Flag, learn that America is a great country, and choose the school that best fits them. Government will never again ask American citizens to disclose their race, ethnicity, or skin color on any government forms. The soft-on-crime days of coddling criminal behavior will end. We will re-fund and respect the police. We will secure our border, finish building the wall, and name it after President Donald Trump. We will grow America’s economy, starve Washington’s economy, and stop Socialism. We will eliminate all federal programs that can be done locally, and enact term limits for federal bureaucrats and Congress. We will protect the integrity of American Democracy and stop left-wing efforts to rig elections. We will protect, defend, and promote the American Family at all costs. Men are men, women are women, and unborn babies are babies. Americans will be free to welcome God into all aspects of our lives. We are Americans, not globalists.** Are you ready to save our great country from the Left with me? Thank you, Senator Rick Scott Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Please make a today to help our campaign do our part to take back America. Thank you for your ongoing support of me and Senate Republicans.

name: John Isemann
subject: Last Night: Recap & Runoff
body:
Dear Committee Members,

Last night we defeated a sitting Assemblyman and former Gubernatorial candidate by double digit margins placing us in a runoff with Tom Kean Jr. Two thirds of voters selected a new conservative choice.

Nearly two hours after the runoff results were announced, NJ-07 second ballot polls finally opened for our many supporters _(including some recently flipped Kean, Peterson, and Rizzo supporters)_ who had now endured nearly six hours to assure their votes were counted. **Only after NJ-07’s second ballot voting was complete the Executive Board decided to postpone/re-do the second ballot (_without consent from our campaign or notification of voters)._**

Though there are still a lot of questions to be answered about last night’s process and next steps, we know this - Morris County voters rejected Tom Kean Jr. as their nominee. Had your votes been counted we are confident we would have won Morris County. We also know this - with your support and vote at a now postponed runoff _(to be scheduled this Thursday/Friday)_ and the same hard work that produced last night's outcome - **we will win Morris County.**

_To Our Supporters:_**** Thank you, thank you, thank you for your vote and commitment to stay out past midnight to assure our victory! **We now need your help to get everyone out to the polls one more time this Thursday/Friday.**

_To Peterson & Rizzo Supporters: _We hope to earn your vote as the best conservative candidate to take on the status quo and defeat Tom Malinowski. If we haven't got you yet - let us remind you how important it will be to deny the line to the status quo - creating a more open and transparent primary for all candidates. **For any of us to win in June - we need your vote in this convention.**

_To Kean Jr. Supporters:_ We will continue our work in Morris County for the next seven days and throughout the district till June 7th to earn your vote with a positive message focused on engaging the next generation of conservatives and winning in November. **If you have any questions, please reach out to me at (908) 448-8711.
**
_Listen to our recap: [Click Here](https://youtu.be/TYM5bsHE4KQ)
_[](https://youtu.be/TYM5bsHE4KQ)

Thank you,
John

\--

**John H. Isemann
Candidate for US Congress
**(908) 448-8711
[ji@johnisemann.com](mailto:ji@johnisemann.com)

[johnisemann.com](http://johnisemann.com)

clean_body: | | | | Get your shirt. | Peter, Joe Biden has continued to show that he doesn’t support America’s Truckers. But, when the Freedom Convoy came to Alaska, Kelly helped lead Alaskans in supporting them! And now they are headed to D.C. to protest the COVID mandates. Kelly asked us to make a product to be able to display all our support. Together, we can rise with courage and common sense to make a difference. Get your shirt today to show you support our Truckers and Freedom! Thank you, Team-Tshibaka | | | | ==

Fellow American,

Georgia Democrats are already spending some serious money online ahead of November's election.

And we mean _**serious**_ cash.

In the past two weeks alone, Senator Raphael Warnock and gubernatorial candidate Stacey Abrams have spent nearly _**$350,000**_ on Facebook ads targeting Georgia voters and raising money.

Last week, our opponent was the #2 campaign advertiser on Facebook in the ENTIRE COUNTRY - second only to the governor of Texas, who had a primary election this week. With the Texas primaries now over, our opponent will likely move into the #1 spot on the next Facebook advertising report.

Our opponent has serious resources at his disposal, there is no question about it.

[** SEND TEAM HERSCHEL $5
HELP FUND OUR FACEBOOK ADS -> **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=edaf34af5e464135839645b12f551c0b&_e=xM5JqubBWjpnKxBsEoKgTrb-9zDRQH_3B0-mWwvOnJpLdqdN5PWicS_PrVYI8bjuC1esN38HzxoMhCNNTbigD1dz9FZoXWRB-YAL3eXxV20onLT-oZ0gF5MOiTYsRsKTEM1FELOQnv1juCv5g6AohbYtsczgOro_ObOEdyDnsDu-nWgQGqME8rZxogQy7fSPoc3LL7FuHxccU-eKDogTxttCu7UV6bC7moRovxP6fy3Ck2KkNELkYo4OVM2NmXWwV89AmfW8_8rg9ahgldTydmb5oF7uT73pXMkJFGjp7RDDBlBiKJcdVj_M8dGdgc1kfbSBVKlPcchJQJxT6skh2JDeoQwQt-VKkRzvochTb3EvbNkwUXBLR-SttNxF6kXu4JggdrbMLT-2sHFV8TfmoPXMwVpLL5doFKxGCCMDm9VS9OdVHFqvYUa7HuHrrod_YNg6Xx3DsfzRCyU_oscpn8KyfLYd9Si7zmC9BGv3yow%3D)
As for our campaign? We don't have the support of the Hollywood elites or special interests like our opponent does, so we're assembling a grassroots army of patriots from across Georgia and around the country. We're coming to you with a challenge that'll last from now through next week.

**[Over the next few days, we'd like to match - dollar for dollar - what our opponent spent on Facebook ads over the last 7 days.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=edaf34af5e464135839645b12f551c0b&_e=xM5JqubBWjpnKxBsEoKgTrb-9zDRQH_3B0-mWwvOnJpLdqdN5PWicS_PrVYI8bjuC1esN38HzxoMhCNNTbigD1dz9FZoXWRB-YAL3eXxV20onLT-oZ0gF5MOiTYsRsKTEM1FELOQnv1juCv5g6AohbYtsczgOro_ObOEdyDnsDu-nWgQGqME8rZxogQy7fSPoc3LL7FuHxccU-eKDogTxttCu7UV6bC7moRovxP6fy3Ck2KkNELkYo4OVM2NmXWwV89AmfW8_8rg9ahgldTydq08i0ob1xhoxp5MaoOMiI0XZhyXscQGqofrKLwgNINtTdURnQPd7D3nA8EVGV9DtxnhX8YLShhY0XniRBLgvwXvs1X5RaCFTSEZBa8c3J6N6GBJgjPEMDEVP9_c1aPi650epFos7NHWuyx5iLhrft28c4fmkOvjqSoCz6pQR4c1OvqIu_LN5zupoyPhQ4OGntaNr9QzSTAQODQtDMa9zzc%3D)**

**That means we've set a goal to raise $73,080 between now and this time next week** - the exact amount our Democrat opponent spent in the most recently available public report.

In a race as important as the one we're running, it's critical to be able to match our opponent's advertising efforts dollar for dollar every step of the way.

**So, what do you say?[Can we count on you for a donation of $5 or even $20 right now to ensure we're able to hit our goal of raising $73,080 over the next seven days?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=edaf34af5e464135839645b12f551c0b&_e=xM5JqubBWjpnKxBsEoKgTrb-9zDRQH_3B0-mWwvOnJpLdqdN5PWicS_PrVYI8bjuC1esN38HzxoMhCNNTbigD1dz9FZoXWRB-YAL3eXxV20onLT-oZ0gF5MOiTYsRsKTEM1FELOQnv1juCv5g6AohbYtsczgOro_ObOEdyDnsDu-nWgQGqME8rZxogQy7fSPoc3LL7FuHxccU-eKDogTxttCu7UV6bC7moRovxP6fy3Ck2KkNELkYo4OVM2NmXWwV89AmfW8_8rg9ahgldTydq5UmnT9JsqB9aIgm6Y6IrOwvK9RVbLy6xXBpRxm6VkojJaRgQO5PgOaaGemzTe4JfynRmxPMMdnAAY-wIdGAlfLlqgnVr1ekdVJ757V8vq5SnooW2mYm19N8WWtQV-udb44ULPhHVoR7H6zTQV_Bob28N3lakhi69plm_jSZUeqpW5v4JkrxE9TKwtUWwwK_46QZvqFbB499kzxz_lMWUY%3D)**

We'll keep you posted on the progress we make towards our goal. For now, please know that your donation of **[$5 or even $20](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=edaf34af5e464135839645b12f551c0b&_e=xM5JqubBWjpnKxBsEoKgTrb-9zDRQH_3B0-mWwvOnJpLdqdN5PWicS_PrVYI8bjuC1esN38HzxoMhCNNTbigD1dz9FZoXWRB-YAL3eXxV20onLT-oZ0gF5MOiTYsRsKTEM1FELOQnv1juCv5g6AohbYtsczgOro_ObOEdyDnsDu-nWgQGqME8rZxogQy7fSPoc3LL7FuHxccU-eKDogTxttCu7UV6bC7moRovxP6fy3Ck2KkNELkYo4OVM2NmXWwV89AmfW8_8rg9ahgldTydoBBa_sWv2P-S9B3lV4mclMaIl88BggSm36bytGE5OOtzZhX0lywWy0sUAzICTa-wUdOPbqop78vLoN2Is7b_ZpSHuwEBnJNyE1pN266X7sf5b0Qy3WC1teokz8dVRfuLIoCSDgpYj0anr0D_ies9vyMw_0jqntwGanQTzHQWOnUXI7PtmRMy9gdObBlGaOyPn81CxFiWUvSfZHuWe0ixhk%3D)** is vital to the success of our campaign and ending the Democrats' control of the U.S. Senate.

name: Reeves Session Update
subject: Session Update!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY REEVES FOR CONGRESS
body:
GAMVC, Veteran Tax Cuts, Ukraine, And More!
| | |
---
| | [](https://qj61jwdp.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fbrycereeves.com/1/0100017f5c1d9354-93a240ed-b60e-473f-a097-6885680d92b7-000000/TvDKyz_iM5sAXSO4IDhL-S-3444=260)
---
| |
---
| **This Week in Session ** At the close of the penultimate week of Session, we are really now starting to see the fruits of our labor and the results of last year's election. We are still in the process of considering bills that passed through the House of Delegates, while they consider the bills that came out of the Senate. Thankfully our floor finally looks a little closer to that of the House of Delegates. If you watched [my speech stopping an infringement on our First Amendment rights last week,](https://qj61jwdp.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fwatch%2F%3Fv=1330750434374803/1/0100017f5c1d9354-93a240ed-b60e-473f-a097-6885680d92b7-000000/CV6-m65F5hExllOQ65X39m1MQvA=260) you may've noticed how obstructed the view was by the plexiglass cages the Democrats have kept up in the Senate. Despite scientific studies indicating that the cages didn't stop the spread of the virus, Democrats insisted on keeping them up in the Senate. But as of March 1st, the cages have come down and we can finally see each other while we debate on the floor. It's important to be able to look our colleagues in the eyes and see each other as people, especially when debates can be heated and passionate.
---
| | | [](https://qj61jwdp.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fwatch%2F%3Fv=1330750434374803/2/0100017f5c1d9354-93a240ed-b60e-473f-a097-6885680d92b7-000000/Mlnxczi9pe-Kf5fTEdKFER00yg8=260)
---
| As many of you know, I am one of the co-chairs of the General Assembly Military and Veterans Caucus (GAMVC). This is a bipartisan caucus of Veterans and Military members that meets each week. Lieutenant Governor Sears joined us this week, as did some cadets from the National Guard's youth Challenge program. We also held our yearly GAMVC Reception on Thursday evening, where we had over 150 veterans from all over Virginia join us in Richmond. Governor Youngkin, Lieutenant Governor Sears, Attorney General Miyares, Secretary Crenshaw, and Major General Williams were all in attendance as well. A conference committee, which I am a part of, has been working on my bill to provide retired veterans with major tax cuts looks to be finalizing. A conference committee is formed when similar bills pass the House and Senate and small differences need to be ironed out. The way it looks now, we'll be cutting taxes for veterans to the tune of $300,000,000 over the next two years.
---
| | |
---
| We had plenty of great folks stop by our office this week, including the pastor from His Village Church in Culpeper, Reverend Erick Kalenga. Pastor Kalenga also gave the invocation in the Senate the morning he stopped by. I love having constituents visit our office, so if you have a chance this next week please do! You can schedule an appointment with me via email (district17scheduling@gmail.com), and can also reach our office via phone (804-698-7517) or our district email (district17@senate.virginia.gov). I expect things to be very busy this final week as all of the legislation left will either succeed or fail. I have plenty of more bills to get through the final hurdle, and I expect to be working night and day to win. I'm also going to make a special request of everyone in this week's update: please say a prayer for the people of Ukraine who are fighting a brutal, and senseless, invasion from Vladimir Putin and Russia. We must always stand with those who fight for freedom, and oppose the authoritarian evils of monsters like Putin. Until next week,
---
| | |
---
| Bryce Reeves
---
|
---
| | PAID FOR BY REEVES FOR CONGRESS

I'm also going to make a special request of everyone in this week's update: please say a prayer for the people of Ukraine who are fighting a brutal, and senseless, invasion from Vladimir Putin and Russia. We must always stand with those who fight for freedom, and oppose the authoritarian evils of monsters like Putin. Until next week, | | | | Bryce Reeves | | | PAID FOR BY REEVES FOR CONGRESS | | | | | | | | | | | P.O. Box 374 McLean, VA 22101, United States | | or | |

body:
| | | Hi there, [**What’s the difference between me and my opponents? Simple: I’m the only candidate in this race who supports Medicare for All, the Green New Deal, a federal jobs guarantee, and funding millions of units of social housing. Please donate to help me win, so I can fight for those policies in Congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42630517/333690380/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjU0NTFiZS0wMzlkLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3owiC74aLpfFjjynZeCmv0tn4BrlKs7Bb7gDBoLmgGs=) I am also the first woman and first gay person to run for this seat, so I will always fight for women’s rights, LGBTQ+ rights, and reproductive freedom. I’m running for Congress because it’s the office where I could have the greatest impact over climate policy. If we don’t address climate, everything else is moot. We need to end the fossil fuel industry and transition to renewable energy — quickly. [If you’re with me on the above, please donate now. Whatever you can afford is a big help. name: Ronny Jackson
subject: Reading this headline made my stomach churn, Patriot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson
body:
Patriot, this isn't how I thought today would go... Instead of coming to you with the good news that I was nominated to represent the most MAGA-strong district in the nation, I'm coming to you with this terrible news: **AOC, BERNIE SANDERS, AND OTHER RADICAL LEFT-WING POLITICIANS PROMISE TO FLIP TEXAS AND AMERICA BLUE** Reading this headline made my stomach churn. I barely made it to election day before my campaign funds went dry. Fighting off Beto in 2021 nearly ran me into the ground... And now, I have nothing left in the tank to beat the uber-wealthy socialists AOC and Bernie Sanders. The thought of losing to them makes me physically ill. They'll destroy this country. **The only thing that 's allowed me to remain President Trump's #1 Ally in Congress has been the support of America-loving Patriots like you. ** But I won't last 1 day against these Socialists... I have to reach each and every one of my fundraising goals. Thankfully, President Trump has authorized ONE MORE DAY for me to do that. Please, I'm humbly asking you: [**Can you chip in $25, $100, or even $250 before midnight to GUARANTEE a crucial early victory for President Trump and the GOP?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59745469:6AEdhUENZ:m:1:3299561967:4E3E150352A918F30B292A4CF3A217C1:r) [**RUSH $25 BEFORE DEADLINE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59745469:6AEdhUENZ:m:1:3299561967:4E3E150352A918F30B292A4CF3A217C1:r) [**RUSH $100 BEFORE DEADLINE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59745469:6AEdhUENZ:m:1:3299561967:4E3E150352A918F30B292A4CF3A217C1:r) [**RUSH $250 BEFORE DEADLINE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59745469:6AEdhUENZ:m:1:3299561967:4E3E150352A918F30B292A4CF3A217C1:r) [**RUSH ANY AMOUNT BEFORE DEADLINE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59745469:6AEdhUENZ:m:1:3299561967:4E3E150352A918F30B292A4CF3A217C1:r) AOC and Bernie think they have me in the bag... What they don't know is that I have the support of Pro-Trump Conservatives like you, Patriot. Our Republican Majority is in serious danger of being lost. Nancy Pelosi knows that THIS RACE is the only thing keeping our hopes alive. If we can hit this fundraising goal by midnight tonight, me, Donald Trump, and the ENTIRE MAGA MOVEMENT will be grateful. Please, Trump needs me in office. He needs me to win this race. [**Will you make sure I have the resources to do that?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59745469:6AEdhUENZ:m:1:3299561967:4E3E150352A918F30B292A4CF3A217C1:r) Thank you for your support, Ronny Jackson | Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson

Hi team -- I want you to know that I reviewed this community's past survey responses and was extremely impressed.

**That's why, after careful consideration and multiple conversations with our Senior Leadership Team, I'm inviting you to join the DSCC's exclusive Majority Strategy Group.**

The handful of folks in this group provide critical input to our Senior Leadership Team and are helping us finalize the Democratic Party's official strategy to defend and expand our Senate majority.

We were _only_ able to flip the Senate because of the strategic decisions you helped us make leading up to the 2020 elections. And I'm 100% confident your input will help us win again.

**[So please, click this link to accept my personal invitation right away.](https://go.dscc.org/go/5995?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220305-Christie-StrategyGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220305-Christie-StrategyGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=3176%2E9716520%2EMkpM6X)**

_*To maintain the integrity of our data, we ask that you please do not share your link with non-members._

I'm excited to have you on the team!

Christie

name: Nick Rathod, Beto for Texas
subject: Do you have Beto's back?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

We're one election down, one to go. After Tuesday's primary election, it's
officially our people-powered movement going up against Greg Abbott — so I
wanted to take this opportunity to reach out.

Here's the bad news: Greg Abbott already has over $50 million in the bank
thanks to his special interest mega-donors. On top of that, one of
Abbott's strategists announced that they're planning to spend over $100
million attacking Beto.

But here's the good news: We're up to the task! We have double the
grassroots support of Abbott, but we need to keep up this momentum to
defend against the onslaught of attacks coming our way.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53757?refcode=ema20220305-179092&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=179092%2E444211%2EOZSum4 ]Can we
count on you to chip in $3 or more immediately? This
campaign is powered by grassroots donors like you chipping in whatever
they can, as often as they can.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53757?refcode=ema20220305-179092&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=179092%2E444211%2EOZSum4 ]Contribute $3

This race is shaping up to be one of the most competitive — and expensive
— in Texas history. But while Abbott calls up his large corporate donors
for check after check, we'll be focused on the people of Texas.

To win, we're going to build the biggest and best organizing program Texas
has ever seen. That means visiting every part of the state, knocking on
doors in every neighborhood, and talking to everyone — Democrats,
Republicans, Independents, and first-time voters alike.

Beto is focused on building a big, bold vision for Texas that encompasses
everyone, but we need this grassroots movement to have his back.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53757?refcode=ema20220305-179092&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=179092%2E444211%2EOZSum4 ]Will you donate $3 to power our organizing and elect
Beto? Your support brings us one step closer to defeating Abbott and
delivering for the people of Texas.

Thank you.

Nick Rathod
Campaign Manager, Beto for Texas

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1022&akid=179092%2E444211%2EOZSum4

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jake=20Monssen?=
subject: Greene's Gun Rally Goes Off Without a Bang
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Strahan for Congress
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2ac4c8418045/businesswoman-jennifer-strahan-announces-challenge-to-marjorie-taylor-greene-in-ga-8858069?e=daf3f68050)
---
| |
---
| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
Jake Monssen, jake@strahanforcongress.com
---
| | **Greene's Gun Rally Goes Off Without a Bang**
---
| **DALLAS, Ga** : Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene held a gun rally in Rome, Georgia, today. She spent weeks promoting the event with high profile guests like Herschel Walker. The event was set to be the home of a live show of "War Room" with Steve Bannon.

Earlier this week, [Herschel Walker backed out, citing Rep. Greene's attendance at a white nationalist rally last week](https://StrahanForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=21a96cd50be879ed37d24b0ca&id=2893db272f&e=daf3f68050) in Orlando, Florida. Steve Bannon, the main guest, also did not show up to the event which had minimal attendance.
---
|
---
|
---
| "This is a clear demonstration of what our campaign has been saying for weeks. Georgians are sick of Representative Greene's antics, and her support is dwindling in the district. Even her 'special guests' couldn't help her draw a significant crowd," said Strahan campaign manager Jake Monssen. "There are parallels to her work in Congress and this event. She talks a big game but never delivers."

Her dwindling support and disappointing crowd didn't stop Rep. Greene from [using her official office Twitter account to promote this campaign event](https://StrahanForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=21a96cd50be879ed37d24b0ca&id=b99dafd59e&e=daf3f68050), which is a [violation of House ethics rules](https://StrahanForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=21a96cd50be879ed37d24b0ca&id=9a970faef7&e=daf3f68050).

"Georgia voters can put an end to this source of constant embarrassment by voting for Jennifer Strahan in the May 24 Republican primary," said Monssen.
